There’s only 6 more hours left in our membership drive before tonight’s deadline. That means there’s only 6 more hours for you to show your support for our campaign by becoming a member.

name: Letitia James
subject: This is disappointing, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| |
---
Peter, what happened here?

Two days ago, I reached out to this powerful community asking for support – and the initial response was _overwhelming_ _. _

We shot up toward our 1,000 Team James Membership goal. But then, out of nowhere it seems, donations came to a standstill – causing us to be on the verge of falling short of our February membership goal by 239 donations.

I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short of this goal, but I _refuse_ to let it get the best of me. I’m confident in the size and strength of this team – **and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up this gap with only hours left to go. **

**Peter, I’m counting on _you_ to be one of the 239 people I need to reactivate their memberships, so please: **[**Will you donate any amount before 11:59 p.m. to activate your membership and help power my fight for progress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59428373/394181930/-1577261820?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk984-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDY4NTAwMS1jNGI3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwovXg9rAi1WmgupgCCNWH7uO3_x6m9X1TrHXt7C1cg=)

Thank you.

Letitia
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia**
Date: Sun, Feb 26, 2023
Subject: URGENT: Activate your membership now
| | |
---
Peter, can I be honest with you? I know it’s tempting to only focus on the positives, but I wanted to give you a real snapshot of where our fight for progress stands as we head into our third month of the year:

**_Still,_** millions of Americans are without access to safe reproductive health care; LGBTQ+ people are _nine times_ more likely than non-LGBTQ+ people to be victims of violent hate crimes; and approximately 40,000 Americans will likely die from gun violence before the year ends.

These chilling statistics make one thing clear: Our fight for justice is nowhere near complete. **That’s why I’m throwing myself headfirst into the fight – and I’m counting on you to join me, Peter.

[Please, before February ends, will you help me get 1,000 new Team James Members and help power our important, progressive work? I can’t win these fights without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59428375/394181932/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk984-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDY4NTAwMS1jNGI3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwovXg9rAi1WmgupgCCNWH7uO3_x6m9X1TrHXt7C1cg=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59428376/394181933/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk984-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDY4NTAwMS1jNGI3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwovXg9rAi1WmgupgCCNWH7uO3_x6m9X1TrHXt7C1cg=)
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59428377/394181934/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk984-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDY4NTAwMS1jNGI3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwovXg9rAi1WmgupgCCNWH7uO3_x6m9X1TrHXt7C1cg=)
---
When I became the first Black lawmaker ever to be elected to New York’s attorney general office, I knew that our historic accomplishment would mean _nothing_ if I didn’t use my position to fight for the populations who had been trampled on and ignored for generations.

And I’m proud to say that, in my first term, we were able to win real change for the people of New York. But, with Republicans continuing to attack the rights of the most vulnerable, this work is nowhere near complete.

**Peter, the time to act is now. Together, we can move the needle for progress forward – I’ve seen us do it before. So I’m humbly asking:**[**Will you make a donation before the month ends to activate your February Team James Membership? We can’t afford to let our momentum falter for even a moment.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59428378/394181935/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk984-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDY4NTAwMS1jNGI3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwovXg9rAi1WmgupgCCNWH7uO3_x6m9X1TrHXt7C1cg=)

subject: Are you still around this evening, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| Glad I caught you tonight, Peter. I’m reaching out one last time before February comes to a close to let you know that we’re still just short of our monthly fundraising goal. As it stands, we still have about $7,000 left to raise in order to meet our mark. I know my team and I have been in touch quite a bit lately. _Sorry about that._ But I wouldn’t be doing right by this team or our supporters if I didn’t send one last email to try and close this gap. Will you chip in a quick contribution to help us meet our February goal? Your donation could be the one that puts us over the top. name: Chuck Schumer
subject: You really stand out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | It's Sen. Schumer.

I'm between meetings, so I'll make this quick: Your name is on our list of inactive Democratic memberships for February, and I need to make sure you activate your membership by tonight’s public, end-of-month fundraising deadline.

name: Kelly Hall (personal)
subject: Our last line of defense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
Friend — I wanted to reach out before tonight’s End-of-Month deadline to tell you just how critical it is that we hit our $10,000 Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign goal before midnight.

When the Supreme Court's decision overturning Roe v. Wade came out last year, millions of us across the country — myself included — felt hopeless. But ballot measures gave us back that hope.

In Michigan, Vermont, California, Kentucky, and Montana, voters fought back. They restored their right to reproductive health care and codified abortion in their state for good.

Now, extremists are scared, and they are coming after ballot measures because they are the vehicle we’ve used to protect abortion. Now, attacks are coming in Ohio, Missouri, Wisconsin, and many other states this year where abortion measures could eventually be run to protect our rights.

Our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign is quite literally our last line of defense against these attacks. What we do here and now matters. So please, before tonight’s midnight deadline — will you rush a donation of whatever you can afford to our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign Emergency Fund as we fight to protect our rights?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/TFPUS-ALL-Email-Feb2023-FR-February23EOM?refcode=E20426-20230228-EOM3-SL-DeadlineEOM-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/TFPUS-ALL-Email-Feb2023-FR-February23EOM?refcode=E20426-20230228-EOM3-SL-DeadlineEOM-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=25]

Thanks for your continued support, team.

— Kelly Hall

Peter, I’m proud to have represented California’s Inland Empire for a decade now.

It’s been the honor of my life to serve the community I was born and raised in, and now, fight for their progressive priorities.

**The road to Congress was long and hard. When I first ran in 1992, I lost by less than a percentage point – a few hundred votes. I ran again in 1994, but my Republican opponent publicly outed me as gay.**

But Peter, this hate didn’t stop me from pushing forward. I ran again for Congress in 2012 – and succeeded – becoming the first openly gay Member of the House.

**Today, we’re facing another battle with the MAGA Republican House majority.** But together we can protect our Democratic victories of the last two years and set a path to take back the House in 2024.

[**All that to say, Peter, will you chip in $7 toward our $5,000 February goal to keep our movement pushing forward? I hope you’ll join my team today »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59429239/394195428/299171790?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230228_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTNlODgzMi1jOGI3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nvvfoV7blYMqwFjmSaqm1PgNn-UA-2DqaVjA0Wcu-pU=)

name: Malcolm
subject: Joanna McClinton - PA's first female Speaker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm for PA PAC
body:
Today I had the honor to nominate my colleague Joanna McClinton to be the first female Speaker of the House in Pennsylvania's history.
As you may have heard, it wasn't easy to get to this point. _We did after all win a majority in the house not once but twice since November!_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59429404/394198376/-803653937?v=HUxwOQevZTw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTllOTc1Mi1jOWI3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xY7870pRY2vaA_9g7eB6GwxMYebEcWgjLPxxnwsuWBE=&emci=3024a87e-c5b7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ca9e9752-c9b7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18034979)
Im incredibly honored to stand with our Speaker. We arrived here with hardwork done by Democrats all across the Commonwealth and I couldn't be more proud. We are as energized as ever to get to work in Harrisburg to provide working famalies with what they need to thrive.
Thank you for standing with us throughout this fight to get where we are today.
Best,
MK
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59429405/394198377/-2068799491?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTllOTc1Mi1jOWI3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xY7870pRY2vaA_9g7eB6GwxMYebEcWgjLPxxnwsuWBE=)

Philadelphia, PA 19130

name: Team Lucas
subject: Before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’re less than 100 donations away from hitting Lucas’ February fundraising goal.
#
Hey Peter,
**We’re less than 100 donations away from hitting Lucas’ February fundraising goal.** So now, we’re counting on top supporters like you to help us close the gap.

I would not reach out if it weren't so important.
Hi Peter,
I wanted to reach out one more time and remind you that our first end-of-month deadline is tonight at midnight and I need your help to reach this critical milestone.
If you understand the significance of our first deadline and that's all you need to hear, please use this link to donate:
[https://secure.winred.com/unleash-america-pac/first-end-of-month-deadline](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=1a5243b42d59446d813e7705a66cc722&_e=gYkKubBdzUpx0PGZs3HNZMqpVC-7Dq85QmI6jdEbAYwhzJszEZWeonu9kn0Pfpq1oqRCUkTA88cBSOlsD9mhZrnjXK9_UZyT85Omn_jN2wn5a5Bfznd-6yhLZENHgfTtucTgPKbVDwYKsDLF7i-N6sW0dGdgqEcI_S_t_12gHk3DJnYEMWhnJ__nvbK37NRv38uh7w7wOEDQpzEK3ym4VWBglEHlg7IeLQttTnxMitePZM3n5EJliPV5wO13NPFOESNveCJuyyiNGYF0llzSBXPiiWpAJ8z7wvPZrrqWsuRdsZt48GysrfZPYHAIyGiyR5_3lWZkWbOfn5r0RMYKuZ12_77xZt_plwO0WTX0sdU%3D)
If not, let me explain why your support is so important right now:
Unleash America PAC launched this month with the hope of helping elect TRUE leaders who will always champion American values and fight for the American dream. And over the past month, we have been building the infrastructure to do just that.
But at the end of our very first month we need to show the press, the pundits, and this team just how impactful we can be in races around the nation. And in order to do so, we need to meet our fundraising goals.
You first joined this team as a supporter of my congressional campaign last year and have stood by me since the very beginning. Thank you.
When we launched, I knew I could count on Americans like you - people who understand that protecting the values upon which America was founded is crucial. Having you on our team will make it possible to accomplish what we've set out to do together.
I am asking you directly: Can you please make a contribution to our first end-of-month deadline? I would not ask if it weren't so important.
[https://secure.winred.com/unleash-america-pac/first-end-of-month-deadline](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=1a5243b42d59446d813e7705a66cc722&_e=gYkKubBdzUpx0PGZs3HNZMqpVC-7Dq85QmI6jdEbAYwhzJszEZWeonu9kn0Pfpq1oqRCUkTA88cBSOlsD9mhZrnjXK9_UZyT85Omn_jN2wn5a5Bfznd-6yhLZENHgfTtucTgPKbVDwYKsDLF7i-N6sW0dGdgqEcI_S_t_12gHk3DJnYEMWhnJ__nvbK37NRv38uh7w7wOEDQpzEK3ym4Va-aQxgpAwPzR2HGUStXKFJ8-v-n8T3Is07mRhk6MpmrDyax5H6LFwAObKmIFIs_LTQyBw6xrhdflDAbdzuEnCoDWSIlRQEZNShkZLHfy4c8cQBSH3a0vq0yV9kZnIeVEWSRc-p82W_1sw1WfWQJF1A%3D)
Your support today will be critical to our success in the coming year, so I thank you in advance for standing with me today.
In Liberty,
Hung Cao

subject: Sharing an important race update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I wanted to share a big race update with you. Peter,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal before the midnight deadline. But first, I wanted to share a big race update with you.

Republicans are wasting no time trying to flip our district in 2024. In fact, my first Republican challenger just announced her candidacy last week. Washington State and national Republicans are once again making flipping the 8th a top priority. It's only a matter of time before other Republicans enter the race, and the attacks against me begin. In a district as competitive as ours, we can't waste any time preparing for the tough fight ahead.

That's why my team and I set an ambitious online fundraising goal to ensure we have the resources to take on my new opponent and fight back against anything that comes our way. But we only have a few hours left to reach it, and I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to get us over the finish line.

**Will you chip in before midnight to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal? With your support, we can defend this seat and retake the House majority in 2024 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-february23](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59429960/394208287/1225393486?refcode=em23_230228_eom3_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230228_eom3_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjY1NGM1Zi1jY2I3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cv7-R5ypAoU1xdM9cYb-gds02u4KEpoIYJl879axQjQ=)**

Kim

Folks, we’ve seen what the GOP House Majority prioritizes during its first two months in power:

❌ **They’re attacking President Biden and House Democrats at every turn.** They’ve already begun calling for Biden’s impeachment!

❌ **They’ve passed an extreme anti-choice bill that would imprison doctors.** And they’ve promised more dangerous legislation to come!

❌ They’re picking apart every Democratic legislative priority we have, **_and they plan to dismantle the historic accomplishments of the past 2 years!_**

**We know the fight for the House Majority in 2024 seems too far off in the future to worry about, but our hard work must start now. **

[**That’s why we’re racing to collect the grassroots power necessary to flip the House and return sanity back to Congress. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Folks, with just 4 hours left before our critical end-of-month deadline, we’re don’t have time to waste: ** | Folks, we’ve seen what the GOP House Majority prioritizes during its first two months in power: ❌ They’re attacking President Biden and House Democrats at every turn. They’ve already begun calling for Biden’s impeachment! ❌ They’ve passed an extreme anti-choice bill that would imprison doctors. And they’ve promised more dangerous legislation to come! ❌ They’re picking apart every Democratic legislative priority we have, and they plan to dismantle the historic accomplishments of the past 2 years! We know the fight for the House Majority in 2024 seems too far off in the future to worry about, but our hard work must start now. | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. Peter,

As we close out Black History Month, I wanted to take a moment & acknowledge what we have accomplished. This month, we elected the first Black woman from Virginia to Congress with Jenn McClellan’s victory. We began the work to put a Black woman in the Senate, with the launch of Barbara Lee’s campaign in California.

While I am beyond proud of what we have already accomplished this year, I want to make one thing clear: **The fight to fix the challenge of under-representation of the Black community in elected seats of power throughout our nation is far from over.**

[That’s why we are reaching out one last time before our fundraising deadline tonight at midnight. We have just $6,849 left to raise to have the resources necessary to invest in Black candidates across the country. Chip in now to help us meet our goal: ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJlhvNiqQ372mJELSbBmz1l6YRa1LomLk0PezW5VsRhSasPkbQMij0ITWFUIA6jji8tSbhytlykH0OKq5GCsWKbAR7BsLJLOH9xoCZn0480d35SBDQIFNvTxPfZ4Kc7OY9EWeD8en7peu8CvjU8uYFZsegfj-PaLnXpf0dCP7iD9Z460ITDMuOyM5NNqNFnZnaJvMY3jr9rB0IcL3HMJx1p9y36-XVEE-OEkUyPt2bIswv7sUJGUlPlVsgs_oAFNMcPC0L3x2xTshkqft4t3M_028K08VboP3kUQV9LcL3lez7lXWM_4JXvcoo_a3OE69p7UUCyrRd1cBCNYaR2eNzXbw8Q4uXwUpGTymm-sv1UfRAILsj0TC22K4oR30hWVuSMAbQV7KopIKLwILdaEVpp3xoUxhKnjeOV9D6UHamq20/3u4/xpbx3X_gTya7QrPhB4Cmfg/h2/KFNl4EiAFZ9CDgmUkorKGKQ7FYhNyblHSAHrhZ0d86g) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, As we close out Black History Month, I wanted to take a moment & acknowledge what we have accomplished. This month, we elected the first Black woman from Virginia to Congress with Jenn McClellan’s victory. We began the work to put a Black woman in the Senate, with the launch of Barbara Lee’s campaign in California. While I am beyond proud of what we have already accomplished this year, I want to make one thing clear: The fight to fix the challenge of under-representation of the Black community in elected seats of power throughout our nation is far from over. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | The stakes are incredibly high — Black candidates are needed to lead this country forward. If we want progress on the issues most important to our communities, we must elect more Black leaders. It’s simple: we can invest in races now and help candidates like Barbara Lee and Jenn McClellan win or we can just stick with the status quo and fail to fix the severe underrepresentation of Black communities. I am ALL-IN on doing this work, Peter — but I cannot do it alone. We ALL need to work together to elect Black Democrats up and down the ballot this cycle. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you so much for all of your support, Quentin James The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. **FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
Every first and third Monday of each month, the Montgomery County Tea Party meets at Citizen Grill. And on Monday, March 6, at 6:30 pm, Walter West join us on the Operation Lone Star border update.

How is the Texas border wall shaping up? What is happening within the State House to relieve issues of the illegals, fentanyl, and cartels?

Walter will answer these questions and more.

Join us and bring some friends.

We will meet on the Citizens Grill patio at 315 Enclave Drive, Conroe, TX.

Food and beverage will be available for purchase.

**Please RSVP below so that I can reserve a table**.

Try and arrive early to place your order before the meeting starts at 6:30 pm.

Seating will be limited.

As always, meetings are free and open to the public.

Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

subject: I could really use your support.

body:
Extremist Republicans are prepared to do whatever they can to try and unseat Sherrod Brown and take back control of the Senate.
| Team,

I know you're getting a lot of fundraising emails right now. And I appreciate you taking the time to read this one.

We are just $1,870 short of our $10,000 end-of-month fundraising goal. Here's why we need your support now, more than ever:

We already know that multimillionaire Matt Dolan is running against Sherrod Brown. But now, Republican Secretary of State Frank LaRose has made it clear he's seriously considering throwing his hat into the ring, too.

As Ohio Democrats, we're fighting back to protect the rights of Ohioans and the future of our state by rejecting dangerous politicians like Matt Dolan and Frank LaRose. But we can't prepare for the work ahead without your support.

I am asking one last time before midnight's deadline: Will you chip in $5 or more to help Ohio Democrats reach our end-of-month fundraising goal? →**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/odp-february-23](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59431203/394217491/-1614137971?refcode=em23_230228_eom5_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230228_eom5_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzAwNzQ5Mi1kMGI3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O5lsgCrHAPp7Xv2BZf6niUDbA7mN-E-cBKgO1nbhIkM=)**

name: Tim Kaine (via UniteDemocrats)
subject: I feel lucky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Peter, you may know that I’m celebrating my 65th birthday, and I wanted to take a moment to thank you all for the thoughtful birthday wishes that you’ve sent my way. It’s certainly a milestone, and one I feel lucky to be marking.

Another milestone I’m marking this year is the kickoff of my re-election campaign to the Senate, just over 10 years after being sworn in for the first time in January of 2013. I feel deeply honored to serve the people of Virginia — I love the Commonwealth, and I love its citizens. Nothing would make me happier than the opportunity to keep delivering results for families across VA and the USA.

**So I have a personal request for you today: **[If you’re able, will you split a donation between UniteDemocrats and my re-election campaign? Your support will help us build the strongest possible foundation to keep Virginia blue amid a strong GOP push to regain power. »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59431229/394217579/928539486?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230228_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM1MDA3NDkyLWQwYjctZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UH_VrcQx7-LoS6hQBnneqiH-mfiAJ6QyMSLm6quCo1M=)

clean_body: | Peter, you may know that I’m celebrating my 65th birthday, and I wanted to take a moment to thank you all for the thoughtful birthday wishes that you’ve sent my way. It’s certainly a milestone, and one I feel lucky to be marking. Another milestone I’m marking this year is the kickoff of my re-election campaign to the Senate, just over 10 years after being sworn in for the first time in January of 2013. I feel deeply honored to serve the people of Virginia — I love the Commonwealth, and I love its citizens. Nothing would make me happier than the opportunity to keep delivering results for families across VA and the USA. So I have a personal request for you today: = You can donate at this link: = Thank you very much. Hey Peter, I just checked the numbers, and we’re still a bit behind our end-of-month goal. That’s why I’m shooting off a quick note to ask (for the last time — I promise!) if you’d be willing to [_**chip in any amount before our deadline tonight at midnight.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59431576/394219312/-1909562274?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230228_PM2_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWNmOGNjZmUtZDRiNy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_fYiOW3elkIZD_EoqFf9Q-I-kbzPHyXGDGFmw8pOFM4=) The good news is, we’re *so close* — and your donation could be the one that puts us over the top! So I have a personal link for you to chip in and support amazing women and young people running in close races all over the country. You can use it right here: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-feb2023?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59431577/394219313/-1909562274?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230228_PM2_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWNmOGNjZmUtZDRiNy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_fYiOW3elkIZD_EoqFf9Q-I-kbzPHyXGDGFmw8pOFM4=) Every dollar helps, I really mean that. Thanks in advance for your support! — Katie _Sent from my iPhone_

Berkeley, CA 94704

name: BREAKING (via DLCC.org)
subject: 👀The results are in…
body:
BREAKING: Democrats just won THREE special elections in Connecticut – defending three critical seats in the House! | | |
---

name: Jessica via Democrats.org
subject: We’re still counting on 6 more folks from Manassas to chip in before tonight’s deadline. Will you be one of them, Derek?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I'll keep it brief: We’re at risk of falling short of our February fundraising goal. I know I can rely on you, but there isn't much time left to close the gap before the midnight deadline. | |
---
I’m sorry to reach out to you so late, Derek. So, I’ll try to keep this quick: **The Democratic National Committee is at risk of falling short of our February fundraising goal and we only have a few hours left before the midnight deadline to close the gap.** The DNC has to report what we raise to the Federal Election Commission on a monthly basis. That means the amount we raise before midnight tonight will be public. _(And you better bet that Republicans will be paying close attention to that number and what it means about the strength of our party.)_ [ We’re still counting on 6 more folks from Manassas to chip in before midnight to help hit the DNC’s February goal. Your donation could be the one that puts our party over the top. Could you chip in $7 before the midnight deadline? ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJyiQ9xlRKidRCjgQ5y1hMhXVOhh2z9ALQg4zpXIJKjTCx7URQ06l6Vbl8pJI4GoAx2JDDX_ngJcM785Y3XaF6HpSBHWO4AglhBJd3JAFF-b5sU8fI6toqgaVONW5odFR5pLWkDHd8q5NShMuRniIT2tbwHxKRl0mk45j3IPjTHl4ojcmWjEmxwvkkW0-JqyEXKr3B0xBSIC37QPrw-XW7tVrfQR6kIVDOoMlOBoJQtY56gJTE3KbNnZBrbRIIl9mfy9t-iLbJPC2Ve9xAf50dL2hMcCUsb3E2zJhxqTKsjRMk--A1i8qsqiwcoAcaEDZeemUBj3ciGOfhWbnP8qF-HAkuNAAJodXiLx5Riek6wt3k3KUHjgEQuPC8Aj8zVB2S-rFKpwTbVlLuhb43OuUBSE1Pec_B0xXnbJb5WFGzXyukmE42HqVQblgiUQAp-d3oZeI7CNlDeHRrBSWXIWFwJ3H_Pa1Yo921VYPmKXDupTteX6JBkAKpmnyhuYwJJDqDN-e8hW9HKrtSjVtWCC2nBCTD2AsVN2O0Bp4NpxpGrjMZInxM1KN_sT-BvYbOsCwR7EdcOk_MJ96PCXvd7-NOaUnjzekSvV_jDtaBIOrjWQmcU2uUQVz-ofqzv_2MEqwofIAcjwElB5t11sqqG-vdn-qkYrj0Q6fUBeEnKNph4tQWE0RAhPU30dZaE8FpSAx0GB4oAAMRwXSiJEt9WtO95CExbxGx4AGcIwARe5tEx5gi6Jfr8h9HUehVcmqHd09vRODEglr4KCrALBkZXtyZrXMPasWWmuMVZfVmO2odgcEhp8JEiffhu8D4jzEKQFhhrFFcOBOZ7bM-1hgjuTlGL7dO-CZ86ncRP2d_4_75rGJGXWfXe2pWa7FVGiQj30UZaieCTxQi_khoKVgJFdlExe987rZ-6qEWFdvARBzayLg/3u4/Mta1mL8hS3yuWpE8IujySQ/h0/ewJrjnDHAg0H6RqEBOO_IGLagsgUlaRxMBnRj_y4vEY) I wouldn’t be reaching out now if this weren’t so important. clean_body: I'll keep it brief: We’re at risk of falling short of our February fundraising goal. I know I can rely on you, but there isn't much time left to close the gap before the midnight deadline. | | I’m sorry to reach out to you so late, Derek. So, I’ll try to keep this quick: The Democratic National Committee is at risk of falling short of our February fundraising goal and we only have a few hours left before the midnight deadline to close the gap. The DNC has to report what we raise to the Federal Election Commission on a monthly basis. That means the amount we raise before midnight tonight will be public. (And you better bet that Republicans will be paying close attention to that number and what it means about the strength of our party.) I wouldn’t be reaching out now if this weren’t so important. I know I can rely on you, but there isn’t much time left before midnight. Thanks for being with the Democratic Party every step of the way -- it means so much. Jess Jessica Porter Online Fundraising Director Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. name: Caroline Colarusso
subject: MASSOP Chair Appoints Colarusso to Election Integrity Role
body:
Join Your Local Committee
| | | |
---
| |
---
GOP Chairwoman Amy Carnevale Appoints Caroline Colarusso as Election Integrity Liaison
---
---
|
---
| "My goal is to work with grassroots conservatives to bring much needed accountability to elections here in Massachusetts." Caroline Colarusso
---
| | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fjSfIKR2tDZO0eoqu6cdGeZ1T3domX4tFCHw5yeOv9uJ5XjVGwSNzYExLsdjFuFaJVwBOQlZ-Voj4-z4kREQUBZGpDhhCAdlgm-XqMEQ4U2pprKQdkiNFW9ieVN4T0lkyu7mXqPrS_uh6lIcSNMA7g==&c=IubdGxEEW_Ansq_-Y5-0kXSI0fS9-BQ569MRF7eHA_-JHBf9j8C-xQ==&ch=12ywVl55f0Rpvq-xvZVNPalLEPNdhqEh_DfbR9MlfsP2bAvf5kE0HA==)
---
30,000 Voters Moved Out of the 5th Congressional District, Yet These Voters Remain on the Voter Rolls and Were Mailed Ballot Applications
---
| |
---
Friend,
Please consider joining your local Republican Town or City Committee as we will be taking steps to address several aspects of mail in voting in Massachusetts. It is our hope to share knowledge, information and strategies with local town and city committees as we bring much needed, long overdue accountability to the process of mail in voting in Massachusetts.
We are building a team of committed, grassroots, volunteers - stay tuned to see what will be coming next.
Special thanks to MASSGOP Chair Amy Carnevale for delivering on her campaign promise to address election integrity here in Massachusetts. We should all be grateful that Amy is fully committed to bringing accountability to our election process. Please reach out and get involved by emailing [ElectionIntegrity@MASSGOP.com](mailto:ElectionIntegrity@Massgop.com)

Thank You, Caroline Colarusso
---
|
---
| | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, MA 02180
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The Leftwing Is Closing Down Conservative Media: Newsmax, OAN, More
body:
Newsmax was censored in more than 13 million DirecTV homes. Please read this message from our sponsor Newsmax. | | **Dear Reader:** The left-wing is trying to shutdown Newsmax! Just weeks ago AT&T's DirecTV removed Newsmax from its systems.

Newsmax was censored in more than 13 million DirecTV homes. **Scary this is happening in America today . . .** Now RNC Chairwoman **Ronna McDaniel** is speaking out.**** She sent an urgent email to Republican members this week telling them **to oppose AT &T DirecTV's censorship of Newsmax.** Ronna warns if we do not fight against this the left will not stop. Ronna writes: "DirecTV . . . is yet another example of **powerful corporations silencing conservative viewpoints . . .** It's anti-free-speech and anti-American." **President Trump agrees.** He says AT&T DirecTV's censorship and deplatforming of both OAN and Newsmax is simply "disgusting." And Dr. Ben Carson warns that if we don't fight back against AT&T and DirecTV **we may lose our freedoms.** _We must fight back._ **We need you to do two things today:**

1. **DirecTV customers****:** Call toll free at** 877-763-9762** to complain, demand you want Newsmax back now!
2. **Go to our online petition,** let AT&T and DirecTV know you oppose woke companies and leftist censorship, **Join Here:** **[iWantNewsmax.com](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9cd0ok0rhtktf8a93i27pkb5c3g6fa15o62gi98_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdhm1ob6c1h2bs).**

Then let your friends and family know by sharing this email and posting our Petition to your social media. America and our freedoms are too important to lose! Yours, **_Newsmax_**

---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What does it mean to be an American in 2023?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If you’re going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgssamck4vre9qd123gbjp1va4qsqbhnkkog00g8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdhm1ob2c5h2bs)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhhi6kd92pdnd6o4n9jlt1jfssm3mc7gipkp23p8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdhm1ob2c5h2bs)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2a6ticktcamohfmcr1m56vv5k72spiki449q2ro_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdhm1ob2c5h2bs)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America – in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley – that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4go051cn5ce4i0gjk37qcl68ald5q5ndhl2esk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdhm1ob2c5h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2931p7ktvtqbquvko0hndua4p1gq79ddr0479uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdhm1ob2c5h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuv47069edjf0k6j63gluuq8iafat2tmjsh1r3d0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdhm1ob2c5h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znph1fkktoucs3bt1bdmo5lfitk0bjg3ujbes6s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdhm1ob2c5h2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbuhi84o8lujnpv7odre45rqdprag1ojso88kdug_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdhm1ob2c5h2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj0lfvm4uqonmc9ils6lebgsn9p2oldbje7l0iv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdhm1ob2c5h2bs)
---|---|---

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Is Philip Gunn our only hope to stop Obamacare?
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| **It's not too late to stop the expansion of Obamacare in Mississippi.**[**Contact Speaker Gunn NOW!**](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/A6lwW6zCmm8DYo-bg2DcZw) Over the weekend, Mississippi Governor Tate Reeves posted via social media that he now supports partial Medicaid expansion. Tate ran for Governor in 2019, campaigning against Medicaid expansion, and for good reason, but it now seems like he’s flipped on that stance.Based on an article by the [Mississippi Center for Public Policy](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/oeoQoI14d7Y44yCOEgL3Rg), Medicaid patients are 97 percent more likely to die than patients with private insurance and 13 percent more likely to die than patients with NO health insurance at all.But you’ve heard that Medicaid expansion will save our rural hospitals, right? Well, the same article by MCPP quotes the health economist Chris Conover indicating that "Every new Medicaid-related job actually costs the economy at least 3 to 4 jobs elsewhere." Not only does it cost the economy as a whole, but Medicaid also only covers, on average, 80% of what private insurance pays. Therefore, hospitals must increase the costs on private patients, to cover the costs of Medicaid patient’s care.[Email Speaker Gunn, ask him to stand up for conservative Mississippi](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/A6lwW6zCmm8DYo-bg2DcZw)And if a hospital doesn’t have enough private insurance patients to keep the doors open to begin with, they certainly won’t have enough private insurance patients to cover even greater losses from an increase in Medicaid patients. Further, the state will be on the hook for 10% of the increased cost, meaning our dream of being an income tax-free state is never likely going to happen with an expansion in Medicaid.
Still, despite all the data and evidence to show that Medicaid expansion is a bad deal for Mississippians, as it has been for every other state that’s passed it, that hasn’t stopped Delbert Hosemann from passing a Medicaid expansion bill out of the Senate every year since he’s been Lt. Governor and now Tate Reeves is bailing on his own campaign promises by supporting a partial expansion.
Tate said in his post that “We may even have to be willing to do things that make us ‘philosophically uncomfortable.’”
His move shouldn’t just make you “philosophically uncomfortable”, but outright furious if you are a Republican that actually believes in our party platform. Our own MS GOP platform says, regarding healthcare, that Mississippi Republicans believe:
>
> “the expansion of some government health care programs is unaffordable to current and future taxpayers... We believe our health care system can be improved by moving away from the current bureaucracy-driven, heavily regulated third-party payment system to a new patient-centered system of consumer choice. We can have an affordable, accessible and quality health care system by empowering individuals and families, promoting free-market competition and embracing the benefits of technology, innovation and a fair legal climate. Increased freedom within our health care system must be accompanied by individual responsibility.”

Nothing about Medicaid expansion fits into our party’s platform of stopping the expansion of government healthcare programs, supporting free-markets, and having greater individual responsibility, but it seems that even the leader of our state party, Tate Reeves, has cast our party platform to the side for politically motivated reasons during an election year, not letting something like principles get in the way.
It is also interesting to note that a poll from a few years ago indicates that [70 percent of Mississippi Republicans would](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/a51B_23pH8FIK2XsHnp1-A) be less likely to support a candidate who voted for Medicaid expansion. So, it begs the question: If Tate’s not supporting Medicaid expansion to appeal to Republicans, who is he trying to appeal to this election year?[Email Speaker Gunn, ask him to stand up for conservative Mississippi](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/A6lwW6zCmm8DYo-bg2DcZw) |
---
We need your help.
Tell Speaker Gunn to stand against any attempt to expand Obamacare in Mississippi.
You may also call **601-345-1211** and leave a message for Speaker Gunn.
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/Eb0JsOBLPVuiX8KRD0vD1A) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What does it mean to be an American in 2023?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If you’re going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding.

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbg9t4eipvsk6i37vn7nfgrff3eu9atld773fmp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdjmco72c9h2bs)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zljdtvju1dmg8vagstrv1b8km33j0v5li8kkk01o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdjmco72c9h2bs)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhsbq4cufkd622t8m2d65oaugtqpgbn3fl205noo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdjmco72c9h2bs)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America - in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley - that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3bdbfp08q1ijvrr8aoeh9ttjj8ds5ll3ip6oj0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdjmco72c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW →**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcamdt4f6nqsjehc7l2dt0ca5dn8ji4uurqnogno_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdjmco72c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqekq8kcrktgmvbs79cdnunuk2oghafh0dmhd2d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdjmco72c9h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z37v065aud16ojk8kn2td7clavhgi017dlcd5jvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdjmco72c9h2bs) | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zknl5qvl36hg2l2in0b2i2d3ih56076cabh4b4mo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdjmco72c9h2bs) | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu40lkqn6q0pj21v9ig49khe75c1mv739hisgbp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdjmco72c9h2bs)

clean_body: If you’re going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding. | Fellow American, I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit. I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding. If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning. The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery. Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - IN PUBLIC. Right now, we're failing that test. That's why I am running for President of the United States. Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation. This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we: Believe in merit. Believe in accountability. Believe in free speech. Believe in American exceptionalism. Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America - in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley - that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united. E pluribus unum - from many, one. These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them. Join me, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Some of our best Senators are up for re-election and vulnerable in 2024 … including Ohio’s Sen. Sherrod Brown. Help us keep this vital seat?
body:
Humbly asking
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8288ef6-df65-4ccf-a4e2-08a747741661/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Sherrod Brown is for real. _Look, I know we've said this a few times already, but we happen to have some of our best Senators up and vulnerable this ****time—Jon Tester, Tammy Baldwin and, yes, Sherrod Brown—we elected a lot of great Democrats in 2018 and now we’re going to have to defend those seats****.** _There are very few Senators who display the courage Sen. Brown does on a daily basis. He steps forward with his raspy voice, tousled hair and jeans tuxedo--as we like to joke--and he's every bit a guy on a factory floor that Jon Tester is on a farm._ [**_I humbly ask you to join the Blue Amp Action in supporting this incredibly courageous Senator w/ $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can. We are lucky to have him, and we _really don't want to find out what it's like not to_._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T894bfda2-f82d-4d86-a253-65ad89b67bce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Brown is a leader. It would be easy to play the role of a moderate in a state that has trended from purple to purplish-red, but he's refused to do so. It's hard to explain just how important it is to have one of the most liberal Senators in the whole body come from a purplish-red state. _**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a17aae8-9fb4-431f-8d8f-16941e18a74b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| __Character. Courage. Compassion. Sherrod was early to East Palestine, where a majority didn't vote for him, because that's him. He called out Northfolk Southern, Trump deregulation, DeWine's lack of state of emergency and, most importantly, ensured cameras shared with the American people what East Palestine needed.__ **_Yet, at the same time, he loudly supports the effort for an Ohio Amendment to ensure abortion access, speaks out to protect the LGBTQ and Black communities as books are banned and bigotry spouted._** _Sherrod, as we like to call him here in Ohio, isn't just there when it's convenient. In fact, he's there more often when it's not. I can't adequately communicate the loss it'd be to the Senate, our party & America to lose him from the Senate._ [**_I humbly ask you to join the Blue Amp Action in supporting this incredibly courageous Senator w/ $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can. We are lucky to have him, and we _really don't want to find out what it's like not to_._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f5acd66-d48e-49d7-bd03-2f3019c15e24/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you so much,** Cliff
---

|

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te59a9e70-e7aa-4366-a06d-5332c535efd2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: Humbly asking | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, Sherrod Brown is for real. Look, I know we've said this a few times already, but we happen to have some of our best Senators up and vulnerable this time—Jon Tester, Tammy Baldwin and, yes, Sherrod Brown—we elected a lot of great Democrats in 2018 and now we’re going to have to defend those seats. There are very few Senators who display the courage Sen. Brown does on a daily basis. He steps forward with his raspy voice, tousled hair and jeans tuxedo--as we like to joke--and he's every bit a guy on a factory floor that Jon Tester is on a farm. Brown is a leader. It would be easy to play the role of a moderate in a state that has trended from purple to purplish-red, but he's refused to do so. It's hard to explain just how important it is to have one of the most liberal Senators in the whole body come from a purplish-red state. | | | | | | | | Character. Courage. Compassion. Sherrod was early to East Palestine, where a majority didn't vote for him, because that's him. He called out Northfolk Southern, Trump deregulation, DeWine's lack of state of emergency and, most importantly, ensured cameras shared with the American people what East Palestine needed. Yet, at the same time, he loudly supports the effort for an Ohio Amendment to ensure abortion access, speaks out to protect the LGBTQ and Black communities as books are banned and bigotry spouted. Sherrod, as we like to call him here in Ohio, isn't just there when it's convenient. In fact, he's there more often when it's not. I can't adequately communicate the loss it'd be to the Senate, our party & America to lose him from the Senate. Thank you so much, Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Bill Spadea
subject: You can prevent fatalities
body:
Peter, Imagine for a moment, that you're crossing the street on a Saturday night while on your way out of a show with a group
|
---
| Peter, Imagine for a moment, that you're crossing the street on a Saturday night while on your way out of a show with a group of friends. All of a sudden, a speeding car comes out of nowhere and strikes you... **And you never recover.** This is exactly what happened to 18 year-old Lindsay Weakland, a recent high school graduate whose young life was tragically taken from her last September by a reckless driver who was attending the H2oi pop-up car rally. Imagine the pain you'd feel if something like this happened to your loved one or daughter. Pop-up car rallies, also known as "flash car rallies" are running rampant in the state of New Jersey (and beyond). **These dangerous gatherings pose a major threat to the safety of our citizens and they need to be stopped.** Proposed Bill A4980 creates a “Special Event Zone” based on what has worked in Ocean City, Maryland and gives the local and state police more authority to stop these dangerous rallies before they get started.
---
|
---
|
---
# _[All you need to do to support this bill and help make our streets safer is to CLICK HERE](https://xtz223.keap-link006.com/v2/click/6a619da9b8e53ec14d28e0626cd80ff0/eJyNj00LgkAQQP_LnEVrNaK9hYQsmoeocyw60JLuLtuYWfjf2z7oVNB15s0b3g0ItdQkauBwoStjMQTgsFJWoabUaJLVc8tmyTSeBtAofcyc6Szw29fjD_AYJ_NFADRY9MR2s0xzUWb7QpS5B610_sV_mmT-0azWS1HAOP70YqtodfbqE3ByHT56auWbaOcazx-ILI-ivu9Dkkf0fcpoNmFxWJnW30trUdfv9ByHl2W8Awb1YTM=)_ (aside from 2 mins of your time, it'll cost you NOTHING).

---
|
---
| Pop-up car rallies need to be stopped. Period. At these events, reckless driving is par for the course. Participants often engage in speeding, racing, and performing dangerous stunts on public roads, posing a threat to their own safety as well as that of bystanders. Such irresponsible behavior has the potential to lead to accidents and cause harm to innocent individuals caught in the crossfire.
---

All it takes is just a few minutes and no money out of your pocket to help make the streets of New Jersey safer for all. Talk soon, Bill

Please read this, friend: **We fell $2,338 short of last night's critical end-of-month fundraising goal, so I'm urgently asking for your help to make up this shortfall by midnight tonight. Here's why this is so important:**
* Democrats are clinging to a razor-thin Senate majority, and experts at The Washington Post say that the GOP has a "clear path" to delivering control back to Mitch McConnell.

* After Republicans flipped enough congressional seats in New York last year to retake the House majority, they’re targeting me as a vulnerable seat in their efforts to flip the Senate next.

* And while Mitch McConnell and his special-interest allies gear up to spend _hundreds of millions of dollars_ to retake power, I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs.

**That's why this is a goal we cannot afford to miss. name: Shift WA
subject: A missed goal
body:
We're not sitting back and watching as Democrats ram through their far-Left policies and ignore commonsense bills. We're fighting back by exposing what's really going on in Olympia. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61550799:s-gDa-DwN:m:1:2610672541:72152747F4A4C0D5B8F95B32836DB4B1:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

Here's the scoop - we missed our fundraising goal for February, but it's not too late to help us make up ground.

[**We are just $410 away from raising the money we budgeted to continue holding Democrats in Olympia accountable during this critical time.**
](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61550800:s-gDa-DwN:m:1:2610672541:72152747F4A4C0D5B8F95B32836DB4B1:r)
The 2023 legislative session is almost halfway through - and, as we expected Democrats are pushing their extreme agenda while ignoring Republicans' commonsense reforms to their failed policies. From repealing the Democrats' failed police pursuit law, to lowering burdensome taxes, to legalizing hard drugs, families across our state deserve to know what's on the table - and what the Democrats are trying to pass or kill.

But you cannot trust our state's mainstream media to provide balance, or even close to fair, coverage.

We're not sitting back and watching as Democrats ram through their far-Left policies and ignore commonsense bills. We're fighting back by exposing what's really going on in Olympia.

**[Will you help us by contributing $30, $40, or $50 today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61550800:s-gDa-DwN:m:1:2610672541:72152747F4A4C0D5B8F95B32836DB4B1:r)**

Your contribution will help us stay on budget in our efforts to hold Democrats in Olympia accountable. **[We hope you'll help us make up the ground we need to continue our work.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61550800:s-gDa-DwN:m:1:2610672541:72152747F4A4C0D5B8F95B32836DB4B1:r)**

Thank you,

The Shift WA Team
| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61550801:s-gDa-DwN:m:1:2610672541:72152747F4A4C0D5B8F95B32836DB4B1:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14148379&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/os-gDa-DwN).

  From: Chairman Kyle Hupfer (iPhone)
<mailto:info@walbergforcongress.com info@indiana.gop>Date: Tuesday,
February 28, 2023 at 12:00 PMTo: Hoosier Republicans Subject: A quick
update before our deadline

Hoosier Republican,

I’ll keep this short
because I know you’re busy.

Republicans from city halls to the halls
of Congress are delivering results for Hoosiers.

We must do
everything we can to reelect them — and that’s why I’m reaching out one
last time before our end-of-month deadline.

I just checked with our
finance team, and they told me that we need to raise just another $286
before midnight.

Can I count on you to make a secure contribution by
using the links below?

name: Candace Owens
subject: Here’s the real disease hurting our communities
body:
There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about — the victimhood mentality.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3nb0ti0hf9ismu5ibh0nd1llo8r6k08t89fro5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdge9ob3c3h2bs)

Friend,

There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim.

**If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.**

The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare.

My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities.

[_**Can you help leave a legacy of freedom and victory instead of oppression and victimhood? Click here to rush your support with $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zflpe8dk5rqdpfgupjj2q46jae6ks286krpr356o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdge9ob3c3h2bs)

I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. _It taught me never to be a victim again_.

My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media.

As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. **Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. **

**Then one night, the KKK showed up. **

My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds.

_But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. _

_**" My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" **_

My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back!

I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me.

I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same.

[_**Will you send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount to END the victimhood mentality?**__**Click here to rush your support >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn29124hv3eh1nl1r043241qitftv099kcnaifb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdge9ob3c3h2bs)

Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities:

We put together **BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory** for parents, grandparents, and teachers.

This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back.

This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation.

**In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities.**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers!

Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality.

Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfotbq0fhh76mc0e090lqc4gil6uca7e5dsi9kfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdge9ob3c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn1ta2uu2r9gndri6oelplbtekmsbmomqn11ef7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdge9ob3c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgj382vl6been937juq71b032mpum0shhi4t8gd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdge9ob3c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmvjsevg8tccjlm630ukis6ib97raa0mlgndsi70_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdge9ob3c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmas122lful54ml9c8l38dnhcuvcrdegbp36qiio_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdge9ob3c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf9ge2ntbnjcl2vsktffq5v7q1thf74a2ch6bteo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdge9ob3c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg8f30vto1d2fpttg8tfmfcfsgggu2objp8dq408_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdge9ob3c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zukbq4jvvqq3eka1gfjv5a7khalpvktku9tupsp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdge9ob3c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsqtmp2u66f2ovqve534rsh6f56doec11vkolsso_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdge9ob3c3h2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zlediqomcq0a0shk2mo7uhmmrd51qtsbopj5t59g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znggjmih57ncf3itn3nnkqkl53fa2sp692p1llb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdge9ob3c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

| | Peter,

The Biden administration is now admitting that COVID-19 likely came from a lab in China. So many have been vindicated because of this. I even admitted early on that I was wrong about the originations of the virus, but will the titans of tyranny, Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Big Government ever admit they got it wrong? [Watch my challenge to them by clicking the thumbnail below:](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=6ac0b64139&e=9828080a05)

The same narratives that got you banned on social media 1-2 years ago is now being vindicated in real time. What will our leaders say? How will they be held accountable? Well, that's up to you.

Continue to ask questions, write to your legislators, and vote at both the ballot box and with your wallets! I will continue to use my platform to challenge these established powers that be. Until we rein in Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Big Government ([The Triad of Tyranny](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=6297c24454&e=9828080a05)) our freedom won't withstand the next "crisis." In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Former Republican Candidate for Governor
Minnesota Family Doctor
