name: Alan Keck
subject: We're not taking our foot off the gas anytime soon!
body:
I’ve answered over 700 questions from Kentuckians, with not a single question missed. Do you have a question you’d like me to answer?
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-r/) Wow, what a ride! Since day one of this campaign, Team Keck and I have traveled thousands of miles, zig zagging and dotting our way through the Commonwealth. Together we've held numerous in-person and virtual Facebook Live town halls, meeting thousands of Kentuckians ready for change, and in the process, _**I 've answered over 700 questions from Kentuckians, not missing a single one that's been asked. [_Do you have a question you 'd like me to answer?_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-j/)**_ [SUBMIT YOUR QUESTION](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-t/) _But let me tell you, while I might be the only candidate in this race who answers every question from every voter,**I 'm not taking my foot off the gas anytime soon,** [_**and I hope you aren 't either.**_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-i/)_I've made it a point of my campaign to answer every single question submitted to me, because I believe that's what being a public servant is all about-meeting folks where they are, _letting Kentuckians speak themselves -**not be spoken to** -on the kind of leadership they need to make their communities and Commonwealth a better place to live. **That 's what this race should be about.**_[__**But as this month comes to a close, and as I prepare to hit the debate stage, and continue traveling across Kentucky**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-d/), _I wanted to reach out and thank you for your continued support, your input and your engagement._ From Pikeville to Paducah, and from Covington to Corbin, I want you to know that I have been busy answering the hundreds of questions submitted by Kentuckians from all across the Commonwealth-making our case-_and hopefully I 've answered a question from you by now! __**Just know, I am committed to hearing from you and answering the tough questions from voters that simply put, no other candidate will.**_ [EXPLORE VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES WITH TEAM KECK](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-h/) [$10 | DONATE](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-k/) [$50 | DONATE](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-u/) [$25 | DONATE](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-o/) [$100 | DONATE](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-b/) [__**So, I'm opening the floor once again -what questions do you have for me?**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-n/) This is your chance to voice your concerns, thoughts, and hopes for Kentucky. _Your feedback is what drives me to continue pushing forward with our vision of a Kentucky that 'wins.'_But while you've no doubt heard me talk about it before, _here 's what 'winning' means to me. __It means getting government out of the way of Kentucky 's successes, putting private sector success to work in the public sector. _It means solving Kentucky's own border crisis-_its workforce crisis_ -one that's devastating small businesses all along our frontier. With Kentuckians looking to save in tough times, tens-of-thousands are seeking work in Tennessee, Ohio, Indiana, where there's lower or no income taxes at all! _The simple solution?**Eliminating the income tax to put more money back in your pocket.**_[__**That 's just the start-but, I can't bring this home without your support.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-p/) That's why your continued support is just as important as your continued questions and engagement-_if you 're ready for a governor who'll listen to Kentuckians and learn when they disagree-if you're ready for a governor who'll revitalize our state like he's revitalized his hometown-[_**then I need you on Team Keck.**_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-x/)_[__**Now, as February comes to a close, it 's crucial that we maintain our momentum.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-m/) A statewide political campaign is no easy feat, it's an uphill battle. But if you're ready, I need you to march with me-[__**so, pick up that flag, join me as I march up this hill.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-c/) Whether it's your time, talent or treasure, your support of any size puts Kentucky one step closer to winning again... _**and that 's worth fighting for.**_ [EXPLORE VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES WITH TEAM KECK](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-q/) [$10 | DONATE](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-a/) [$50 | DONATE](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-f/) [$25 | DONATE](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-z/) [$100 | DONATE](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-plrjtkd-dytiuyidkd-v/) So, please continue to send your questions-I look forward to answering them-and together, let's prove that #KentuckyWins!God Bless. Since day one of this campaign, Team Keck and I have traveled thousands of miles, zig zagging and dotting our way through the Commonwealth. Together we've held numerous in-person and virtual Facebook Live town halls, meeting thousands of Kentuckians ready for change, and in the process, I 've answered over 700 questions from Kentuckians, not missing a single one that's been asked. But let me tell you, while I might be the only candidate in this race who answers every question from every voter,I 'm not taking my foot off the gas anytime soon, made it a point of my campaign to answer every single question submitted to me, because I believe that's what being a public servant is all about-meeting folks where they are, letting Kentuckians speak themselves -not be spoken to -on the kind of leadership they need to make their communities and Commonwealth a better place to live. That 's what this race should be about., I wanted to reach out and thank you for your continued support, your input and your engagement. name: ICYMI News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr1cthb2k028gvsp4g92kbgltcm0oefc91b2co98_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdie8pj7c5h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z24k8tcnmjf6pu8c71enrtollt25kgic3k9ipe3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdie8pj7c5h2bs) [NO](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5epb9u7s20co08g1vpoe09nt9r9opa6ro24kt60_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdie8pj7c5h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zskrfmm4ohtujn4u4r0cgefpr7pmce155jo09ma0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdie8pj7c5h2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6q61qu35khfr823ujcr6bedp8n3mipmiqq1u0q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cdie8pj7c5h2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

|

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Draft DeSantis
subject: Will you join 200,000 Patriots?
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| | Peter, **Will you join 200,000 of your fellow American patriots in the historic grassroots movement to draft Ron DeSantis for President?** More than 200,000 patriots have already joined READY FOR RON - the only credible organization working to draft and elect Ron DeSantis as president in 2024. [**Will you chip in to DRAFT Ron DeSantis to run for president and help us build the sturdy foundation he needs to defeat Joe Biden?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62379086:6zjXE3GNn:m:1:3331421248:D4D38F14DCB4D43A60C186D8732934C2:r) Over 70% of voters believe America is on the wrong track, and Joe Biden's approval rating is one of the lowest in U.S. history. Ron DeSantis, though, remains one of the most popular governors in the country and is well-positioned to defeat Joe Biden in a head-to-head match up... **_... only if he has the support of an engaged and dedicated grassroots base to be the foundation of his campaign._** [**That 's why we're asking you to join READY FOR RON today with a contribution to help us build the historic grassroots coalition Ron DeSantis needs to defeat Joe Biden.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62379086:6zjXE3GNn:m:1:3331421248:D4D38F14DCB4D43A60C186D8732934C2:r) We've been able to build a movement of over 200,000 patriots so far... **... but we need YOU to join us today!**
---
| | Sincerely,
---
Draft DeSantis
---
| | _Ready for Ron is a grassroots effort dedicated to drafting Ron DeSantis for President in 2024. Your support is critical to making sure this effort succeeds in order to get America back on track. _
---
_Our efforts depend on the support of America-First patriots like you. So if you'd like to donate,**[please sign the petition today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62379086:6zjXE3GNn:m:1:3331421248:D4D38F14DCB4D43A60C186D8732934C2:r)** Thank you. _
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62379086:6zjXE3GNn:m:1:3331421248:D4D38F14DCB4D43A60C186D8732934C2:r)
---
Contributions or gifts to the Ready for Ron are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes and will be used in connection with federal elections. Contributions from federal government contractors, national banks, or foreign nationals or entities are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. By submitting the form above, you certify the following statements are true and accurate: 1. This contribution is made from your personal funds, not from the general treasury funds of a corporation, union, or national bank, and will not be reimbursed by another person or entity; 2. This contribution is made by a U.S. citizen, lawfully admitted permanent U.S. resident (i.e. Green Card holder), and not a foreign national or entity, federal government contractor, or national bank; and 3. Contributions from individuals up to $5,000 per year are designated to the RFR candidate contribution account, and any amount in excess of $5,000 per year is designated to the RFR Carey account.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We often talk about messaging here, how important it is for Democrats. So we provide you with a front row seat to mastery by Rep. Eric Swalwell a video we put together! It is..well, it's a grand slam.
body:
The Blue Letter
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T556ec5e4-ffba-482a-88e7-b6a7c0920849/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, We often talk about [messaging](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd5fb826-6685-4c4c-861b-b44d3ba1aeac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) here, how important it is for Democrats. [So we provide you with a front row seat to mastery by Rep. Eric Swalwell a video we put together! It is..well, it's a grand slam.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b29d7a3-91b0-450c-9d84-1ed44420dcb7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Here's what you need to do, [what Rep. Swalwell does SO WELL](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8606241-e3a7-40ae-a56e-6c52284c29ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9):** 1\. Brag early & often about their accomplishments. [The media certainly won't do it, and it's the only way people who don't pay close attention remember.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta1fe4901-a16a-46e6-8d23-665ca84689ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) 2. [Never leave ANY charge by Republicans unanswered. Even if it's ridiculous, if they're the only ones talking, people will believe what they hear.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te38e0801-175c-4f12-8898-b8e9f0777cce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) 3\. When you do answer,[ use emotional examples of their lying, go straight at their character. Do the same with their extremism](https://default.salsalabs.org/T59ad5a8f-997d-446e-b0b3-da562b51769b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), show examples--the easiest are the ones right in front of you (s[ee the video yet again](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9fca908e-b29c-4cec-a3e8-337c314e6e03/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)). 4. [Always mock them](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9fd45e65-0f0b-4ad2-9415-c26007305c52/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). They're not serious people and don't deserve to be treated as such.[ It sends a message to those watching: These are clowns. They are not people I can trust with my government.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98df9780-0d8c-46f1-9d4f-d322debdbd95/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) There's much more, [but this is a basic list of crucial things to do.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tacf0e3a8-2710-4abf-b252-3cd57c814657/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ And Swalwell hits every single one out of the park. Please watch this video, it is so important for us to do this right to win.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T276f814a-b110-4c4c-b71b-9c815fa7c87e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And please[ subscribe to the Blue Amp Channel, an extension of this email list where we use video to educate and entertain](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1dfc6b4-b41e-4d6c-b03b-f4fc72defe7c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Hope you're having an outstanding day! [I am after watching the Swalwell video!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0aa7efa2-805d-4e57-9783-48ed7cfac336/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff PS: [Subscribe to the Blue Amp Channel on Youtube!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30bae94d-7192-41d3-ac98-17b4c40a6b46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!! [Follow ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44af38bc-e198-49d9-87f3-83b0f567f9da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [@cliffschecter on Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb4e592d0-47ca-40ae-a362-b9db3dae83ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Have a great week, Blue Amp Action Community
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7cefacb1-9573-496f-b8a0-a0580b857a54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/newslettermar12023-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66dd4d36-58f9-4ff9-9d40-de12ec684f5d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: Leah Donahey, LCV
subject: Tell President Biden to REJECT a massive Alaska drilling project -- equivalent to 76 coal plants.
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/6Lg6B~_

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=8961084&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDAyNzAwOQS2&spReportId=MTY4MDcwMzg0NwS2. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/qjPNc8_ ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Zzb0MP9r6kMk/UG5kSy9Idy80MGJsSDJTTHlybjVvYnFNWnRTY254Vm1GUEQ0QWNOUDVtTGowMG9uRG1xNW1QNjBPbGNsL0ZJSy9BQ3JQTG5UUFZVK1EyemxmTWNzVVJhRnlVNEJxTlRGNCs1TGNTN3N2ZGFac0wxRHNFQ1hzQVFqb2tEaDNrNi9yQ2xFaWJjWERwVT0S1/

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: Biden releases top 9-11 terrorist, while innocent Americans are tortured
body:
Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.

| | | | | [ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78040%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GUyFaHSWnmXWVOi4plSwjg&sysid=1)
---
| |
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78041%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZXOlu9OTiEaaeYviUjzaTg&sysid=1)Dear Patriot,

[ **Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE!** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78042%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oH75VhRfXN8ulBVZjC7Okg&sysid=1)

**Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.**

Majid Khan worked directly for al-Qaeda senior leader Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, who planned the deadly September 11th terrorist attacks.

Khan has been moved to Central America.

**Meanwhile in Washington, D.C., innocent Americans are abused and tortured in the Washington, D.C. jail.**

As you recall, I emailed you a few months ago about the heartbreaking letter signed by 34 of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters jailed there.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! **

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either won’t flush or repeatedly explode in cells
* Stuck in cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for over a year and a half...up to two years...in AMERICA.

**They end their desperate letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on.

As you know, I’m fighting to free the January 6 Peaceful Protesters through two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions.

Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[ **Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78043%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lgPcwPzIX7f2LyZbh0p%2bGA&sysid=1)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, Joe Biden just let a top 9-11 terrorist out of prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ... while peaceful, innocent Americans are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. ** These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!

[ **Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, even more ...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts. ** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78044%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2faJtiOLkDr04FTCwhQ53hQ&sysid=1)

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7600%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=sPzAZAkFdP7g3rGPMtFPjQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7600%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=sPzAZAkFdP7g3rGPMtFPjQ&sysid=1)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
I’m so grateful for the outpouring of support we’ve received so far.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=36%2E135344%2ENEhLan)
Friend -
I wanted to pause for a moment and thank you for your support this week during our launch and for being a part of this team.
_Thousands_ of you stepped up and contributed to our campaign on launch – I’m just so grateful for how many of you have decided to become part of this team and the outpouring of support we’ve received so far.
We’re powering this campaign in a unique way (that not every campaign does): with a large number of grassroots, individual donations from people like you (read: normal people of America!) chipping in what they can, when they can, to move our country forward and make sure Michigan has a senator who will put partisanship aside to deliver results for our families.
I’m very proud of that fact. And I hope you are too.
Before I go, I wanted to share the video from our launch day in case you didn’t get a chance to watch it yet. Click below to watch it now!
**[WATCH NOW](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/220?c0=ebs-em-mar23-vid.vAEpQo&refcode=em230301-1-7&t=2&akid=36%2E135344%2ENEhLan)**
Thank you so much for your ongoing support,
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=36%2E135344%2ENEhLan).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Mattea Mrkusic, Evergreen Action
subject: Our very last chance to #StopWillow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Help us call on Biden to be a climate hero.
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4433?t=2&akid=13293%2E53494%2EeGUJI7)
---
Friend,
The Bureau of Land Management released their final update about ConocoPhillips' disastrous Willow oil drilling project. With that step complete, President Biden is expected to decide the project's fate soon. And if he approves the project, it could lock us into 30 years of new oil and gas drilling in Alaska.
But our fight isn't over yet. President Biden has a chance to be a climate hero and stand on the right side of history—he must take it.
**President Biden is making his decision soon, and he needs to hear from people like you that this project should not move forward. This is our very last opportunity to stop Willow, so we must make sure the administration hears us loud and clear! Share our message, post our graphic, and tag President Biden on your preferred social media channel (or all of them):**
.@POTUS, be a climate hero: #StopWillow and save us from 30 years of destructive drilling in sensitive ecosystems near Alaska Native communities. Willow has no place in our clean energy future. Stand on the right side of history and say no [_evrgn.co/ClimateHero_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4435?t=3&akid=13293%2E53494%2EeGUJI7)
---
This is it,
Mattea Mrkusic Policy Lead, Evergreen Action
P.S. Just want to retweet? [_**Here's a thread you can share!**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4433?t=4&akid=13293%2E53494%2EeGUJI7)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=13293%2E53494%2EeGUJI7). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

name: American Update
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651761%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NJPue1mMt8dhHbSOAc1%2fQA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651762%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FuxxFB0VW33BDFo2nWebLw&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651763%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ooH%2f1%2fuT8foc6KkMImdsTA&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651764%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rb%2b%2bmcMx7xz82jg56zZ7wA&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1770%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=4ijmMRGwS0OVpw7ufOI8aw&sysid=1)_

|

body:
What will GA’s legacy be

|

| | Peter,

We have a simple question for you: What kind of legacy do we want for Georgia?

Do we want Georgia to be remembered as the home of Jimmy Carter – Georgia’s beloved peanut farmer-turned-president who retired to build houses for Habitat for Humanity?

Or do we want to be remembered for Marjorie Taylor Greene – a racist, antisemitic, conspiracy-theory-spreading, MAGA Republican whose rise to power should terrify us all?

_[**If you’re like us and think that Georgia’s legacy should be defined by Jimmy Carter and not Marjorie Taylor Greene, then pitch in and help us flip the House, kick MTG from her powerful committee assignments, and restore some sanity to Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59445025/394256308/710125701?refcode=20230301.1_PSD_3A&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmQ5ZjE3OC00MWI4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=97z-fRxUC4FNXi7TvHSGgEV1hB2pz40JDWpPki6_yuw=)_ | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | Let us know, Peter. Peter, Last month, we announced our first slate of On Notice Republicans for the 2023-2024 election cycle. The list includes extremist House GOP lawmakers like Reps. Lauren Boebert (CO-03) and George Santos (NY-03). These elected officials have loudly and proudly taken anti-woman, anti-family, and anti-choice positions that couldn't be more antithetical to the EMILYs List mission. So we're setting out to replace each and every one of them with a Democratic pro-choice woman. And now we want to know: Take the survey below and let us know which House Republicans you most want to see on our 2023-2024 On Notice list: Thanks — and more soon! Christina Reynolds (she/her/hers) Vice President of Communications, EMILYs List | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Brandon Presley
subject: I’m running for Governor of Mississippi and I wanted you to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
Time to jerk the slack out of the chain. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59446527/394261804/17860314?refcode=em_PRS_OTH_welcome&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ZjYzFmN2MtNDJiOC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ePYWeWX-B1tXSx7Pwd5LfUL2PZuPggqz1z1ATPOvtQ8=)
---
Peter, I’ve dedicated my entire life to public service and delivering results for the people of Mississippi. I was born and raised in Nettleton and was elected Mayor of my hometown at 23 years old. And now, I serve as the Public Service Commissioner. And no, I don’t just talk the talk. I walk the walk. **I brought high-speed internet all the way to some of the most remote and forgotten parts of our state. I helped save taxpayers over 6 billion dollars, put people back to work with the Hire Mississippi program, balanced the budget as mayor, and even cut taxes twice.** **[Now I am ready to keep fighting as Mississippi’s next governor. I know Mississippi can do better. We need somebody who will stand up for the little guy, shake up our broken political system, and get things done. Click here to watch our official campaign launch video and learn more>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59446528/394261805/1783343069?refcode=em_PRS_OTH_welcome1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ZjYzFmN2MtNDJiOC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ePYWeWX-B1tXSx7Pwd5LfUL2PZuPggqz1z1ATPOvtQ8=)** | **[WATCH NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59446529/394261806/1783343069?refcode=em_PRS_OTH_welcome1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ZjYzFmN2MtNDJiOC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ePYWeWX-B1tXSx7Pwd5LfUL2PZuPggqz1z1ATPOvtQ8=)**
---
I grew up in a dirt-poor household without a stove or refrigerator in sight. My mama worked at the local garment factory before it shut down.
My daddy was an alcoholic who never made it to recovery. And on the first day of third grade, he was murdered in cold blood.
My mama dug in and dug deep, raising three kids all by herself while instilling in me a deep value of hard work, compassion, and a love of service.
And it’s why I’ve devoted every waking moment to helping our communities. I’ve taken on the big utility companies, corporate lobbyists, and anybody who’s tried to screw over everyday Mississippians.
Now I am ready to shake up the system as governor. We’ve got a state filled with good people but horrible politicians – and that includes our governor.
Tate Reeves is a man with zero conviction and maximum corruption. He looks out for himself and his rich friends instead of the people that put him into office. And he’s been caught in the middle of the largest public corruption scandal in state history.
We can build a Mississippi where we fight corruption, not embrace it. Where we cut taxes. Lower the cost of healthcare. And create good-paying jobs. But I can’t do this alone.
[**Peter, I’d be deeply humbled if you’d watch our launch video to learn what our campaign is all about. Can you spare a minute?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59446530/394261807/1783343069?refcode=em_PRS_OTH_welcome1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ZjYzFmN2MtNDJiOC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ePYWeWX-B1tXSx7Pwd5LfUL2PZuPggqz1z1ATPOvtQ8=)
**[WATCH NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59446531/394261808/1783343069?refcode=em_PRS_OTH_welcome1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ZjYzFmN2MtNDJiOC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ePYWeWX-B1tXSx7Pwd5LfUL2PZuPggqz1z1ATPOvtQ8=)**

God bless,
Brandon Presley

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59463308/394321677/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmRjMmQ0OC02Y2I4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=umzRd7b7CTVzzuujeD4MYKQvLDh7U1alJ8pZI5ff4Mc=&emci=4fc188fa-6bb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1bdc2d48-6cb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)

Hey friends, The Moore-Miller administration has officially been in office for one month now, and it’s already clear: Maryland is leading — and we’re not slowing down! | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59463309/394321678/-803653937?v=sjrPTojHfuQ&t=4s&ab_channel=GovernorWesMoore&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmRjMmQ0OC02Y2I4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=umzRd7b7CTVzzuujeD4MYKQvLDh7U1alJ8pZI5ff4Mc=&emci=4fc188fa-6bb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1bdc2d48-6cb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
---
[**Check out last week’s video update here to see what we accomplished →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59463310/394321679/-803653937?v=sjrPTojHfuQ&t=4s&ab_channel=GovernorWesMoore&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmRjMmQ0OC02Y2I4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=umzRd7b7CTVzzuujeD4MYKQvLDh7U1alJ8pZI5ff4Mc=&emci=4fc188fa-6bb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1bdc2d48-6cb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
Here are just a few of the many highlights:
* I proudly testified before the Maryland State House in support of the SERVE Act, our first-of-its-kind bill to create a paid service year option for every high school graduate to serve our state.
* I declared February 20 Civil Rights Heroes Day, in honor of Maryland’s civil rights and abolitionist leaders like Harriet Tubman and Frederick Douglass.
* I joined U.S. Vice President Kamala Harris in Bowie to announce new action to reduce barriers to homeownership.

I hope you’ll continue to tune in and follow our administration’s progress as we continue our work to move Maryland forward and leave no one behind.
Elevate,
Wes

name: Serve America
subject: Ruben Gallego
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-america?refcode=email_20220217_SA_endorsements [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-america?refcode=email_20220217_SA_endorsements] Friend,
Today, Serve America endorsed Congressman Ruben Gallego to be the next Senator from Arizona. Serve America was founded by Congressman Seth Moulton to help elect more Democratic national service veterans in the toughest races across America.
Serve America supports national service veterans because we believe the ethics of service that come from tours in the military, State Department, Peace Corps, AmeriCorps, or other national service organizations is sorely needed in Washington today.
Successful Serve America candidates played a leading role in taking back the House for Democrats in 2018 and holding a slim majority in 2020. In the 2022 midterms, 20 Serve-endorsed candidates, including 15 incumbents, won tough races and are now serving in the 118th Congress.
“Serve America is committed to electing Democratic leaders who have a deep commitment to service,” said Moulton. “We believe that it’s leaders who embody this ethos who are ultimately the ones who are willing to demonstrate political courage, and make the toughest decisions on behalf of their constituents—and their country.
“Ruben’s strong track record serving his country needs little explanation. As a fellow Marine Corps veteran, he put his life on the line in Iraq where his unit took horrific casualties. He continues to dedicate his work to important national security and veterans’ issues here in Washington and at home in Arizona.
“The Senate needs more people who understand sacrifice and service like Ruben does. I’m proud to endorse Ruben Gallego as the next U.S. Senator from Arizona.”
Congressman Moulton and his Serve America PAC raised over $2.5 million for Democratic candidates in the last election cycle.
Congressman Moulton’s argument for why service matters in Washington was recently profiled by The Boston Globe. (Read more here [https://www.bostonglobe.com/2023/02/09/metro/putting-public-service-back-public-servants/] .)
To learn more about Serve America’s work and view our full candidate slate, visit: www.serveamericapac.com.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A very personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor
in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going
to stand for that.

Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and
the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs
to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I
worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in
Congress.

The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht,
the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving
relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an
America that lives up to its ideals.

As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned
growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.

I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re
going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18896?t=1001&akid=3020%2E346206%2EtBru3X ]Can you please split a $25 contribution between Charles Booker and my
United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so
important.

CHIP IN →

The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to
sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do
yet, either.

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230301-3020-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3020_346206_tBru3X&akid=3020%2E346206%2EtBru3X

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3020%2E346206%2EtBru3X

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh41jlvefuqbi7t4o54j7m8cheutncpl9rp6f96g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctg6cp30sth2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqmbr3gft9mbnbesebubm2ok34b99ldkuafve540_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctg6cp30sth2bs) [NO](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgr9d3k8qkj5qc1g00spe0nri8gm0dtut7uqek40_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctg6cp30sth2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zchr68nlsp2odqui9ct4s8d4ss93hj6u8c0lbarg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctg6cp30sth2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2p7bluec6qjda0g3csf3ou3al5l80s77gogq4a8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctg6cp30sth2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---

clean_body: Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. | | | | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. In an interview published in Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: " My job is to apply the Constitution." But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats." What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court." Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution." Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Under the Dome - Your Update from the Legislature
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132852?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

We are 2/3 of the way finished with the 2023 Legislative Session! Time is flying by, but our lawmakers are working hard to ensure this year is not a lame-duck session.

Here are some pieces of legislation that have seen action over the last week!

The topic at the forefront of most discussions throughout this legislative session has involved Medicaid expansion, specifically postpartum care.

_**SB 2212**_**from Sen. Kevin Blackwell aims to extend postpartum Medicaid coverage from 60 days to 12 months.** After Speaker Phillip Gunn and House Medicaid committee chairman Joey Hood received a letter from the state Division of Medicaid urging them to support this legislation, the committee passed the bill with members citing this effort would provide additional resources to pregnant women in a post-Dobbs era.

This bill has been transferred to the House floor and has until next Wednesday for the legislature to take any action.

One of the most controversial bills throughout this session is what has been referred to as the "CCID bill."

**_HB 1020_ from Rep. Trey Lamar, which expands Capitol Police jurisdiction and would have created an appointed court system within the Capitol Complex Improvement District, saw some changed language when transferred to the Senate. **The Senate Judiciary A committee amended the bill Thursday by completely eliminating the unelected court system and replacing it with state support for five new, temporary judges for Hinds County's court system.

The bill has been sent to the Senate floor, and if it passes, it will be sent back to the House to approve the new amendment.

**In other efforts to help pregnant women, _HB 1671_ from Speaker Phillip Gunn provides an income tax credit for pregnancy resource centers. **Under this bill, taxpayers can donate up to 50% of their total tax liability to qualifying pregnancy resource centers and foster care organizations.

The bill passed the House floor and has been transferred to the Senate Finance committee.

After reports of several Chinese balloons flying across the American frontier, lawmakers are discussing if Mississippi should do business with China.

**_HB 280_ from Rep. Becky Currie originally intended to prohibit all sales of land with foreign entities. **After an amendment in the House, the bill now reads that a committee would study the concept of property sales to certain foreign buyers before enacting it into law.

After passing the House, it passed the Senate Agriculture committee and has been sent to the Senate floor.

**_HB 771_ from Rep. Donnie Scoggin makes changes to the state's Mississippi Tuition Assistance Grant and Higher Education Legislative Plan for Needy Students grant programs.** Currently, those who qualify for the HELP grant, which provides for low-income students, do not qualify to receive state MTAG dollars. This bill would eliminate that exclusion and allow HELP recipients to be MTAG recipients as well.

The bill passed the House and has been transferred to the Senate Colleges and Universities and Appropriations committees.

A bill that really piqued my interest was a bill to do with pecans.

**_SB 2523_ from Sen. Mike Seymour enacts criminal penalties for pecan theft. **This bill would charge those who steal pecans during harvesting season with larceny and requires restitutions be made to the owner of the pecans through money or replaced pecans.

The bill passed the House floor and has been referred to the Senate Agriculture committee.

Although only one month of the session remains, we continue to see new developments in the works. I hope you stay aboard our journey as we advocate to create position change in Mississippi.

Have a great rest of your week!
---
|
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1c88f74cf4&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
| _PS you can stay up to date with every bill introduced during the session through the [2023 Legislative Tracker](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=83c2448da2&e=5703353baa) found on our website. _

Peter, February is a short month, and unfortunately, with less time to fundraise, we came up short on our end-of-month goal. But with this opportunity, we haven’t failed yet - and there’s still time to meet our goal. Peter, it’s our job to keep Washington in check. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We must protect our great Democratic Senator, Jacky Rosen, in 2024, as hers is one of the most vulnerable seats. Yet, if we can provide her with resources she needs, not only do we stand a great chance of holding her seat but it'll help turn out our voters for President Biden.
body:
Nevada Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb58578d8-0566-4e61-8c3e-67a46ea3e864/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **We cannot let Republicans take Nevada in 2024, or we likely lose the presidency** _This is what we're facing after the Silver State was one of the closest in the country in 2020, with Sen. Cortez Masto barely hanging on by .8% after a-several-day recount. It was one of the closest states for President Biden in 2020, and, sadly, the only state where an incumbent Democratic governor lost in 2022._ **_We must protect our great Democratic Senator, Jacky Rosen, in 2024, as hers is one of the most vulnerable seats. Yet, if we can provide her with resources she needs, not only do we stand a great chance of holding her seat but it'll help turn out our voters for President Biden--preventing the nightmare scenario of a President Trump or DeSantis._** [**_Can you join us in giving Senator Jacky Rosen $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to create momentum for this race, ultimately keeping Nevada blue in 2024 for both the Senate and President!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24b3427a-8a0c-4ecc-b5f8-864373e44be3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6411aa7-5cf4-4b8d-8c0b-8bd68c60e174/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _From Sen. Rosen:_ _There's no question that Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies will pour millions of dollars into Nevada to try to buy this seat. He's done it before and nearly succeeded._ **_That's why I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you to step up right here, right now – today._** _Because it's not just your $10. It's your $10 combined with $10 from your neighbor, friend, a waitress in Las Vegas, a nurse in Reno, and a small-business owner in Carson City. Together, we're building a powerful grassroots movement to keep this must-win seat blue._ **_Senate control could all come down to what happens in Nevada – so please, we need all hands on deck:_** _Tonight is the end of the month deadline, which shapes press coverage, influences the actions of larger donors and, in general, gives or takes momentum from candidates in an important race such as this._ [**_Can you join us in giving Senator Jacky Rosen $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to create momentum for this race, ultimately keeping Nevada blue in 2024 for both the Senate and President!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b36bcb5-d2d1-49b7-8bf0-c47f918539a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for your dedication to your democracy,** **Cliff**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tacab1447-fc95-4a62-9dd6-afa8c337cde8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |

---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/jackyrosenfornevada-n_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb297aeb5-a884-4f1e-b684-1082594c0a34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=5a4465c1-17aa-48d6-9690-5dacb4ed4911&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=5a4465c1-17aa-48d6-9690-5dacb4ed4911&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

That 's why I've set a HUGE new goal to kick off February: | 1,000,000 individual grassroots contributions over the next 24 hours. | If every one of our millions of supporters steps up and donates today, we'll CRUSH our goal in no time. | "Please make a contribution before the FIRST end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2023 – for 1,000% IMPACT." | | | | If you question the effectiveness of Soros' war chest, just look at what he's done to our once beautiful cities all across the country. | For years, he spent millions of dollars installing radically liberal, pro-crime district attorneys in our major cities. | Today, violent crime is at an all-time high and our streets that were SAFE just 4 years ago look like the backroads of Baghdad. | We can't underestimate just how far Soros and the Left will go to DESTROY our great nation. | And that's why I'm counting on YOU like never before to help me CRUSH our new goal so that we can go toe-to-toe with their money machine. | "Please make a contribution before the FIRST end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2023 – for 1,000% IMPACT." | Thank you, | | | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Chair Jaime Harrison
subject: Start your morning with some good news, Derek:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Every month, our party reaches out for your help to hit the critical fundraising goals that help fund investments that Democratic candidates need to win nationwide. | |
---
Derek, Let me begin by saying _thank you_. Every month, year after year, our party reaches out for your help to hit the critical fundraising goals that fund the investments that Democratic candidates need to win nationwide. **And y’all really came through this past month.** **Not only did this grassroots team help reach our February fundraising goal, but now we have a headstart on reaching March’s goal as well.** _How about that!_ This team has always gone above and beyond, and y’all play a vital role in our success as we approach elections in 2023 and 2024. It gives me incredible peace of mind to know that Democrats can rely on your support during challenging moments. I can’t possibly overstate how important you are to our party. So, one more time for good measure: **Thank you so much for supporting Democrats, Derek.** Have a wonderful day, and happy Women’s History Month! Take care, Jaime Jaime Harrison
Chair
Democratic National Committee [](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJ63HdS0YBazw9EBy8dYq0CS0m6B6R23PBGOeyvmth8wvHk12yHznMx-PU7_VOZFGGR0l9JyeCbGXYn20nLlS05a-VpDk0KaNzAr82xZPJB5KyL63eQMScpP0Lusjohdm8lAb3JosW79aPKkH7G8RUbHCu1vnwZLsNhu-o2AENeJWrknpOGbKAFbjnE5GwTUhSI0VQiR3ehglvEAJH9XVex1mnDwpgyH72mKAHmwRfPGzXy1lr0eA1zBP7jQFOPSsyn-LEIf4t_WNRQLTSn_tJxYONiISYXUiWXyJjg_l6Dl1x2fqEm2-wTmEN5fE2EbQgGNy1_veGtQv4e8w0cdqvl8FNzSQji9z-uUfaKeX0_uT6bVybmjyMGLU4quflvBj20tQnCcyUFirhuDidEf1ThiPHRJ88FutoklVuzmYGiji6GmBnhG_T9kT5WLFS_qwNAYEsX-IdUuTxXhZLXgnTZeYLMlnC3OtBC4_6qDD8VciI2dQ4BUIRNTuHROYdvFlZuXngiAzWJVw2p_UP8l_1hyT_lXxub7MZBPN3hTWgvu4lcxXVRAKyLGmAg3ycTgerKR-3qP2TgfObNZWeE7b10Gwcvx51P9CyEgnWAyjgdzQ/3u4/pf4sA4lDReuv3tiATTpcvA/h0/CZ70EUEtPQtnnj_uP4CFAe2DW0en-_asYeqQXRfW1VQ)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Hayslett?=
subject: Join us ☘️ St. Patrick's Day Celebration
body:
On March 11, our annual tradition continues! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/609d3438dc9c/join-us-st-patricks-day-celebration?e=0e0cd0261a)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

It's almost time for one of the biggest celebrations of the year—St. Patrick's Day!

After the 2-week Florida winter and Gasparilla, the next big thing is St. Patrick's Day... And guess what? Once again, I'm throwing a FREE epic bash to honor my Irish heritage (or at least the 25% that the DNA test tells me is Irish).

Join us [**Saturday, March 11 at 5:00 p.m.** ](https://kevinhayslett.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=578edd77573c702fac79c7bf2&id=702e6a0ec8&e=0e0cd0261a)**[for an unforgettable night of FREE food, drinks, and fun](https://kevinhayslett.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=578edd77573c702fac79c7bf2&id=074f4f98f1&e=0e0cd0261a)—**you won't want to miss it! We even have Dunedin's world-famous bagpipers on the guest list (okay, they may be Scottish, but they wear kilts just like the Irish—that counts, right?!).

---
| [RSVP Now!](https://kevinhayslett.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=578edd77573c702fac79c7bf2&id=2781f896de&e=0e0cd0261a "RSVP Now!")
---
| [ ](https://kevinhayslett.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=578edd77573c702fac79c7bf2&id=f12fd917f7&e=0e0cd0261a)
---
| For the last decade, my law partners and I have hosted an **annual St. Patrick's Day party to kick off the spring season**. It started out small, but it's grown into an incredible evening of festivities that brings together new friends and old. You won't want to miss this celebration—feel free to bring a friend, too!

---
| [RSVP Now!](https://kevinhayslett.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=578edd77573c702fac79c7bf2&id=765297cb13&e=0e0cd0261a "RSVP Now!")
---
| We would love to see all of you to celebrate spring and our wonderful St. Patrick's Day holiday tradition. Please let us know you're coming by sending your RSVP today!

Sláinte!
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://kevinhayslett.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=578edd77573c702fac79c7bf2&id=ce6c1a9f06&e=0e0cd0261a) | [Share](https://kevinhayslett.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=578edd77573c702fac79c7bf2&id=575a8762bc&e=0e0cd0261a)

name: Your America
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08464%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E5iMEL5%2bPHaQRSb1bAg3tg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08475%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CGQ3y4%2b%2brV6Jb%2bfRQAUiUw&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08476%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V1xAOLaTl4idRIqegiBKGA&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08477%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0k%2fx0ZquwwKPGLjXESIAJA&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
