subject: Last night: the latest anti-voter attack in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
We’re deploying our resources to push back against harmful voter suppression bills in the Peach State. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59466152/394333070/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230301_f_e_galeg_v1s2&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230301_f_e_galeg_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjA0NmNjYy03OWI4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9NkJxbQH-Gl4B4_Nx9F64JL_-ZMUKAowQh_kbMP7vIc=&emci=c30e57a2-73b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e6046ccc-79b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)

| | | **BREAKING NEWS:**
**Georgia Senate committee passes bill that bans drop boxes.
It also might violate federal law. **
— Georgia Public Broadcasting
---
Last night, in a rushed hearing with little debate, extremist state senators in Georgia passed SB 221 — expanding mass challenges and eliminating drop boxes for absentee voters.
**It’s voter suppression, period.**
Since the Georgia legislative session began in January, anti-voter lawmakers have introduced one voter suppression bill after another in an attempt to silence Georgians’ voices in future elections. They’ve proposed restrictions to weekend voting, redesigned ballots to make them incompatible with Georgia’s current election system — making it much easier to bring forth mass voter challenges — and unfortunately, much more. These restrictions are not only burdensome to hard working election workers, they are also major obstacles for eligible voters — especially young voters and voters of color.
[_**Before we tell you more, will you be one of the 2,500 signatures that we need today to show that you strongly oppose these anti-voter attacks?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59466153/394333073/-239584917?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230301_f_e_galeg_v1s2&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230301_f_e_galeg_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjA0NmNjYy03OWI4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9NkJxbQH-Gl4B4_Nx9F64JL_-ZMUKAowQh_kbMP7vIc=&emci=c30e57a2-73b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e6046ccc-79b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59466154/394333074/-239584917?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230301_f_e_galeg_v1s2&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230301_f_e_galeg_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjA0NmNjYy03OWI4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9NkJxbQH-Gl4B4_Nx9F64JL_-ZMUKAowQh_kbMP7vIc=&emci=c30e57a2-73b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e6046ccc-79b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)
---
Here’s what you need to know about the latest anti-voter bill, SB 221:
With over 50 election officials and voters waiting to testify, extremist members of the Senate Ethics Committee chose to pass SB 221 to drastically cut access to drop boxes in the counties that used them most in previous elections. It’s no coincidence that these counties also have the highest proportion of voters of color.
**At Fair Fight Action, we’re not backing down — we’re deploying our resources to push back against harmful voter suppression bills in the Peach State.** Right now, that means organizing activists to contact their state representatives before SB 221 reaches a vote on the Senate floor.
We need all hands on deck as we work to crush every anti-voter bill that comes down the pipeline. That’s why we’re asking for you to voice your support for Fair Fight Action’s critical work right now:
[_**Will you add your name to help us hit 2,500 signatures that oppose anti-democratic extremists’ harmful bills and show your support for voting rights across the country?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59466155/394333075/-239584917?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230301_f_e_galeg_v1s2&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230301_f_e_galeg_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjA0NmNjYy03OWI4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9NkJxbQH-Gl4B4_Nx9F64JL_-ZMUKAowQh_kbMP7vIc=&emci=c30e57a2-73b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e6046ccc-79b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)

clean_body: We’re deploying our resources to push back against harmful voter suppression bills in the Peach State. | | | | BREAKING NEWS: Georgia Senate committee passes bill that bans drop boxes. It also might violate federal law. — Georgia Public Broadcasting Last night, in a rushed hearing with little debate, extremist state senators in Georgia passed SB 221 — expanding mass challenges and eliminating drop boxes for absentee voters. It’s voter suppression, period. Since the Georgia legislative session began in January, anti-voter lawmakers have introduced one voter suppression bill after another in an attempt to silence Georgians’ voices in future elections. They’ve proposed restrictions to weekend voting, redesigned ballots to make them incompatible with Georgia’s current election system — making it much easier to bring forth mass voter challenges — and unfortunately, much more. These restrictions are not only burdensome to hard working election workers, they are also major obstacles for eligible voters — especially young voters and voters of color. Here’s what you need to know about the latest anti-voter bill, SB 221: With over 50 election officials and voters waiting to testify, extremist members of the Senate Ethics Committee chose to pass SB 221 to drastically cut access to drop boxes in the counties that used them most in previous elections. It’s no coincidence that these counties also have the highest proportion of voters of color. At Fair Fight Action, we’re not backing down — we’re deploying our resources to push back against harmful voter suppression bills in the Peach State. Right now, that means organizing activists to contact their state representatives before SB 221 reaches a vote on the Senate floor. We need all hands on deck as we work to crush every anti-voter bill that comes down the pipeline. That’s why we’re asking for you to voice your support for Fair Fight Action’s critical work right now: Thank you for speaking up, The Fair Fight Action Team | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. name: =?utf-8?Q?Josh?=
subject: Data Centers Do Not Belong...
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Quill for Virginia_
body:
When plans for adding data centers to Prince William County were introduced, We The People were clear about the unintended consequences and negative | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Dear,

When plans for adding data centers to Prince William County were introduced, We The People were clear about the unintended consequences and negative impacts they would bring to our communities. Unfortunately, our fears are becoming a reality.

Recently, Dominion Energy announced the current electrical grid cannot sustain the addition of more data centers.

To make up for this shortfall, data center developers are lobbying to use diesel generators to supplement the lack of power. Diesel particulate matter, a byproduct of diesel generator exhaust, is linked to several serious public health problems, including aggravating asthma, heart and lung disease, cancer, and premature mortality.

Now The Virginia Department of Environmental Quality (DEQ) is considering a variance to the State Air Pollution Control Regulations to accommodate data center diesel generators.

Just yesterday, the DEQ held public comment time to hear from the citizens about the harmful nature of data centers. The room was packed with citizens opposing the obvious environmental, health, and noise issues this proposal brings. I was proud to stand in front of the DEQ to share my thoughts with FOX5 on the matter.
---
| [ ](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=446747c54c&e=8787be5d90)
---
_Josh's interview with FOX5 on data centers_
| **My stance on this is clear; data centers don’t belong near our schools, in our neighborhoods, or in the rural crescent!**

As your Delegate, I will always fight to keep our families, neighborhoods, and national parks safe.

But I cannot do this alone, and I need your help. Can I count on you to make a donation to help in our fight against over-development and reckless policies?
---
| [Donate](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=1ddb74a053&e=8787be5d90 "Donate")
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Josh Quill
Republican Candidate
Virginia House of Delegates, District 21
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=bf67f273c2&e=8787be5d90)

body:
| Thank you! When I ask, my supporters like you consistently show up for our campaign. Together, we’ve won some of the most competitive races in the country, and now, you helped us have a strong February fundraising period and meet our budget goal.

Early investments in our last race were critical to our victory in 2022, and as we prepare for what will be another competitive race in 2024, I know the early work we do now will make all the difference again.

If you didn’t get the chance to chip in before our deadline or want to double down on your support, **[click here to make a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59453587/394288003/-1334289778?amount=20&contactdata=FoFWvwkAWPtXNjMvOaPXKsp+Jzjk6Unxk108P6ChQPvNIHrfFx8QTpmC/YXJ6MQ6a4nFOKDh+B4odxda/+gIDHrFtyOzY6koPmZShqAiSD4LDt8YB5g6LGu+nXG06psuAE0MX8/TZcONFsuyfucHqA==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230301_TY_1.1_0_6MO_candidate_NA_NA_TY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTg2Y2I4My01MmI4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ilbVXg3cje48GL1KaV3XetIhp6bJAJtvMOy4ETwzfYg=)**. Donald J. Trump February 28th, 2023
**Mar-a-Lago, FL** — President Donald J. Trump released a new video today detailing the importance of protecting American industries by slashing trade deficits created by Joe Biden’s nation-wrecking policies. Biden’s devastating, job-killing trade deficits have enriched China with hundreds of billions of dollars, which they are using to take over American real estate, factories, and wealth-creating industries.

_**BIDEN’S NATION-WRECKING TRADE DEFICITS HAVE AMERICA ON PATH TO RUIN** _

_**SOARING TRADE DEFICITS: Under Biden, our trade deficits have risen to the highest levels in our country’s history, devastating American workers and businesses.** _

President Trump’s new Strategic National Manufacturing Initiative will once again cut the trade deficit and bring millions of jobs back to America.

_**TRANSCRIPT** _

Under Joe Biden's nation-wrecking policies, our trade deficits are exploding like never before, killing jobs, killing factories, and killing America's economic future. As President, I began to successfully slash our trade deficits before the pandemic.

Now, the Biden administration has us bleeding wealth on a historic scale like never seen before. These gigantic trade deficits are also known as losses. Last year, we lost $383 billion to China, and nearly $1 trillion all over the world. The largest trade deficit in the history of our country, by far.

Through these unsustainable losses, we are handing China more and more of our jobs, more and more victories, and long-term prosperity in exchange for cheap, disposable consumer goods. We foolishly send China hundreds of billions of dollars and China uses those dollars to buy up our real estate, our factories, and our wealth-creating industries.

And they also use all that money to build up their military and they're doing it rapidly. In short, Joe Biden has America on a path to subservience and economic ruin and everybody knows it and other countries are laughing at us. Under my leadership, we will end his gigantic job-killing trade deficits, reclaim our independence, and launch a great economic boom.

When I was President, the so-called experts hysterically predicted that my tariffs on China, Mexico, and other countries would crash the economy. Instead, the opposite happened. Exactly the opposite.

Under my policies, we had virtually no inflation. We had tremendous job creation. We had rapid wage growth for the first time in many, many years. And we had more than 17,000 new factories open up for business right here in the USA. Through my Strategic National Manufacturing Initiative, we will do it again. We'll be bigger and better and stronger than we've ever been. And we did a great job two years ago. We'll do even better this time.

Thank you very much.

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump February 28th, 2023 ICYMI: “Judicial Watch: Los Angeles County Confirms Removal of 1.2 Million Ineligible Voters From Rolls as Part of Lawsuit Settlement” Let's ask Rupert Murdoch—So how can the Election have been “Fair and Balanced” if Los Angeles County agreed, during litigation, that there were 1.2 million ineligible voters after the Election? And that’s just the tip of the iceberg. Our Elections are Third World! Read the full article from Judicial Watch . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 28th, 2023 ICYMI: “Trump vows a ‘sweeping pro-American overhaul’ of tax, trade policies in campaign video” Read the full article by Ben Whedon with Just the News . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 28th, 2023 Mar-a-Lago, FL — President Donald J. Trump released a new video today detailing the importance of protecting American industries by slashing trade deficits created by Joe Biden’s nation-wrecking policies. Biden’s devastating, job-killing trade deficits have enriched China with hundreds of billions of dollars, which they are using to take over American real estate, factories, and wealth-creating industries. While in office, President Trump successfully cut trade deficits, which created millions of jobs, achieved rapid wage growth, and led to over 17,000 new factories on American soil. Yesterday, President Trump that replaces the disastrous Biden system of punishing domestic producers and rewarding outsourcers with a new pro-America system of universal baseline tariffs on most foreign products that rewards domestic production while taxing foreign companies. BIDEN’S NATION-WRECKING TRADE DEFICITS HAVE AMERICA ON PATH TO RUIN “Joe Biden has America on a path to subservience and economic ruin and everybody knows it, and other countries are laughing at us. Under my leadership, we will end his gigantic job-killing trade deficits, reclaim our independence, and launch a great economic boom.” – President Donald J. Trump February 28, 2023 SOARING TRADE DEFICITS: Under Biden, our trade deficits have risen to the highest levels in our country’s history, devastating American workers and businesses. Biden has stood by and watched as America’s trade deficits have soared. Under the Biden administration, this nation’s trade deficits have risen to record high levels, killing jobs, killing factories, and killing America’s economic future. Last year, America’s trade deficit rose to the highest level on record, at nearly $1 trillion. The deficit with China rose to $383 billion. The agriculture trade deficit rose to $2 billion last calendar year, and USDA recently that in fiscal year 2023 the agriculture trade deficit will rise to a record $14.5 billion. A NATION IN DECLINE: Trade deficits are destroying American jobs and communities and threaten our national security. Trade deficits have led to massive job losses in America’s manufacturing sector. Increased imports demand for domestic production, leading to a loss of manufacturing jobs. The growing trade deficit with China between 2001 and 2015 alone led to an loss of 3.4 million jobs. After the twin disasters of NAFTA and China’s entry into the World Trade Organization, the U.S. lost 60,000 factories. The current trade deficit is bolstering China, which uses the money it bilks from America to buy up American real estate and wealth-creating industries. China over 194,000 acres of U.S. farmland, and at least 2,400 U.S. are majority-owned by Chinese investors and firms. China is also using the money it is siphoning off from America to rapidly build up their military, putting U.S. national security at risk. China has developed hypersonic missiles, and their military has naval ships and serving military members than the U.S. China also the global market for the mining and processing of components critical for missiles, firearms, and radars. RETURNING TO AN AMERICA FIRST TRADE POLICY: President Trump’s America-First Trade Platform will bolster American manufacturing and help American jobs and businesses come roaring back to life, just like they did during his administration. During the Trump administration before the pandemic, America’s overall trade deficit . America’s trade deficit with China also by $73 billion in 2019. President Trump followed through on his promise to bring back American manufacturing, with more than 500,000 new manufacturing jobs created before the pandemic. Manufacturing job growth soared to a more than two decade high in 2018. In 2019, wages at the fastest rate in a decade, and 17,000 new factories opened up for business in the U.S. President Trump’s new Strategic National Manufacturing Initiative will once again cut the trade deficit and bring millions of jobs back to America. President Trump will impose universal baseline tariffs on most foreign products and raise them if a foreign country engages in unfair trade practices. President Trump will eliminate unfair trade deals and negotiate better deals for American workers. President Trump also will implement a bold series of reforms to completely eliminate dependence on China in all critical areas, including by prohibiting federal contracts to any American company that outsources to China. TRANSCRIPT Under Joe Biden's nation-wrecking policies, our trade deficits are exploding like never before, killing jobs, killing factories, and killing America's economic future. As President, I began to successfully slash our trade deficits before the pandemic. Now, the Biden administration has us bleeding wealth on a historic scale like never seen before. These gigantic trade deficits are also known as losses. Last year, we lost $383 billion to China, and nearly $1 trillion all over the world. The largest trade deficit in the history of our country, by far. Through these unsustainable losses, we are handing China more and more of our jobs, more and more victories, and long-term prosperity in exchange for cheap, disposable consumer goods. We foolishly send China hundreds of billions of dollars and China uses those dollars to buy up our real estate, our factories, and our wealth-creating industries. And they also use all that money to build up their military and they're doing it rapidly. In short, Joe Biden has America on a path to subservience and economic ruin and everybody knows it and other countries are laughing at us. Under my leadership, we will end his gigantic job-killing trade deficits, reclaim our independence, and launch a great economic boom. When I was President, the so-called experts hysterically predicted that my tariffs on China, Mexico, and other countries would crash the economy. Instead, the opposite happened. Exactly the opposite. Under my policies, we had virtually no inflation. We had tremendous job creation. We had rapid wage growth for the first time in many, many years. And we had more than 17,000 new factories open up for business right here in the USA. Through my Strategic National Manufacturing Initiative, we will do it again. We'll be bigger and better and stronger than we've ever been. And we did a great job two years ago. We'll do even better this time. Thank you very much. | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. We need to do whatever it takes to get the TRUTH out. Thank you, Donald J Trump 45th President of the United States P.S. Text TRUMP to 88022 to receive direct updates from yours truly. I'll be sending a text soon, so don't wait. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America PAC. donaldjtrump.com |

What I’m about to show you is ** _by far_** the #1 survival invention of the past five years.

[I call it the **“CampLife Waterproof Arc Lighter”** Firestarter.](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11730/6374453/0e923fefb025993eba36477f2a1abe5b9c3186af/a54f5d9c7c965fde014bc5b2dce855f97f53a9a6)

The reason I call it that is that...

It doesn’t actually produce a “flame” at all -- but a white-hot **arc lighter** (the same thing lightning is made of).

And just like lightning burns in the rain...

This arc firestarter **literally stays burning underwater.**

[](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11730/6374453/ceea303c621bb312a8a3e33e39eebf9585c24292/a54f5d9c7c965fde014bc5b2dce855f97f53a9a6)
---

* Requires no fuel or refilling
* USB Quick Charge
* Is totally windproof (as well as being waterproof)

Carrying this tool is like having **your own personal lightning bolt** in your pocket.

And it’s the only way I’ve found to get ** _virtually guaranteed_** fire whenever you need it.

**Best of all...**

The company behind this incredible new tool is currently running a very limited promotion -- [These Lighter are prepaid and Free for you today (just cover s&h)](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11730/6374453/0e923fefb025993eba36477f2a1abe5b9c3186af/a54f5d9c7c965fde014bc5b2dce855f97f53a9a6)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congresswoman=20Lori=20Chavez=2DDeRemer?=
subject: I’m a woman of my word
body:
They lied during the 2022 campaign, and they’re lying again now | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ce58f1a40183/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8118351?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=aff04ad5b5&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter,

To the radical left, lying is second nature. And they assume everyone else lies all the time too.

And now, they’re trying to attack me for wanting to cut medicare and social security – **a complete falsehood.**

I’m a woman of my word, and when I said,
_“we will fully fund our Social Security, our Medicare, and our Medicaid ”_
**I meant it. **
---
| [ ](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=1cdc0a4bd6&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Unfortunately, the left controls the airwaves, and unless I’m able to come up with an Emergency Ad Fund in the next 48 Hours, their lies are going to take foothold in my district.

[**Would you consider making a contribution of $35 or more to my Emergency Ad Fund so I can refute the lies and attacks the left makes against me?**](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=358c3367d5&e=c87c5d8d97)

Serving as a Congresswoman in the United States of America is the greatest honor and privilege of my lifetime.

I would never diminish the responsibilities and station of my office by lying to the American people.

Sadly, I seem to be one of very few in Congress who feel that way.

But no matter the levels others stoop too, I will always keep my head high and persevere doing the _right_ thing.

I only hope I can count on you to help me put an end to the lies.

[**So please, consider making a contribution of $35 or more to my Emergency Ad Fund so I can refute the lies and attacks the left makes against me.**](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=cf62d16588&e=c87c5d8d97)

Thank you, [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=fe9b35f5a2&e=c87c5d8d97)
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05

name: Donald J. Trump, me (2)
subject: RE: Checking the roster for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I’ve selected you for the President’s Trust

---
| | | | | | | | Friend,
---
| Despite every witch hunt we’ve been viciously subjected to, our America First movement is stronger now than ever before.
---
| I have my __trusted__ supporters like YOU to thank for that.
---
| But as we get closer to the 2024 election, the Deep State’s attacks are only going to get more and more vicious.
---
| This battle isn’t ultimately about _me_. This is about America.
---
| **If the fate of our nation can now be decided through never-ending witch hunts, then we have lost our Republic.**
---
| _Because the stakes have never been higher, I’ve set up a brand new “PRESIDENT’S TRUST” to defend our movement._
---

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
In an interview published in Imprimis, Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=619633b7ac6d4c6893767fadc83e12cb&_e=BqpHi8V4fAtbChiik6g1kj0hI4WW2vgbXzOccW96JmC5leiZGQa5KUp3oTnB9f4KJi7WQr6ayEbY1dd5tIDDRnRP5J0Mp0uDP5K1hEiiIzXcFTHw7q5vgl4TmqdFyLJpz5DUAmkBHRg6iW_AAnl4-x1GQwDgYFBcledzUnT7APW6rJX1F73bUG4jsfePdFnJ7mngCgYOrwfHIvqhVzM8WuWdyAckFGg2xX0MUVAFA3YE1TZ5DIWNW6DtugaqWhu2-M2k66XKL2dIS-gwY-JKyOfZbarZXJ5bDpxiyNqKdZkSsOWAtaU-yefMg8c_3FS9FTXtaj-NKn64mUdH6IX_cZp7ypu8MLOwgbuvAXDT7S1V05OqUycJvQ62B92qDG-erQwAFchQj0PgPwSf4QaXzg%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=619633b7ac6d4c6893767fadc83e12cb&_e=BqpHi8V4fAtbChiik6g1kj0hI4WW2vgbXzOccW96JmC5leiZGQa5KUp3oTnB9f4KJi7WQr6ayEbY1dd5tIDDRnRP5J0Mp0uDP5K1hEiiIzXcFTHw7q5vgl4TmqdFyLJpz5DUAmkBHRg6iW_AAnl4-x1GQwDgYFBcledzUnT7APW6rJX1F73bUG4jsfePdFnJ7mngCgYOrwfHIvqhVzM8WuWdyAckFGg2xX0MUVAFA3YE1TZ5DIWNW6DtugaqWhu20HPd0f7Jft4U692FaVHJyMYGF5Xm1Gk_ENygnQ_rIXmljATZgHgy0AHrSFtkt05kL3BsxRu4Vi_Al80DNiUtm9PAFmeoaEtN8PLGXAdbXWCRUH_wtJTjAoxl2qK5YuD6DXnJN3KDPD2Fbv1P_kWOpQ%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=619633b7ac6d4c6893767fadc83e12cb&_e=BqpHi8V4fAtbChiik6g1kj0hI4WW2vgbXzOccW96JmC5leiZGQa5KUp3oTnB9f4KJi7WQr6ayEbY1dd5tIDDRnRP5J0Mp0uDP5K1hEiiIzXcFTHw7q5vgl4TmqdFyLJpz5DUAmkBHRg6iW_AAnl4-x1GQwDgYFBcledzUnT7APW6rJX1F73bUG4jsfePdFnJ7mngCgYOrwfHIvqhVzM8WuWdyAckFGg2xX0MUVAFA3YE1TZ5DIWNW6DtugaqWhu2R63ytbEzryFw9m8rXy0qpqWp9b97V9ATJjCE-_F7Ma0Mh7nvsaguKgc9HfTD19lRMOHTBy7HtXdPmNztJ-mDzVqlTXENDH3tZiIMctB7D7pBFOV5V7ZkpNjry2yVfcj69_igmrxnKtQF7SK-s0ayjA%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=619633b7ac6d4c6893767fadc83e12cb&_e=BqpHi8V4fAtbChiik6g1kj0hI4WW2vgbXzOccW96JmC5leiZGQa5KUp3oTnB9f4KJi7WQr6ayEbY1dd5tIDDRnRP5J0Mp0uDP5K1hEiiIzXcFTHw7q5vgl4TmqdFyLJpz5DUAmkBHRg6iW_AAnl4-x1GQwDgYFBcledzUnT7APW6rJX1F73bUG4jsfePdFnJ7mngCgYOrwfHIvqhVzM8WuWdyAckFGg2xX0MUVAFA3YE1TZ5DIWNW6DtugaqWhu28ipo-XIwgHgBQs7M3QADzlNTFFB6Z_JSgzlP0qKYM8MDhycYXI-NWzGYxm2ntU9Ypyaol5x-WuWfhU_lvT9fGLLHTroTY66j0P1m7gGLiss4FC7GyDITSjv-LmEV9beaODU9FmGIOtV0O3d5GlsWEw%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=619633b7ac6d4c6893767fadc83e12cb&_e=BqpHi8V4fAtbChiik6g1kj0hI4WW2vgbXzOccW96JmC5leiZGQa5KUp3oTnB9f4KJi7WQr6ayEbY1dd5tIDDRnRP5J0Mp0uDP5K1hEiiIzXcFTHw7q5vgl4TmqdFyLJpz5DUAmkBHRg6iW_AAnl4-x1GQwDgYFBcledzUnT7APW6rJX1F73bUG4jsfePdFnJ7mngCgYOrwfHIvqhVzM8WuWdyAckFGg2xX0MUVAFA3YE1TZ5DIWNW6DtugaqWhu2g0lo1r63Tu4mrfQ034j0mnL1qPsEzXXJDKDwZ7AyX1sHSTDz6xu12jldh2SGaNe-YsDWsxFrn3oS3qUqXXpqYA0_-Jrzp2--8ZEFW_yiBmbqTJ4H9M5Xd-G8fstTqTlWraFR6mSFJc-tCnWvBAVZ9g%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=619633b7ac6d4c6893767fadc83e12cb&_t=QD5_5W2PK228DQ7fgDnDKvF5GF_ykQrNEeBGiS6heEANd-oAFI6Dnl_yMdWBOEfa9YgnaFu3BmBbSN5KYJr9OBPTsCkdIKEw2sqOmGQ6MxI%3D)

name: Your Input Needed (via DLCC)
subject: This could hold Clarence Thomas and Amy Coney Barrett accountable:
body:
We’re counting on YOU to represent your community in our rapid response poll today. | | |
---
| | **FIRST →** Senator Elizabeth Warren called for a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices to restore trust in the Court and hold justices – like Clarence Thomas and Amy Coney Barrett! – accountable for possible conflicts of interest. **THEN →** The American Bar Association voted to SUPPORT a binding code of ethics for Supreme Court justices. **NOW → We want to hear what grassroots Democrats think about this plan, so we’re counting on YOU to represent your community in our rapid response poll today.** | **Do you support a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices?**

Yes
No
Unsure
**[TAKE THE POLL →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZFbbg9F02kk7hrszsXJHqVSYjgcK5Ar6lAeHa8vtxCUrwoLViswr7lXI9RAHFqAuFPi6ExX2pqv3Ocgsq9kS5n84vANnJJmnEBgLQ3gHrLRAJ8UFZceA14k_7541ej11nuCp0BLxXbMaHjDL-FLfxwltDF62ZAj6E4D7prHPKbGg7kH300JeXHlTACzX5ou7fT25hztnAmEY9q1zvhOrxFWF5-GwBBugoGlsg0XuNtMEMeRTVEM1NTis5nZtqNkUF72xaKuGKOFzLKbdCNZdaRMv2OSk_k0ZBqBS4zGi6gi3GuQWxomWfdFqJJ3rSfSVOBMIXI2Ya6H53Kqq_3qtcblc1TBh8FhiQR50zeD5byVR0pCt97uDRCutfFor2XdC4/3u4/W5PqAUKMT96grxq4sJ3ASA/h0/dT2dcgbA9v2kC9v0M9VpCobx3mB1438eVO3cxfFkdXQ)**
---
After Justice Clarence Thomas’ wife, Ginni Thomas, was exposed for her role in Trump’s Big Lie and close ties to anti-abortion rights groups, the impartiality of the Court was called into question. **But the American people deserve to feel confident in the Court!**
That’s why it's critical that the Supreme Court has a binding code of ethics, so that justices are held accountable for any potential conflicts of interest.

THEN → The American Bar Association voted to SUPPORT a binding code of ethics for Supreme Court justices. NOW → We want to hear what grassroots Democrats think about this plan, so we’re counting on YOU to represent your community in our rapid response poll today. | Do you support a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices? Yes No Unsure After Justice Clarence Thomas’ wife, Ginni Thomas, was exposed for her role in Trump’s Big Lie and close ties to anti-abortion rights groups, the impartiality of the Court was called into question. But the American people deserve to feel confident in the Court! That’s why it's critical that the Supreme Court has a binding code of ethics, so that justices are held accountable for any potential conflicts of interest. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Suing to stop medical malpractice
body:
Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... _... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente 's multi-billion-dollar __industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy._
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08fcf3429fbb41068cb87dc409e4502d&_e=Qkxkksk9cg1u0Neb-F461BhABPIZLyP-mrIu9EnDgfcfJ6DFicanBgWk_qrtxlwzWkdG37bdVeMtvVF_JjoLSsX2hvrVdvSa-QaWJ8iprw8YeSnWdEflIKhk1z5Ng9L10ZuamGlfsE4SscY_eNER8DhQsV4Wrz6HyBUaC4gn1-EkxPza-YcidapJrZazODBF8eBFI5zxVSUc3LpLFjzJQeHFY6cvOskUp75RdBtPACFAD1463mp-s2cuVTeWumOez854d7Oz1xREG-sqoeNBJUQTRqQOsq_-qH2q13G7t0FVPcTxK-vL4k397EHe8Y9Pyt39uOTARClDH999AgLdI1Eq6OLdMPOgoce4tzY3tU4wEiZrEogenY4tdD5ngqqxByWR3UffW8mDMEogLLOFCQ%3D%3D)
---
| |
* She was given weekly testosterone injections.
* She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders.
* And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.

---
| | Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. They purposefully lied to her about the side effects of the experimental treatments they were forcing her under. **And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to "test" their "gender affirming care."** Now for the rest of Chloe's life, her voice will always be deeper, she'll never be able to breastfeed - if she can even have children - and who knows what cancers, fertility problems, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more lurk in her future. **Bottom line: The doctors at Kaiser Permanente destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit.** **And this is happening to children across America.** My non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently destroying her body... **... and finally bring justice to those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust. ** [**I 'm asking you to support Chloe's landmark lawsuit today by contributing a tax-deductible donation of $35 to the case's legal fund.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08fcf3429fbb41068cb87dc409e4502d&_e=Qkxkksk9cg1u0Neb-F461BhABPIZLyP-mrIu9EnDgfcfJ6DFicanBgWk_qrtxlwzWkdG37bdVeMtvVF_JjoLSsX2hvrVdvSa-QaWJ8iprw8YeSnWdEflIKhk1z5Ng9L10ZuamGlfsE4SscY_eNER8DhQsV4Wrz6HyBUaC4gn1-EkxPza-YcidapJrZazODBF8eBFI5zxVSUc3LpLFjzJQeHFY6cvOskUp75RdBtPACFAD1463mp-s2cuVTeWumOexXgMiKH1rfdKoUC0O5mFBchuR4jA-BrCy2_An8SR7XzCwAGKnG20HTDQ5n15FukJWXzXA0p9mwC0VKQrscX31pOu6YNkPY-7jfUgrzTnE7SS3rzRK7sEIc_HRTfjscrBlsyR-inf79V9r7Hq12bZXA%3D%3D) Winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They're going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. **But making radical activists like this pay through litigation is the only way we 'll shut them down.** [**I 'm counting on you to join me in Chloe's fight today by supporting our legal battle with a tax-deductible $35 donation to our legal fund.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08fcf3429fbb41068cb87dc409e4502d&_e=Qkxkksk9cg1u0Neb-F461BhABPIZLyP-mrIu9EnDgfcfJ6DFicanBgWk_qrtxlwzWkdG37bdVeMtvVF_JjoLSsX2hvrVdvSa-QaWJ8iprw8YeSnWdEflIKhk1z5Ng9L10ZuamGlfsE4SscY_eNER8DhQsV4Wrz6HyBUaC4gn1-EkxPza-YcidapJrZazODBF8eBFI5zxVSUc3LpLFjzJQeHFY6cvOskUp75RdBtPACFAD1463mp-s2cuVTeWumOe1UtOhZQqF7xdorqtg9ZgChyplyBSP6hzAXLKWp_F7cgDJpqx4Kt2fVowKDzm6LnfWsDk0HGFyiWoec6ha-Ng6USXmR_U0pj5qj6RJmt_G_7xqK5gP0VvymTRBXvmNfLFqom3BtHuMWROBGfn7AK5lg%3D%3D) Any donation you can send today will get us one step closer to finally bringing Chloe the justice she deserves after being coerced and harmed by a hospital that abused her like a lab rat.

clean_body: Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans" | | | | Fellow Patriot, Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... ... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente 's multi-billion-dollar industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy. | | | She was given weekly testosterone injections. She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders. And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy. | | Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. They purposefully lied to her about the side effects of the experimental treatments they were forcing her under. And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to "test" their "gender affirming care." Now for the rest of Chloe's life, her voice will always be deeper, she'll never be able to breastfeed - if she can even have children - and who knows what cancers, fertility problems, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more lurk in her future. Bottom line: The doctors at Kaiser Permanente destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit. And this is happening to children across America. My non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently destroying her body... ... and finally bring justice to those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust. Winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They're going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. But making radical activists like this pay through litigation is the only way we 'll shut them down.** Any donation you can send today will get us one step closer to finally bringing Chloe the justice she deserves after being coerced and harmed by a hospital that abused her like a lab rat. | | Thank you for standing up for Chloe and for kids like her across the country. | | Thank you and God Bless, | | Harmeet K. name: American Action News
subject: Put Constitution 101 on television
body:
There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don't worry, I also have some exciting news.

Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor?
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi03fegnv22ploj0d68hllc58rohlm47c8e1gru8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctg69p74clh2bs) Hi there, Friend. There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don't worry, I also have some exciting news. First, the shocking stuff... Recent surveys show that 57% of Americans haven't read the Constitution. So when you are walking through your neighborhood, chances are good that in every house you pass, one person who lives there hasn't read one of our most important founding documents! But there's one more stat I'd like to give you...
26% cannot name a **single right** protected by the First Amendment--not freedom of religion, not free speech, not freedom of assembly--not a single one. These startling statistics show that if we hope to restore liberty in America, we must teach millions of our neighbors about the design and purpose of our Constitution. It's the only way to protect our freedom for the long term. That's why we've been working on a brand new way to do this...one that I'm excited to share with you today. For months, we have worked to produce a version of our most popular free online course, "**Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution** ," that we are airing on television networks nationwide. In other words, we are bringing **["Constitution 101" directly into the homes of millions of Americans. In fact, our current media plan has the spot reaching as many as 70 million households over one month!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq54anlgk94mdd37ch7r26luognmbd8v2p8q8g7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctg69p74clh2bs)**
## Is television good for teaching young Americans how the Constitution works?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztarasjdhc2u5b5blf64f406hgspv9bj8makgrio_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctg69p74clh2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztencfriff4ls80bgh7cpsh2rmljj7leual9rclo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctg69p74clh2bs) Imagine citizens of all ages learning about the design and purpose of the Constitution...imagine them having the chance to understand the beauty of our founding documents and how they've been undermined. Most of all, imagine millions of people learning how we might revive limited government in our time! You can see why I'm excited about this and why it's so important that I share this with you today. This new effort is a major escalation of our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions...which has as its aim nothing less than educating as many of our fellow Americans as possible --so we can save our country.** This new television program redoubles our efforts to **reach** and **teach** citizens of all ages about the Constitution and liberty. It's also why we urgently need your support. You might be surprised to learn that airing "Constitution 101" on television networks isn't as expensive as you might think. To air the **_30-minute_ program** and other spots across dozens of networks for **one month** costs just **$275,000...total**. We've negotiated discount rates and identified networks that will be the most effective. Compare that to the $7 million businesses pay to have their 30-_second_ commercial shown once during the "big game." So, airing one 30-minute segment of "**Constitution 101** " on _FOX Business_ might cost as much as $9,000, while other networks cost just $200--which means your generous tax-deductible gift of $500, $250, $100, or even $50 will go a long way. **[With this in mind, will you help us fund our media budget and all of our other work in the Project to Defend Liberty?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcetlb8u8vdvv6f3aea1qf7aorso3c1rg28rl9mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctg69p74clh2bs)** **You can learn more about our plans and make your gift using this secure link:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/DRTV](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zopd45p8on72fqet0v4ae0vber9stenegtp3s5s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7ctg69p74clh2bs)** After reading those statistics, I'm sure you'll agree that our educational outreach on behalf of liberty, like free online courses, has **never** been more urgent than it is today. **As James Madison wrote, only "a well instructed people...can be permanently a free people."** We refuse EVERY PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants, so Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn and I are counting on you! Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2znig4470stot43ii1vkfhao0cmkm5r2gnjjmtl38).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkc5nguvjicbtg43hmbsm4c3r953sb9bum1h883g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7ctjm0p74shim49fg)

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter,
---
I want to take a moment to thank you for all of your hard work during our end-of-month push.

Thanks to you, we were able to meet our goal, and I’m so grateful for all you’ve done.

With you on our team, I know we have what it takes to keep fighting for the conservative future the next generation deserves.

I’m so proud to have you on my team, and I can’t wait to continue our work together.
---
| | In Service,
---
---
Col. Mike Waltz
Special Forces Green Beret
U.S. Congressman (R-FL)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign if you agree: We need public utilities that are accountable to the people, not shareholders.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Communities across the country faced storms last week, but most of the power outages affected Michigan DTE customers. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvw4tUrWZxzarmjEKLgkOu5u0cc4uNAfuEzBkPgwzyvaale149n4povXvs_Nh0sS5B0lbLWWCIORKKz-QSl36zCROpmKMg1UUs1Kgw7LvynNaQ23cKk7fNADCrMOxVnDNRjw92CuOeanr81k14gfWvI0ZbrQZuJDJJUC1TShLamsT73z_h-HFJIwKtxL-jlOWJSRK1d38wriVXnV6lRktrhthAj0OPH9fC1NjiaYqFDVQ/3u4/XMwDpzIOTyyESbQOHoNKrw/h0/vdNCjxZNmx4OWnp077C2E3-XUiKfbH0U0Z79syHWN3A)
---
Friend, Communities across the country faced storms last week, but most of the brutal power outages were in my state of Michigan. Hundreds of thousands of Michigan families have gone without heat or electricity for days, and most of them are customers of DTE Energy, which serves my district. One of the most expensive and unreliable utility corporations in the country, DTE is an investor-owned and profit-driven monopoly, only accountable to their shareholders. While continually raising rates on customers who cannot afford to pay, DTE raked in $1.1 billion last year. Instead of investing in families or in critical infrastructure upgrades to prevent future power outages, DTE spends its profits on CEOs, shareholders, and buying off elected officials. Over and over again, they’ve failed us, leaving hundreds of thousands of families without power for days on end -- all due to greed. **Enough is enough. We need public power in Michigan and across the country. Utilities should be basic human rights and our neighbors should not be treated as commodities for profit.** [**Please sign if you agree: We deserve reliable, affordable public power. It’s time for publicly owned utilities that are dedicated to human needs, not profits.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QJYwSu1YpM2AQIhgns6inQycRNBVq8COLVl6HxV2-xnpOMGGzLQJrkjPe7ZQb4V9cAjmFVyI-T5ITQDpLFs45JnAOIU2wVw3QBXwu7jLV3bGwgFJ-xyQoSedQvqxfrmEfTebFP8oI88fZhg7r7Oa1fc6NYeAZuVHUrt2PpIAHIfKoSq1i37SMZJhz7yxE51LO4zyqxYAuD9a-_0Sb5524aNXhPWUGyAkvXg4AFa70ypatFgU_TVgR6jomeKQtVE6CznL2LEGghCyWxboE4i_wjILJXHc2c6knHC7HDrqjG0RsIgmPvEgecYs_YDBvJxERLPXmBy_Wd_rXMJWKyVE-3_39omYwkckfLWmsMIhJNGNpVbQYPdPv47T6ZH4L4EbZB4RuQABKGQ_TKRA8as6ohg/3u4/XMwDpzIOTyyESbQOHoNKrw/h1/j4m6l5jd9Mab0tfaj3HUAkH2VPkyzwtIJLWeIXk5xg0) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QJYwSu1YpM2AQIhgns6inQycRNBVq8COLVl6HxV2-xnpOMGGzLQJrkjPe7ZQb4V9cAjmFVyI-T5ITQDpLFs45JnAOIU2wVw3QBXwu7jLV3bHyPbsCUosbBGhB4iSmPkkmT_xl5PcTGqyOu5J56u8KCOX9nYJoKKUXU4NFIzQIIqVsdZbRu1MGAvej2LKgZKKQKIUWlC-yYXYY4WT9E8UmcyG_TQ253wuesxZh63i2WizX_b8j77T-o7clAOhQ-ogiiwlSWfPdVnSmDo_omhGwUvm0BZ5C3xwVOBZAupAfnzQZCoF5LLPjFYCQxYElywI_SQoFRfdlvMKE5AIvRJ-Ge_k97RGx0UpRYPgnL3jumPlgjE2zzg3tCAUvSLKQGvimAoHXn6yRAv4UMrZqqENkhw/3u4/XMwDpzIOTyyESbQOHoNKrw/h2/A2Ln8GmUt9dsZQlDomh_2Qf8P6gw9yIzu1kfST3S86c)
---
DTE has offered to give a paltry $35 credit on people’s utility bills if they were without power for at least four days. This is not nearly enough.
We reached out to residents directly ensuring that they knew where the closest warming center was located. We heard that people’s food and medications have spoiled, and people have been suffering in freezing temperatures without heat.
The people most affected live in Black, brown, and poor communities, where DTE has spent the least on needed grid updates and where people already disproportionately suffer from DTE’s dirty fossil fuel power plants.
DTE continues to neglect communities and needs to make residents whole by paying for loss and damages for outages, lowering rates, and actually investing in needed infrastructure.
Instead we’ve experienced ongoing failures. Last year, DTE Energy disconnected life-sustaining service for hundreds of thousands of households that could not afford to pay skyrocketing rates, while selling residential customers’ debt to a predatory debt collection firm.
Like many for-profit utilities around the country, DTE also funds dark money misinformation campaigns and lobbies state decision-makers.
This pattern is happening in states around the country. Utilities keep poisoning our communities by burning fossil fuels, blocking renewable energy, hijacking our state governments, and prioritizing profits over people.
[**Please sign if you agree: We need public utilities that are accountable to the people, not shareholders.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QJYwSu1YpM2AQIhgns6inQycRNBVq8COLVl6HxV2-xnpOMGGzLQJrkjPe7ZQb4V9cAjmFVyI-T5ITQDpLFs45JnAOIU2wVw3QBXwu7jLV3bEyi_EyQ4HLhQCBEtKLQ8Z0pXxwS3Kz8ZLICD6WIvXZthj3Hs2P4-DSAMXuk4j2WvXtp3BkVwm1ypTmYzriAuC-xKS1Vo4SKiloQvjX9-Oz3w3q4X2b1YErpXxU3WsLNbUzPkEFQd6eb4VtkjSPt7sWdNSaFRlM_s_3Xxc2ZZ-DyTBHfp8tUfk1BJAeX1KnMdwGxPTQZVIp3Kl55EL_ODxLDiozua7EuzPCozRu5JlCZ-cnDezZKfUk7O0URAGL9feQULaLkaL2WavoDiXxkzf--qjUIk2Ao9qsF-Co9R7-Pw/3u4/XMwDpzIOTyyESbQOHoNKrw/h3/2WsnGzvzPeTlHroSpPCcLmRs9xmfgDhfiYhRtJrxTwg)
I promise to keep fighting on this. I’ve joined grassroots groups to protest DTE Energy’s rate hikes and hold them accountable, and I’ve been leading efforts in Congress to guarantee our right to affordable and reliable utility services.
Always serving you,
Rashida

[DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKAOmKxgxW22z8rZ35PeiCgBQpGg8i7xnuvuHDrVzrlv-omTOwLZT0FehxBkq_mrpQ0j8sdVccn6dyU6WRoGdyf7RDS44C7XHGpDpP8byVpFDY7yl1yQ2CzVDDCTFmFs0GnGABWQoNsuacpTXfpw_ixRV6eknu-zjBhR891nQVYUq1szy6LT3D__dFsdV_JKCVwrnuAFjlTYocWAR4oJWDs0fYNBTfz_l9qxa9PyBzU5jajEAR8rpdEs7przhDILsQ_P8XhXWDlqwTenR4dan_aQpG6YcA0rGe9IJYKmoZzVxHaOV0xzLkjbU7jjuwp8augnn0M8UZt5Yjc0ZlF3CoiKUeGomBZTpZ6pE1_NrdM9-i-DlZs48WlZUymTn4xOXL83MkD0AaQyE4BWxCqnBmoA/3u4/XMwDpzIOTyyESbQOHoNKrw/h4/6Vu3ZbY4ueSD0rOo4rX5xciuD1cr4o1HFM5iz3Z56eI)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: I just grilled Merrick Garland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Just hours ago, Merrick Garland came before the Senate Judiciary Committee to answer questions under oath. He didn’t like my questions and I didn’t like his answers at all.
I grilled him on why his weaponized DOJ sends a huge team of FBI agents to arrest a pro-life activist (Mark Houck) but seems unconcerned with the wave of violent crime sweeping this country, including fire-bomb attacks on peaceful pro-life health centers. **I asked:_"Why do you send two dozen agents in body armor to arrest a sidewalk counselor who happens to be pro-life, but you don't devote resources to prosecute people who are violently fire-bombing crisis pregnancy centers?"_** Merrick Garland said he didn’t know (“the decisions about how to do tactical arrests are made by FBI agents in the field...”) and he, of course, denied any political bias at the DOJ. But as you know, the serious political bias and outright misconduct we see everyday at the DOJ and FBI is far worse than one or two incidents or arrests. The entire DOJ has been weaponized against patriotic Americans and conservative citizens across this country. This is wrong. That’s why I’m leading the change to expose the weaponization of the Biden DOJ and to punish those Deep State officials in its leadership in courts of law and public opinion. _Shame on them!_ Stand with me as I take this message nationwide and into the halls of Congress. Thank you! [_**Show Support for Team Cruz Right Now >>**_](http://trk.tedcruz.-cn-rtTScQO-wctww) For Liberty,
---

Let me explain. My name is Ryan Girdusky and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to save America's future from left wing indoctrination in our schools. Over the last 40 years, leftists have completely taken control of our school systems- even down to the local level. Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

Democrats Serve
55 Beach Shore Drive
Milford, CT 06460
United States

disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | 🆕 month 🆕 goals ➡️ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59459781/394307443/1176129059?sourceid=1048699&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDkyYzJiMS01ZmI4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=utcUigZ8XHOafgl6zEjdX1Ca1l2EL5sYZe5HJyKGt3c=&emci=3dcc1f7c-42b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=8092c2b1-5fb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) **Happy March, Peter!**

We have a HUGE month ahead of election preparation (and at least one key election day!), celebrating and honoring one of the most important declared months on the calendar, and... our _first_ Senate and House 2024 endorsements of the cycle!!

**[More details on ALL of those are right below, but first, we want to ask directly: Will you help make our vital work helping elect Democratic pro-choice women leaders possible? Your grassroots support means everything, Peter. If you can, please donate now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59459807/394307469/1176129059?sourceid=1048699&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDkyYzJiMS01ZmI4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=utcUigZ8XHOafgl6zEjdX1Ca1l2EL5sYZe5HJyKGt3c=&emci=3dcc1f7c-42b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=8092c2b1-5fb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** 1️⃣ First up, in the coming weeks, EMILYs List will be thrilled to announce our very first **Senate and House endorsement slates** for the 2024 elections. We know you will recognize some familiar faces among these tried-and-true pro-choice women. And we hope you'll also meet some newer members of Congress who are _already_ fighting with all their might to protect our fundamental rights on Capitol Hill and in their communities!

2️⃣ March is **Women's History Month!** We can't wait to join our endorsed candidates, past and current, and all of YOU in recognizing the unique and lasting contributions of Democratic pro-choice women — at _every_ level of office — whom this community has championed since 1985. And we will resolve to keep up the fight NOW, as the forces of misogyny and oppression seek to roll back our hard-won rights.

3️⃣ We've also got elections right around the corner! On March 21, proud pro-choice fighter **Donna Deegan** can WIN her general election for mayor of Jacksonville, Florida — and you know we NEED women like Donna in power in Florida right now. We're also gearing up for **major elections in Wisconsin and Colorado** in April, so these final weeks of outreach and support are _make-or-break_ for our endorsed candidates. That includes pro-choice champion Judge **Janet Protasiewicz** , who could become the deciding vote (!!) for abortion rights on the non-partisan Wisconsin Supreme Court.

**We're busier than ever this March, Peter, and you know what that means. If you want to help win elections, endorse fantastic candidates, and power our pro-choice, pro-woman movement, donate to EMILYs List today:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Elect-Women-This-March](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59459811/394307473/1176129059?sourceid=1048699&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDkyYzJiMS01ZmI4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=utcUigZ8XHOafgl6zEjdX1Ca1l2EL5sYZe5HJyKGt3c=&emci=3dcc1f7c-42b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=8092c2b1-5fb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**

Thank you so much, the EMILYs List team [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59459818/394307480/1176129059?sourceid=1048699&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDkyYzJiMS01ZmI4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=utcUigZ8XHOafgl6zEjdX1Ca1l2EL5sYZe5HJyKGt3c=&emci=3dcc1f7c-42b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=8092c2b1-5fb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59459823/394307484/210412955?sourceid=1048699&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDkyYzJiMS01ZmI4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=utcUigZ8XHOafgl6zEjdX1Ca1l2EL5sYZe5HJyKGt3c=&emci=3dcc1f7c-42b8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=8092c2b1-5fb8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Put Constitution 101 on television
body:
There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don't worry, I also have some exciting news.

Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor?
This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7ecf52e55e28428489e8136a4bf51375&_e=L0C7kgMl_HPQ_yJXEvzqbQEMpXdC2pDR4BU79IDNWkSRj1bdfDx99eWl7gu-fDBrzb5dxgx-RTpvNU9CxcqJ6bRWxVuUGtW6QU5Us3D1s-ngfNXx9EC2mO5Q3XD2ddNRhPjGSxagnmegAmA_h8sOvgmkhy4TyJUjQZIk4rcC3WeJm3hvuHzFpQ0EcL7fceUQK9zt_jQ0l3e0InDMHlbTQBgGUrFmMg4a21aX2Vaa-tbfhJjawv8NIQzQxAUC5hQ-vYSzFpzQZNrHN-wZLdiQIhwHo0-a9oYN5_gKqASnF_lQXO513uCd4uhMyJKpE6XJW7y5pqIgqqoXNvxfwmNLfx_RsZ7C32FjYJj3p59OjD_2tTmV6qtRKVpcCf5B25CcFecfCyd83H4kPQqKRIhxvQ%3D%3D) Hi there, Friend. There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don't worry, I also have some exciting news. First, the shocking stuff... Recent surveys show that 57% of Americans haven't read the Constitution. So when you are walking through your neighborhood, chances are good that in every house you pass, one person who lives there hasn't read one of our most important founding documents! But there's one more stat I'd like to give you...
26% cannot name a **single right** protected by the First Amendment--not freedom of religion, not free speech, not freedom of assembly--not a single one. These startling statistics show that if we hope to restore liberty in America, we must teach millions of our neighbors about the design and purpose of our Constitution. It's the only way to protect our freedom for the long term. That's why we've been working on a brand new way to do this...one that I'm excited to share with you today. For months, we have worked to produce a version of our most popular free online course, "**Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution** ," that we are airing on television networks nationwide. In other words, we are bringing **["Constitution 101" directly into the homes of millions of Americans. In fact, our current media plan has the spot reaching as many as 70 million households over one month!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7ecf52e55e28428489e8136a4bf51375&_e=L0C7kgMl_HPQ_yJXEvzqbQEMpXdC2pDR4BU79IDNWkSRj1bdfDx99eWl7gu-fDBrzb5dxgx-RTpvNU9CxcqJ6bRWxVuUGtW6QU5Us3D1s-ngfNXx9EC2mO5Q3XD2ddNRhPjGSxagnmegAmA_h8sOvgmkhy4TyJUjQZIk4rcC3WeJm3hvuHzFpQ0EcL7fceUQK9zt_jQ0l3e0InDMHlbTQBgGUrFmMg4a21aX2Vaa-tajXIKYx6HuzzcR-U27GEkBeocWD3yjROOL_07t5HTTTlAfUcuWTzFuEkaA5AdZbQ8f__1coGHh5SgZTgpSTWHu_ruVmHcaLi8KFHWn8yqNv48NHujBafOPE6I9BmtFLohJqO4r0yoosQvisMSHgqslcd4FK7ts3wv5mL6d93mdQw%3D%3D)**
## Is television good for teaching young Americans how the Constitution works?
[YES](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7ecf52e55e28428489e8136a4bf51375&_e=L0C7kgMl_HPQ_yJXEvzqbQEMpXdC2pDR4BU79IDNWkSRj1bdfDx99eWl7gu-fDBrzb5dxgx-RTpvNU9CxcqJ6bRWxVuUGtW6QU5Us3D1s-ngfNXx9EC2mO5Q3XD2ddNRhPjGSxagnmegAmA_h8sOvgmkhy4TyJUjQZIk4rcC3WeJm3hvuHzFpQ0EcL7fceUQK9zt_jQ0l3e0InDMHlbTQBgGUrFmMg4a21aX2Vaa-tYkEwBuwKISIlWvGN6-Ioj_dTa4Ba1GLoDb8yhilmvpdq3Sl4r2T024XQ6Nlqv8RJJ6YWbusLsbW0T-ZzbCdRLTeSppppSpHE8G93rwuJXXYizKmWQbz5y_8XE6kjHtyZixhShz7RnLCe5mdTXFO9-dYwM4UIgeJ4AI7eofR2gQNg%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7ecf52e55e28428489e8136a4bf51375&_e=L0C7kgMl_HPQ_yJXEvzqbQEMpXdC2pDR4BU79IDNWkSRj1bdfDx99eWl7gu-fDBrzb5dxgx-RTpvNU9CxcqJ6bRWxVuUGtW6QU5Us3D1s-ngfNXx9EC2mO5Q3XD2ddNRhPjGSxagnmegAmA_h8sOvgmkhy4TyJUjQZIk4rcC3WeJm3hvuHzFpQ0EcL7fceUQK9zt_jQ0l3e0InDMHlbTQBgGUrFmMg4a21aX2Vaa-tbqp8vwkVE8mfAbAIfF-n-KRBfZzUf6GDlhIMwodES3FympMw3Hcho-gUjHOSfk3sOBoAnbsiePKcSSyn_gXKMnpMm-8uwV9OGIN8OVp6rz1zUufSqUIi8jrHnMWrMhOiqRtU0Y7oPXc93IbQDLh-pD_i91pWe9qVnMtnEBqb38rQ%3D%3D) Imagine citizens of all ages learning about the design and purpose of the Constitution...imagine them having the chance to understand the beauty of our founding documents and how they've been undermined. Most of all, imagine millions of people learning how we might revive limited government in our time! You can see why I'm excited about this and why it's so important that I share this with you today. This new effort is a major escalation of our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions...which has as its aim nothing less than educating as many of our fellow Americans as possible --so we can save our country.** This new television program redoubles our efforts to **reach** and **teach** citizens of all ages about the Constitution and liberty. It's also why we urgently need your support. You might be surprised to learn that airing "Constitution 101" on television networks isn't as expensive as you might think. To air the **_30-minute_ program** and other spots across dozens of networks for **one month** costs just **$275,000...total**. We've negotiated discount rates and identified networks that will be the most effective. Compare that to the $7 million businesses pay to have their 30-_second_ commercial shown once during the "big game." So, airing one 30-minute segment of "**Constitution 101** " on _FOX Business_ might cost as much as $9,000, while other networks cost just $200--which means your generous tax-deductible gift of $500, $250, $100, or even $50 will go a long way. **[With this in mind, will you help us fund our media budget and all of our other work in the Project to Defend Liberty?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7ecf52e55e28428489e8136a4bf51375&_e=L0C7kgMl_HPQ_yJXEvzqbQEMpXdC2pDR4BU79IDNWkSRj1bdfDx99eWl7gu-fDBrzb5dxgx-RTpvNU9CxcqJ6bRWxVuUGtW6QU5Us3D1s-ngfNXx9EC2mO5Q3XD2ddNRhPjGSxagnmegAmA_h8sOvgmkhy4TyJUjQZIk4rcC3WeJm3hvuHzFpQ0EcL7fceUQK9zt_jQ0l3e0InDMHlbTQBgGUrFmMg4a21aX2Vaa-tbL1OesN9qjkqHpbt5Zy_IHhn2gQyhK4WqCN1r88mYRGODM8XuBC9bNQYbf7NV2zl4KmQwHeSCcHbec23HILxEFPiAUfwzY9D5MnTeVBcmACrDAUXnnu-3K26I9zNRidoM8vJsUuov5n0caj7D_pNdxwB7sXgPci_ZN9n7QxNNK7A%3D%3D)** **You can learn more about our plans and make your gift using this secure link:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/DRTV](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7ecf52e55e28428489e8136a4bf51375&_e=L0C7kgMl_HPQ_yJXEvzqbQEMpXdC2pDR4BU79IDNWkSRj1bdfDx99eWl7gu-fDBrzb5dxgx-RTpvNU9CxcqJ6bRWxVuUGtW6QU5Us3D1s-ngfNXx9EC2mO5Q3XD2ddNRhPjGSxagnmegAmA_h8sOvgmkhy4TyJUjQZIk4rcC3WeJm3hvuHzFpQ0EcL7fceUQK9zt_jQ0l3e0InDMHlbTQBgGUrFmMg4a21aX2Vaa-tYYfXRqS-TtnrgKk7IDu17fmI0dtHvf4MlsWNgnfk3oVQB9LqiXdSsiukG81q-Y2Y1_VdMxFlBCIqa8rnk9eaGQ70j7qgpt9EUOTRsdweNNIG2UnWZsvKWA48ulwZmORBQQ6tosuDcJJcXVUoxjTahlnfjCn91KjH-ZAcEfIIhrqQ%3D%3D)** After reading those statistics, I'm sure you'll agree that our educational outreach on behalf of liberty, like free online courses, has **never** been more urgent than it is today. **As James Madison wrote, only "a well instructed people...can be permanently a free people."** We refuse EVERY PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants, so clean_body: There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don't worry, I also have some exciting news. Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College Hi there, Friend. There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don't worry, I also have some exciting news. First, the shocking stuff... Recent surveys show that 57% of Americans haven't read the Constitution. So when you are walking through your neighborhood, chances are good that in every house you pass, one person who lives there hasn't read one of our most important founding documents! But there's one more stat I'd like to give you... 26% cannot name a single right protected by the First Amendment--not freedom of religion, not free speech, not freedom of assembly--not a single one. These startling statistics show that if we hope to restore liberty in America, we must teach millions of our neighbors about the design and purpose of our Constitution. It's the only way to protect our freedom for the long term. That's why we've been working on a brand new way to do this...one that I'm excited to share with you today. For months, we have worked to produce a version of our most popular free online course, "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution ," that we are airing on television networks nationwide. In other words, we are bringing Is television good for teaching young Americans how the Constitution works? Imagine citizens of all ages learning about the design and purpose of the Constitution...imagine them having the chance to understand the beauty of our founding documents and how they've been undermined. Most of all, imagine millions of people learning how we might revive limited government in our time! You can see why I'm excited about this and why it's so important that I share this with you today. This new effort is a major escalation of our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions...which has as its aim nothing less than educating as many of our fellow Americans as possible --so we can save our country. This new television program redoubles our efforts to reach and teach citizens of all ages about the Constitution and liberty. It's also why we urgently need your support. You might be surprised to learn that airing "Constitution 101" on television networks isn't as expensive as you might think. To air the 30-minute program and other spots across dozens of networks for one month costs just $275,000...total. We've negotiated discount rates and identified networks that will be the most effective. Compare that to the $7 million businesses pay to have their 30-second commercial shown once during the "big game." So, airing one 30-minute segment of "Constitution 101 " on FOX Business might cost as much as $9,000, while other networks cost just $200--which means your generous tax-deductible gift of $500, $250, $100, or even $50 will go a long way. You can learn more about our plans and make your gift using this secure link: After reading those statistics, I'm sure you'll agree that our educational outreach on behalf of liberty, like free online courses, has never been more urgent than it is today. body:

#

Peter – Today, Kyrsten Sinema took to Twitter to wish everyone a Happy Women’s History Month... the same Kyrsten Sinema who blocked Democrats’ ability to codify or restore reproductive freedom, after the right-wing Supreme Court undid nearly 50 years of legal precedent and overturned Roe v Wade. Let’s be clear: Kyrsten Sinema effectively *BLOCKED* abortion rights and is now trying to get credit for being a champion for women.**** With the present abortion bans in place, women in dozens of Republican-led states are **unable to find the medical care they need** — and doctors are unable to do their jobs without fear of legal retribution. For example, a woman in Florida will have to give birth to her child diagnosed with a fatal fetal abnormality–as **doctors cannot perform an abortion because of Florida’s interpretation of a new anti-abortion law**. Now she has to**carry that baby to full term** , and say goodbye immediately after she delivers. This is the hell that Kyrsten Sinema helped create when she decided upholding the filibuster was more important than codifying Roe v. Wade. Let’s be clear: Kyrsten Sinema effectively BLOCKED abortion rights and is now trying to get credit for being a champion for women.** With the present abortion bans in place, women in dozens of Republican-led states are unable to find the medical care they need — and doctors are unable to do their jobs without fear of legal retribution. For example, a woman in Florida will have to give birth to her child diagnosed with a fatal fetal abnormality–as doctors cannot perform an abortion because of Florida’s interpretation of a new anti-abortion law. Now she has tocarry that baby to full term , and say goodbye immediately after she delivers. This is the hell that Kyrsten Sinema helped create when she decided upholding the filibuster was more important than codifying Roe v. Wade. THIS is why we’re working to replace her in 2024–to elect someone who will actually fight for our most fundamental rights, not give them up at the first mention of filibuster reform. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | This Women’s History Month, let’s celebrate the women who have made the world better, who have uplifted other women, who have protected our fundamental freedoms. That’s not Kyrsten Sinema. Thanks for all you do, \- Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC. | | Sent via . | | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

This is why 2A Task Force was created, to protect our constitutional rights and to stop the Democrats that are hell-bent on taking away our freedoms. The Second Amendment ensures that we can keep our communities and the ones we love safe from harm, but also protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like YOU – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities. | | This is why 2A Task Force was created, to protect our constitutional rights and to stop the Democrats that are hell-bent on taking away our freedoms. The Second Amendment ensures that we can keep our communities and the ones we love safe from harm, but also protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. **Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.**

Majid Khan worked directly for al-Qaeda senior leader Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, who planned the deadly September 11th terrorist attacks.

Khan has been moved to Central America.

**Meanwhile in Washington, D.C., innocent Americans are abused and tortured in the Washington, D.C. jail.**

As you recall, I emailed you a few months ago about the heartbreaking letter signed by 34 of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters jailed there.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! **

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either won't flush or repeatedly explode in cells
* Stuck in cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for over a year and a half...up to two years...in AMERICA.

**They end their desperate letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

As you know, I'm fighting to free the January 6 Peaceful Protesters through two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions.

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[ **Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you 've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch. ** ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e9a33c61355c459aadd0ac57b4b62d00&_e=71trsqRKnMSDC9zyKJLjMmJ0yLWNlvf91KAK-42gYAx4pjMTEwHii_nlLcsWXG0Jps3ho1Q-yBUnpIEfCvaRakZM-ncLYRJ2susrze47r3MWcNxmIO2DotlfDzCrdMBMKwpjtbcoTHcYSH968ltTyE5e8AAdR5b1gci_oM_QVMEWpR6qHKl2ltUj11Ns_K3wHWCFIRYViQ8H83Q9CGNFuE5VN4LejrFNohcVdHebXXWb2gg_c7i3gqJ7UQRQeS4Iktkco_0WGljRKBxL_DC2WheoBaZTdJ2qpUcH3h35OM80GSIoGp6KdlWXspf6adsUlbQx5UsNl4KmKO_xNPgI_zMLMKGgxJMuvqMjXh3bI9A%3D)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, Joe Biden just let a top 9-11 terrorist out of prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ... while peaceful, innocent Americans are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. ** These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!

body:
Can I vote for Amanda?
