---
| CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR CHASE Weekly Campaign Newsletter 3 1/2 months left until Election Day Tuesday, June 20
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK?
---
| WEEK 1: CAMPAIGN UPDATE
---
| Can I vote for Amanda?
---
| |
---
| Senator Amanda Chase
---
Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. She grew up in Bon Air and has lived most of her life in Chesterfield, since 1979.
She has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA.
She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans.
---
| | |
---
| I humbly ask for your support as I run for re-election to the Virginia Senate
---
| Dear Friends and Supporters, It's been one of the highlights and greatest honors of my life to serve you for the past 8 years. Today, I humbly ask for your support and vote as I run for re-election in Senate District 12, which includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights.
The Republican primary is on Tuesday, June 20 and I have 2 "Republican" challengers, former one term State Senator Glen Sturtevant, who voted for un-American red flag laws and sponsored the anti-life Equal Rights Amendment, and Tina Ramirez, who has unsuccessfully sought the Republican nomination to run for Congress, finishing 3rd in a 7th District Congressional Convention.
I'm the only candidate running for Senate in Senate District 12 who has successfully won 2 competitive general elections and a competitive Republican Primary. I've also finished 3rd in a serious statewide campaign for Governor in which I finished ahead of popular and likeable former Speaker of the House Kirk Cox.
I know how to win. It's important that the candidate you support has a history of winning, but most importantly, one who has stood strong on our conservative values.
My hope is to answer any questions you may have about the most asked questions that I have heard from many of you.
After redistricting, most if not all lines have changed for all elected officials. I am thankful to say that I will continue to represent most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights and am the only Republican Senator with a home address in Senate District 12.
If you're unsure if you can vote for me, please check the map below to see if you live in the district.
---
| Can I vote for Amanda?
---
| Do you live in SD12 in Chesterfield? Yes
---
| Do you live in Colonial Heights? Yes
---
| If you live in Chesterfield, you will either live in Senate District 12 or Senate District 15. Please review the map below. The purple area is Senate District 12. The orange area represents Senate District 15. If you live in Senate District 12, you can vote for me. All of Colonial Heights can vote for me.
---
|
---
| | | [For a Closer Look Click Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EMfiEyjd0d7UMQDW3cWBQ07uJRs6nwyGGFWvlmU2ze6PEf9KZDcKZ11JAPNS1Bw3anXzwrDKq8WFcomnTRfbJKOYqmEe6UbBcV-cK8onX7Ii3m5FHrEj_e0jyXe57uZclNMouwrJPUH0gezcOsHiKSAX9D2qra5Bqg_GVvR3SRbfyScSTPTRd0T8VaOITPniIqRY1WC3CtDAWJW4_fan4wveI8e8yZgDTtz1M_HPQduBEgSaQnGMFmS-SuFkkAlQ&c=ShuDdfbrBLcbvqDKB_3rPPejNs-Mwa1bxsUOSKxoZHZEy-6gUsu_7Q==&ch=nXM_SDMQKoEUt-DdZJazJaqO7NqoD-2tIktNY2j7L0gSQKpSFwlzYw==)
---
| WHERE IS THE 12th SENATE DISTRICT?
---
| The 12th Senatorial District includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Anyone who is registered to vote in Colonial Heights can vote for me on Tuesday, June 20 at their regular polling location between the hours of 6am and 7pm.
In the 12th Senatorial District, there are 51 voting precincts in Chesterfield and 5 voting precincts in Colonial Heights. Click on the link below to see a map of each Chesterfield precinct within SD 12.

This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election.
Senate District 12 includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Do you live in Bon Air, North Chesterfield, Woodlake, Summerlake or Smoketree? You live in SD12. For a complete map of the district please click the link above.
You must actually sign a physical petition. This is not something that can be done online.
You can sign in person at our next event or we can email the form to you. If we mail you the form, you can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. Here's our address:
Friends of Amanda Chase Attention: Petition PO Box 5811 Midlothian, VA 23112
If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us.
We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair.
Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com.

clean_body: Can I vote for Amanda? | | | | | | == | CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR CHASE Weekly Campaign Newsletter 3 1/2 months left until Election Day Tuesday, June 20 | | | | | | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK? | WEEK 1: CAMPAIGN UPDATE | Can I vote for Amanda? | | | Senator Amanda Chase Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. She grew up in Bon Air and has lived most of her life in Chesterfield, since 1979. She has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA. She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans. | | | | I humbly ask for your support as I run for re-election to the Virginia Senate | Dear Friends and Supporters, It's been one of the highlights and greatest honors of my life to serve you for the past 8 years. Today, I humbly ask for your support and vote as I run for re-election in Senate District 12, which includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. The Republican primary is on Tuesday, June 20 and I have 2 "Republican" challengers, former one term State Senator Glen Sturtevant, who voted for un-American red flag laws and sponsored the anti-life Equal Rights Amendment, and Tina Ramirez, who has unsuccessfully sought the Republican nomination to run for Congress, finishing 3rd in a 7th District Congressional Convention. I'm the only candidate running for Senate in Senate District 12 who has successfully won 2 competitive general elections and a competitive Republican Primary. I've also finished 3rd in a serious statewide campaign for Governor in which I finished ahead of popular and likeable former Speaker of the House Kirk Cox. I know how to win. It's important that the candidate you support has a history of winning, but most importantly, one who has stood strong on our conservative values. My hope is to answer any questions you may have about the most asked questions that I have heard from many of you. After redistricting, most if not all lines have changed for all elected officials. I am thankful to say that I will continue to represent most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights and am the only Republican Senator with a home address in Senate District 12. If you're unsure if you can vote for me, please check the map below to see if you live in the district. | Can I vote for Amanda? | Do you live in SD12 in Chesterfield? Yes | Do you live in Colonial Heights? Yes | If you live in Chesterfield, you will either live in Senate District 12 or Senate District 15. Please review the map below. The purple area is Senate District 12. The orange area represents Senate District 15. If you live in Senate District 12, you can vote for me. All of Colonial Heights can vote for me. | | | | == | WHERE IS THE 12th SENATE DISTRICT? | The 12th Senatorial District includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Anyone who is registered to vote in Colonial Heights can vote for me on Tuesday, June 20 at their regular polling location between the hours of 6am and 7pm. In the 12th Senatorial District, there are 51 voting precincts in Chesterfield and 5 voting precincts in Colonial Heights. Click on the link below to see a map of each Chesterfield precinct within SD 12. | | | == | List of 51 Chesterfield Precincts in SD12 | == at Carver College and Career Academy at 12400 Branders Bridge Rd == at Gates Elementary at 10001 Courthouse Road == at Ironbridge Baptist Church at 10900 Iron Bridge Rd VSU Multipurpose Center at 20809 Second Ave == at Cloverhill Library Matoaca Middle School == at Chesdin Landing Golf == at Second Branch Baptist Church == at Bethia United Methodist Church == at Cosby High School == at Manchester High School == at Mt Herman Baptist Church == at Cosby High School == at Matoaca High School == at Bailey Bridge Middle School == at Alberta Smith Elementary == at Spring Run Elementary == at Second Branch Baptist == at Chesterfield Baptist Church == at Swift Creek Baptist Church == at Brandermill Church Swift Creek Elementary Gordon Elementary == at Monacan High School == at Reams Elementary School == at Central Chesterfield Ruritan Swift Creek Middle == at Cloverhill High School == at Shenandoah Community Evergreen Elementary == at Tomahawk Middle School == at Tomahawk Middle School Woolridge Elementary School == == at Cloverhill Elementary == at Brighton Green Pool Crestwood Elementary School == at Midlothian High School == at Robious Elementary School St Michael's School == at Greenfield Elementary School Church of the Redeemer == at Robious Middle School == at Community of Grace == at Midlothian Middle School == at Salisbury Presbyterian Watkins Elementary School == == the Islamic Center == | List of Colonial Heights Precincts in SD12 | Colonial Heights Precinct 1 at Community Building 157 Roanoke Ave. Colonial Heights Precinct 2 at Colonial Heights Middle School 500 Conduit Rd. Colonial Heights Precinct 3 at Lakeview Elementary School 401 Taswell Ave. Colonial Heights Precinct 4 at Colonial Heights High School Technical Center 3451 Conduit Rd. Colonial Heights Precinct 5 at Tussing Elementary School 5501 Conduit Rd. | | | == | Still not sure? Click below | | | == | How can I help Amanda? | | | ---|--- | Please Sign The Petition to Get My Name on the Ballot | In order to get my name on the ballot we must get at least 250 registered voters who live in == to sign my petition. This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election. Senate District 12 includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Do you live in Bon Air, North Chesterfield, Woodlake, Summerlake or Smoketree? You live in SD12. For a complete map of the district please click the link above. You must actually sign a physical petition. This is not something that can be done online. You can sign in person at our next event or we can email the form to you. If we mail you the form, you can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. Here's our address: Friends of Amanda Chase Attention: Petition PO Box 5811 Midlothian, VA 23112 If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us. We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair. Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com. | DO YOU HAVE A GOOD SIGN LOCATION? | | Mike and I are putting up 4 by 8s across Senate District 12 which includes Chesterfield and Colonial Heights and will continue until all of our 4 by 8s have been placed. Please reach out to Mike if you have a good 4 by 8 location on a main road or want to help put up 4 by 8s at mike@chaseforva.com. Please remember to include the contact information of the property owner. We respect property rights and only put up signs where we have permission from the home or business owner. Thanks to all who've already provided such great locations on main thoroughfares throughout Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. The primary is Tuesday, June 20. If you'd like to add your business as a pick up location, please reach out to Mike at mike@chaseforva.com | | | ---|--- | Want a Yard Sign for your Yard? | Yard signs are also available for pick up at these location during their business hours: Bob Moate's Sports Shop 10418 Hull Street Road Midlothian, VA 23112 Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30-6pm Friday 9-7pm Saturday 8-5pm Sunday 8-4pm Dance's Sporting Goods 570 Southpark Blvd Colonial Heights, VA 23834 Hours: Weekdays 8am to 6pm Saturday 10-4pm Sunday 12-4pm Or click here to request a sign: mailto:mike@chaseforva.com | ENDORSEMENTS | President Donald J Trump Congressman Bob Good Former Congressman Dave Brat Former Congressman Virgil Goode Bishop EW Jackson Delegate John McGuire Colonial Heights City Council John Wood Colonial Heights City Council Dr. Laura Poe Amelia County Sheriff Ricky Walker Arizona Senator Sonny Borrelli Pennsylvania Senator and Republican Nominee for Governor Doug Mastriano Former Chesterfield Board of Supervisors Don Sowder Former Chesterfield Commonwealth's Attorney Billy Davenport Former Chesterfield Commissioner of Revenue Joe Horbal John Frederick, The John Frederick Radio Network Dick Heller, D.C. vs. Heller, Supreme Court Gun Freedom Case | President Donald J Trump | == | "You're doing a great job... I'm going to be with YOU on your next campaign. Just let me know when you're ready." \- President Donald J Trump | Congressman Bob Good | | "Today, I'm announcing my official endorsement of Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate. | "Amanda is an unapologetic conservative who isn't afraid to take on the tough issues that are most important to the people. She's a solid vote that conservatives can count on and a trusted ally of the people she represents. She's a champion and a leader on so many issues here in Virginia and nationally to include election integrity, protecting our constitutional rights, like the Second Amendment, pushing back against mask and vaccine mandates and voting against all tax increases. We need to send our known fighter and firebrand back to the Virginia Senate so she can continue to make a difference in the lives of every Virginian." | Former Congressman Dave Brat | | "Today, I'm announcing my endorsement of Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate. Senator Chase supported me before it was cool to be Pro Faith, Pro Constitution, Pro Free Markets and Pro American. She has courage. I ran on and supported the Republican Creed of Virginia. | "Many say they support this platform, but not everyone votes like it or messages constantly on it like Senator Chase. • Free enterprise system - No special interests • All individuals are entitled to equal rights, justice, opportunities • Fiscal responsibility and budgetary restraint at all levels • Observing Constitutional limitations • Peace is best preserved through a strong national defense • Faith in God, as recognized by our Founding Fathers, is essential to the moral fiber of the Nation "We the People" are tired of politicians who do not see the dangers right in front of us; from out of control schools to election integrity. We want people that can clearly articulate what these issues are and boldly lead the people to action. If we elect leaders that hold fast to the Virginia Republican Creed, there is no way we can end up with runaway spending, crime in the streets, crushing regulations and an economy that favors the Big and Powerful over small business and our great citizens. "We the People" overwhelmingly love God, Country and our fellow citizens. But love does not mean that anything goes. We the People demand that politicians are accountable to us. They work for us. Senator Amanda Chase will listen to the vast majority who want truth and sanity back in Government. Unfortunately, that will take a fight, and we have someone who will fight the good fight to ensure that the City on a Hill remains bright for us and a light for generations to come." | Former Congressman Virgil Goode | | | " "I'm honored to support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate. " | Delegate John McGuire | | "I'm proud to endorse Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate in district 12. Everyone knows Amanda is a fighter who stands strong and doesn't waiver on our conservative issues. " | "She has a lifelong 7 year voting record you can trust. 100 percent rating with the Family Foundation, 100 percent rating with the Virginia Citizens Defense League and an 'A' rating with the NRA. She's also been one of the top rated conservative Senators, if not the most conservative in most years, at CPAC by the American Conservative Union. As Chairwoman of the National Election Integrity Caucus she has led the efforts in Virginia to put the guardrails back on our elections and even introduced a bill calling for a full forensic audit of Virginia. It was an honor to work with her and successfully pass legislation that Governor Youngkin asked us to both carry to exempt retired military benefits for our veterans up to $40,000. This was a bill she originally introduced in the Senate in 2021 and I was proud to work with her and see this bill finally pass under a Republican Governor. " | Former Delegate Brenda Pogge | | "I endorse Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate in Distict 12. As a former delegate, I have served together with Amanda in the General Assembly and also on a commission. She is a strong reliable conservative voice and vote, and a woman of strong faith in God and the founding of our country on Judeo-Christian values. She not only votes to protect the unborn, she introduces legislation to defend life and clearly articulates why it's never the government's role to fund abortions with taxpayer dollars." | "Amanda is not a typical politician, she's a mom of 4 who deeply cares for the people in her community. Education and school choice is a top priority. She homeschooled her children when they were young and truly understands the importance of parents having input in their children's education and fully supports parental rights and choice in education over government mandates. She not only supports school choice, she lived it. As a senator, Amanda Chase has an impeccable 7 year conservative voting record. Whether you're talking about pro-life, gun rights, defending our Constitution and individual rights, fighting for real election integrity, voting for limited government, voting against all tax increases and fully funding our law enforcement, Senator Chase checks all the boxes. I stand with Senator Amanda Chase and I encourage you to do so too." | Bishop E.W. Jackson | | "I have known Senator Amanda Chase personally and professionally for over 15 years. It is my pleasure and honor to endorse her for re-election to the Virginia Senate in District 12. Senator Chase is a courageous Christian voice for faith, family, and freedom. | "Amanda is a bold champion for our conservative values and has an impeccable 7-year voting record to prove it. She is pro-God, pro-life, pro-2A, pro-family, pro-election integrity, pro-business, and pro-law and order. She is a pro-life leader for legislation in the Virginia Senate such as the pain capable and heart beat bills, and she has a 100 percent lifetime rating with the Family Foundation. Amanda exposed and spoke against the so-called Equal Rights Amendment that would enshrine abortion as well as gender identity politics into the Virginia Constitution. Senator Chase is not just a Republican placeholder; she's a conservative firebrand who is not afraid to speak truth to power. I stand with Amanda because she's a true conservative who stands with us." | Pennsylvania Senator Doug Mastriano | | | "I'm honored to endorse Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate. As the founder of the National Election Integrity she's a champion for election integrity both nationally and in Virginia. She's a pleasure to work with and knows how to get the job done." Pennsylvania State Senator and Republican nominee Doug Mastriano | Arizona Senator Sonny Borelli | | "Senator Amanda Chase is the only Virginia legislator who actually came out to Arizona to watch our full forensic audit, and again when our full report was released to the Senate. She has my full support as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate." | "It makes no sense that anyone claiming to be a Republican and who truly cares about election integrity would challenge her given everything she's done for election integrity, not just in Virginia but nationally. She's been actively engaged in getting answers to what happened in 2020, implementing those solutions in legislation for Virginia, to include a full forensic audit, and founding the National Election Integrity Caucus to support other legislators across the country. While we welcome anyone who wants to expose the lies and deception that took place in 2020, Amanda has been the leading work horse for election integrity in Virginia , not a show horse like her opponents who have recently taken an interest in putting the guardrails back on Virginia elections. If you truly support real election integrity I highly recommend you support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate." | Colonial Heights City Councilman John Wood | | | "I am honored to support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate." | Colonial Heights City Councilman Dr. Laura Poe | | "As a small business owner, professor, and a member of the Colonial Heights City Council, I'm proud to stand with and endorse Senator Chase in her run for re-election to the Virginia Senate in Senate District 12." | Senator Chase has represented my district since her election in 2016 and continues to push legislation to protect our individual freedoms and rights, such as overreaching COVID mandates, voting against tax increases, and preservation of the election process. She stands firm in her faith and positions amidst controversy and challenges. Her voting record is consistent and matches the promises she makes to her constituents. I support her continued service for District 12 as our Senator and provide her with my full endorsement." | Amelia County Sheriff Ricky Walker | | "I endorse Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia Senate in district 12. Senator Chase has represented Amelia County for the past 7 years and I've had the pleasure to work with her on a number of issues." | "She's present in the community, an active listener who cares about public safety and keeping our community safe. She's an effective legislator who fully supports public safety, our sheriffs and law enforcement. Her 7 year voting record shows she supports the tools that help our sheriffs and law enforcement effectively do what they were trained to do to keep our communities safe. She's co-patroned pay raises for our sheriffs, voted to support qualified immunity, protected our law enforcement from personal financial devastation and spoken on the Senate floor about the importance of fully funding our law enforcement and against defunding the police. I stand with Senator Amanda Chase because she has a 7 year voting record of supporting our law enforcement." | Former Chesterfield Board of Supervisors Don Sowder | | | "I endorse Amanda Chase for a continuation of her successful results in putting the needs of her constituents ahead of going with the flow. We need Virginia Senators who put partisan politics aside and focus on people rather than politics. Amanda is just that person. She is courageously ahead of the curve in introducing and shepherding into law issues that meet peoples needs rather than seeking out easy and non-controversial issues. We need Amanda for another term in the Virginia Senate." | Former Chesterfield Commonwealth Attorney Billy Davenport | | "I have had the pleasure of knowing Senator Amanda Chase for the past fifteen years. She is a Christian lady who lives her life by "Founding Father Values", the values that made our Country great." | "She stands firm on our Constitutional Rights and amid much adversity she never wavers on the First and Second Amendments which give us the free exercise of religion, freedom of speech, the press, and the right to peacefully assemble to and petition the government for a redress of grievances, and the right to keep and bear arms. Without the first two amendments all the other amendments would have much less effect. She will not be silenced as she forcefully and effectively represents the people of her district. She is a true Statesman who will not violate her oath of office and the trust of her constituents." | Former Chesterfield Commissioner of Revenue Joe Horbal | | "I endorse Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Senate of Virginia in Senate District 12. I've known Amanda both professionally and personally for over 15 years and know her to be a person of good character and integrity. " | "Even before she was in the state senate she consistently stood up for what was right and wasn't afraid to challenge the status quo. That said, she knows how to get things done and is a reliable and consistent vote for the people. She stands strongly for the Constitution and doing right by the people she represents. Amanda has been an effective Virginia State Senator who has consistently represented us well and without influence by special interest groups. She has accomplished much since she was first elected in 2015. She works tirelessly for the people to represent their needs and we need to re-elect her to the Virginia Senate to be our voice." | Dick Heller, D.C. vs. Heller, Supreme Court Gun Freedom Case | | | "I know of no harder working person in Virginia so capable and willing to fight for freedom and our foundational God-given natural rights through self-preservation through our United States Constitutional Second Amendment than Senator Amanda Chase." | You are invited to Join Team Chase | | Now that session is over, I can fully focus on running for re-election. If you're interested in scheduling a meet and greet please email Debbie at mailto:debbie@chaseforva.com. Also, if you'd like to help out, we're looking for people to collect signatures so that I can get my name on the ballot. I need 250 signatures. If you're interested, please reach out to Mike at mailto:mike@chaseforva.com. We hope to see you soon! For God & Country, | | SAVE THE DATE | GIVE TODAY | | | | == | MARCH 6 | Legislative Update for the 2023 Session | Please join us for an overview of the 2023 General Assembly Session. What happened during the legislative session? How does the legislation passed effect you? Things you need to know. Any legislator who would like to speak should reach out to Debbie at debbie@chaseforva.com to RSVP. | | MARCH 16 | Senate District 12 Candidate Debate | | MARCH 20 AT NOON | | In order to get my name on the ballot we must get at least 250 registered voters who live in == to sign my petition. This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us. If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. We can also email you the form. You can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair. You will want to turn in your notarized forms well before this date, as this is the date we must turn all forms into the chair. Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com if you have questions or call our campaign cell at 804 380 0009. | MARCH 31 | | APRIL 12 RECONVENE | | APRIL 27 Meet & Greet at Summerlake in Chesterfield County | | "Summerlake Meet and Greet" Chesterfield County Clubhouse at Summer Lake 17040 Lake Summer Drive Moseley, VA 23120 5:30 to 6pm VIP Reception 6pm to 7:30pm Mark your calendar Stay tuned for details | MAY 11 Meet & Greet at Chesdin Landing in Chesterfield County | | | | | | | Meet and Greet at Chesdin Landing in Chesterfield County Lake Chesdin Golf Club 21801 Lake Chesdin Parkway Chesterfield, VA 23838 5:30 to 6pm VIP Reception 6pm to 7:30pm Mark your calendar Stay tuned for details | JUNE 20 | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | SESSION NEWSLETTERS | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | HOW DO I VOTE? | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. name: WFP Election Alert
subject: It’s official: Brandon Johnson advances to runoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | It’s official, Peter. **Last night, Brandon Johnson advanced to an April runoff for the Chicago Mayoral election.** As a former public school teacher, union organizer, and county commissioner, Brandon is a battle-tested leader committed to building a stronger, more equitable city. He couldn’t be more different than his opponent in the runoff — Paul Vallas — a conservative who has called himself “more of a Republican than a Democrat” and a public school privatizer who has said he opposes abortion and has the full backing of the Fraternal Order of Police.1 We can win this race – but with only five weeks until the runoff on April 4th, Brandon needs all of us to have his back right now. **[Will you rush a contribution of $10 to Brandon Johnson’s campaign to fight back against the flood of dark money conservatives are prepared to spend to stop our movement?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCHQEvWYTePJ9CnOdxXMAdtl_j0VhD3MU5ScBmYz0HkT4HHG6C2kEy5cy9Kr68MPPULGonT_3xV40_E0aSV9PepHyNCSwOAb7F0Dz3kxL7XqsWnvIAalfSv90dGahCf5Y9d_-F_utWaxjFtixPlIwmLU8TIQkF8-spah0tBthpfDk_4eWjJDJ8edfGyej-BpmCRt4jGPKEi5-F24tB1QI8L3YqwLL4Nr_P80ptLxQ_fYktVlvTihf1Ii7-O2QFy0ksVaZBzR0o5_VrqbY0xhcKT8Eb2h5Dw-U9NSQpYesQ_uLlQTXOVyQ7P85I4N5R9UaYTh6boxRPfvC97rmyxg2QcjPEITuRNun9BVMo-MAz97CI306Ia5cvq8TXDpJgI8-D9ymnpfVevkxBZjCgIKdhboygxz6z6NaN7jYXsIxZJ7aM3MhXL2NY7VMzOdGkAEM/3u4/HyxOi0PzQh6rf7-bgDurVg/h0/xV7IBHGOT3y_mNw5DkKBTPwQ3PhLzIYwdH-db7Pm7mU)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCHQEvWYTePJ9CnOdxXMAdtl_j0VhD3MU5ScBmYz0HkT4HHG6C2kEy5cy9Kr68MPPULGonT_3xV40_E0aSV9PepHyNCSwOAb7F0Dz3kxL7Xv_Nn_Juy-VEBMpdrNXKLuUTn6FZu6se1ihupHhqiXhN92QmXNcOJbwi1BLZCiQrFfSqx3183u9b6cQhJiif1XiY2uBWjcFlzqrXrL5Ej21r22oRXF4wYeLYLp0eSKA2jsQ93RZWzEKL278EfVA_HUQ4SSzroYSIsqL0lPynw5aSJ3SkVpcqzR0iIoI9NMovPoCvFopjQkBmpa7F4AyPq_8ya7TxDvc_INuIRyENGE3ngt9M6nVldiA6Xv8Lys8FlqRtEyfOWDTAFj9xEnCWxIdEANdBgHBz3wmduEMNXX6iR-nMNOUw9io6v9gVzAY61NveF1xE5Ug05sjyir7ldVA/3u4/HyxOi0PzQh6rf7-bgDurVg/h1/f9mN81jMDb3M6lUsyVgPmAJFQbUvI48YucG8mBc7ix8)** Peter — we can’t understate how huge this moment is for our movement. After years of painstaking work by Chicago organizers building power, including our friends at United Working Families, we are now one step closer to seeing a true working families champion become mayor of Chicago. Brandon surged into the top two of this race — besting incumbent Lori Lightfoot and making her a one-term mayor — by running a people-powered campaign and building a multiracial coalition. But the stakes of the runoff could not be higher. Brandon’s opponent Paul Vallas has gone from city to city on a mission to defund our public schools, firing hundreds of teachers and laying the groundwork to close schools in primarily Black and Latino neighborhoods.2 He has the full backing of Republican mega-donors, who are prepared to spend big to defeat our movement. But Brandon has the momentum on his side — and he has all of us too. **[Will you rush a donation to elect former public school teacher and CTU organizer Brandon Johnson as Chicago’s next Mayor? Your donation will go directly to Brandon Johnson’s campaign.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCHQEvWYTePJ9CnOdxXMAdtl_j0VhD3MU5ScBmYz0HkT4HHG6C2kEy5cy9Kr68MPPULGonT_3xV40_E0aSV9PepHyNCSwOAb7F0Dz3kxL7XtYTwDZZKiiiL4Lc7YZugeyecF7fwADItOeY3Z4Q54-STKIyEAGFVOcXpu6k0e2JXpdGuqN5zy3aRdnxEEreJldF9DVuzhhBTPg6FQ-klH4PXQhP9ZpbxmWEALjqmjsCFcuwrpi4cXRVcRkbiCMOE2_qNt4UOpGNvOjzYV_XsrSdpxDYyr51s9xXjLzLTHT-lcw6sHA4T7bQaEFxGrftLfOjdbHrXP5OsUw45q2e__Aa-KVkd1ngNBXEDFk_XIM1QUXXjvprX-PTeWj7EOweT2Wd7LBX2FiwiNTD68AsiW3Xks4fRKk4nk87tNnEZ5grTsGR1zX71fcAJ_27ShbmcSs/3u4/HyxOi0PzQh6rf7-bgDurVg/h2/NSnAHGFzk7XX_Jypb88k9xb26-nckPNPKdMv7S9nzak)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCHQEvWYTePJ9CnOdxXMAdtl_j0VhD3MU5ScBmYz0HkT4HHG6C2kEy5cy9Kr68MPPULGonT_3xV40_E0aSV9PepHyNCSwOAb7F0Dz3kxL7XjkNtMxno1hzRkpWXU_SHCnjKFN-2dMcLML8fuFVHIhz4HQZ5jVO8aMfcZd6CeAkK0zGAMNDp8nIr3aA1qXpNQ4EWQ2yirvNAXkWfu9TeKpgm9eaOGY0mwY2GuN34vsiW-PmJa1HSpUqfj3vtd-w4q0nenENK0VQZ27DYXzG-7aD13Rt8saxMFLaVAqCnd9_Dtw-d-JTepYxkctbFvPxZgGARaAF3SLvSU9nScNqMUIW9YCOHeTY-o-UR7SV7Ck5cCp9fKoofCYEieyi4QTjZHncA5drLyHfl0ELsVd3PlcAKy3cSy9jV7gfLGGiHHuhXyhNQptPS17k8DcZF07OWrk/3u4/HyxOi0PzQh6rf7-bgDurVg/h3/71oa_PQMkYEsHFa_7gl_CltWNbppFaYBHmdgHmxjDNk)** In solidarity, Team WFP Source:

clean_body: | | | It’s official, Peter. Last night, Brandon Johnson advanced to an April runoff for the Chicago Mayoral election. As a former public school teacher, union organizer, and county commissioner, Brandon is a battle-tested leader committed to building a stronger, more equitable city. He couldn’t be more different than his opponent in the runoff — Paul Vallas — a conservative who has called himself “more of a Republican than a Democrat” and a public school privatizer who has said he opposes abortion and has the full backing of the Fraternal Order of Police.1 We can win this race – but with only five weeks until the runoff on April 4th, Brandon needs all of us to have his back right now. Peter — we can’t understate how huge this moment is for our movement. After years of painstaking work by Chicago organizers building power, including our friends at United Working Families, we are now one step closer to seeing a true working families champion become mayor of Chicago. Brandon surged into the top two of this race — besting incumbent Lori Lightfoot and making her a one-term mayor — by running a people-powered campaign and building a multiracial coalition. But the stakes of the runoff could not be higher. Brandon’s opponent Paul Vallas has gone from city to city on a mission to defund our public schools, firing hundreds of teachers and laying the groundwork to close schools in primarily Black and Latino neighborhoods.2 He has the full backing of Republican mega-donors, who are prepared to spend big to defeat our movement. But Brandon has the momentum on his side — and he has all of us too. In solidarity, Team WFP Source: 1\. , Chalkbeat Chicago, February 3, 2023 2\. , ABC7 Chicago, February 3, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Adam Schiff
subject: We need to talk about court reform
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Let’s be very clear: The effort to deny tens of millions of people from student debt relief is a project engineered by far-right billionaires and dark money groups, put before a rigged right-wing Supreme Court majority. And they must be defeated.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1874%2E5257348%2EWJ7mHM)
Derek, the Supreme Court just heard oral arguments to overrule President Biden’s executive order on student debt cancellation.
Let’s be very clear: **The effort to deny tens of millions of people relief from student debt is a project engineered by far-right billionaires and dark money groups, and put before a rigged right-wing Supreme Court majority. And they must be stopped.**
Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump gamed the system. And stacked the Court.
McConnell blocked President Obama’s nomination of Merrick Garland for more than eight months, with the excuse that the Senate should not confirm a presidential nominee during an election year, and then confirmed Amy Coney Barrett while tens of millions of people were literally voting for Joe Biden.
This fight is personal to me. I have two kids in their early twenties, and I refuse to let their entire adult lives be dictated by an unjust and extreme SCOTUS that is attacking so many of the legal precedents that form the foundation of our Constitutional rights.
It took me a decade to pay off my student loans. I had to borrow at 9, 12 and 14 percent interest, and for most of that decade my loan payments were more than my Los Angeles rent — _no easy feat._ But I was lucky and went into a profession where I could pay them off. So many others aren’t that fortunate. This debt burden is holding our economy back by preventing people from purchasing homes, cars, and getting on with their lives after pursuing their education. And this reactionary Supreme Court could make the problem worse.
_Republicans stacked the Court. That’s why we need to unstack it._
**I’m authoring legislation to expand the number of Supreme Court justices, and supporting legislation to impose term limits and restore balance to the Court. Mitch McConnell stole two Supreme Court seats and embarked on a mission to overturn legal precedents on abortion rights, gun safety, privacy, and climate change. Now, they want to deny debt relief to tens of millions of Americans.**
**[If you agree that we need to reform the Supreme Court by expanding the number of justices and imposing term limits, add your name next to mine as a citizen cosponsor of the _Judiciary Act._ We need to restore balance to the Court — and I’m going to need your help to do it:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230301-scotus-reform/.QwYH0A&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230301_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1874%2E5257348%2EWJ7mHM)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230301-scotus-reform/.QwYH0A&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230301_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=1874%2E5257348%2EWJ7mHM)
---
Thanks for standing with me in support of a more democratic, more representative Supreme Court.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1874%2E5257348%2EWJ7mHM) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1874%2E5257348%2EWJ7mHM)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: President Biden attacked us
body:
We must be getting under their skin. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10343419?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

We must really be getting under their skin.

Yesterday, President Biden attacked our budget plan and personally referenced me during a speech in Virginia.

That’s because our plan is making serious headway in Congress and that irritates President Biden and the Democrats because they know it resonates with an increasing number of the American people.

The [point of our budget plan](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=91e0c9b93a&e=17913c7d6d) is to get America’s fiscal house in order by cutting unnecessary spending that fund woke and weaponized government programs working against the interests of the American people.

They can attack us all they want, but the _DC Cartel’s days are numbered and they know it_.

**I don’t often ask** , but now would be a great time to [support the important work](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=607d8eccdf&e=17913c7d6d) we are doing at the Center for Renewing America.
---
| [DONATE](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=92c8234050&e=17913c7d6d "DONATE")
---
| **WATCH:[Biden Attacks “Former Trump Budget Director” and CRA President Russ Vought](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=78d1c99f34&e=17913c7d6d)**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=da02f2786e&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| _“You know the MAGA Republicans in Congress still want to cut Medicaid. Well,_the former Trump budget director_ who is now advising them, that is the Republicans in the House on their fiscal strategy..”_

You can [watch President Biden’s remarks about our plan here](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c245cba6f0&e=17913c7d6d).

While I appreciate Biden recognizing **the great work my team at the Center is doing** ...his attacks show just how desperate the DC Cartel has become.

As I told [_Fox News_](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=492912fea6&e=17913c7d6d), "_we're glad the Administration has moved off their lies about Republicans and Social Security and Medicare. Now we hope they will look at our ideas to cut woke and weaponized bureaucracy and ensure that Medicaid is available for vulnerable populations._ "

As for the President’s attacks, I set the record straight about cuts to Medicaid on [Twitter](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c716fab270&e=17913c7d6d):
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=d949af4cb1&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| Friends, it’s been a whirlwind start to the year, but the fact that our work is being attacked by President Biden **shows you the impact we’re having in Washington**.

Unlike other organizations, we don’t take a dime from special interests. Instead, we [rely on Americans just like you](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e795b5831d&e=17913c7d6d) to keep our doors open, lights on, and our staff working 24/7 to end the DC cartel and implement America First policies.

Thank you for standing beside us.
---
| Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President
Center for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=16736199f8&e=17913c7d6d)
---

| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=26b4d36d0e&e=17913c7d6d)

300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

You can [update your preferences](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=c5efd1609f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=c5efd1609f).

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Joe Biden puts America LAST
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=46446a72bba94ff599404519d126f10c&_e=FtCyXjZ_9Koet74zYr5qoCMActWiAv84cKv9_ZAte3u-gmglcfY1fcneQneDhU_SC01tcZTTTMC9PqrvtGT6wileDGAoZaR9PL5wf6jbDnmZMDZdOZNB6aDLydQhhQKeLtzfp4wE2Ksb9Pb5ZPS8mcSlIrT2ZQAOT7FcBBLrV2MKFkZzcLf0JjjtnysE4RCkL3T95HOhY_jBgwQjx-VrJ0ZJJbbbRfRuQPNyGyrtp4UQdCKvxIfmnXO_DQ8crryWP-8DAsD8nP-wZXsFGA28qIDCO5KPMDJKayNFSXPeLxsvuvsNsp0ot5oCDhWnWH15AcySwVW1x3xOfqleFGVgedRgu_jjHRgWMF3_NwKVXHIbmIDtYXjKtHONZzCVvDasHJHgdmC1kOg_IUYynKEEIw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, Actions speak louder than words, and Joe Biden’s latest actions are shameful.

Joe Biden is more interested in foreign wars and flashy headlines than helping Americans right here at home.
Just this week, he went to Kyiv to promise Zelensky more no-strings-attached American taxpayer dollars - all while leaving Americans in crisis in East Palestine, Ohio.
**Peter, it’s time for REAL leaders who serve the people who elected them.**
[**Please sign on with me and DEMAND accountability from the Biden Administration for leaving America behind. SIGN NOW. >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=46446a72bba94ff599404519d126f10c&_e=FtCyXjZ_9Koet74zYr5qoCMActWiAv84cKv9_ZAte3u-gmglcfY1fcneQneDhU_SC01tcZTTTMC9PqrvtGT6wileDGAoZaR9PL5wf6jbDnmZMDZdOZNB6aDLydQhhQKeLtzfp4wE2Ksb9Pb5ZPS8mcSlIrT2ZQAOT7FcBBLrV2MKFkZzcLf0JjjtnysE4RCkL3T95HOhY_jBgwQjx-VrJ0ZJJbbbRfRuQPNyGyrtp4UQdCKvxIfmnXO_DQ8crryWA5nmlm2qnK0kAJm42HowUvv0IReJWfd8QzIruRArC4eFUn8gnN-xJ2P0YzacGHu_Yrmlz6aSj5dva495YFkurfzmAO8c6v1IyQdKgDKL33PlYzjSeTXQ0dCuJO5GYipID48Bg6KE_Sc6aM4FJZvj1w%3D%3D)
Peter, Ukraine is over 5,000 miles away.
But Joe Biden seems to have more time to make that journey than to visit the American citizens who need urgent help and leadership in Ohio.
And while he initially denied them federal emergency funding, he promised _billions_ more to Ukraine.
**He’s made himself clear: he doesn’t care about hardworking Americans like you, Peter.**
It seems like common sense: American leaders should prioritize AMERICA over foreign countries. But Joe Biden just doesn’t seem to get it.
[**Sign on now, and join me today in the fight for REAL leadership in Washington that will NEVER abandon America.**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=46446a72bba94ff599404519d126f10c&_e=FtCyXjZ_9Koet74zYr5qoCMActWiAv84cKv9_ZAte3u-gmglcfY1fcneQneDhU_SC01tcZTTTMC9PqrvtGT6wileDGAoZaR9PL5wf6jbDnmZMDZdOZNB6aDLydQhhQKeLtzfp4wE2Ksb9Pb5ZPS8mcSlIrT2ZQAOT7FcBBLrV2MKFkZzcLf0JjjtnysE4RCkL3T95HOhY_jBgwQjx-VrJ0ZJJbbbRfRuQPNyGyrtp4UQdCKvxIfmnXO_DQ8crryWoNX4G5qHb32Cqd2hmuzbvx-K1Kn81ati8UWweDIyLiwDDpdML5t9i-m0npb47vmo0v1rXP84zgG7YJCwnuAbeaTPvA3ZHBLi9Y8RiWpRC3lTnX6p5IPIlzZaAlIWq8GbWRm08lNs3QANavsVUGPtDQ%3D%3D)
Thank you,
Josh Hawley

clean_body: | | | Peter, Actions speak louder than words, and Joe Biden’s latest actions are shameful. Joe Biden is more interested in foreign wars and flashy headlines than helping Americans right here at home. Just this week, he went to Kyiv to promise Zelensky more no-strings-attached American taxpayer dollars - all while leaving Americans in crisis in East Palestine, Ohio. Peter, it’s time for REAL leaders who serve the people who elected them. Peter, Ukraine is over 5,000 miles away. But Joe Biden seems to have more time to make that journey than to visit the American citizens who need urgent help and leadership in Ohio. And while he initially denied them federal emergency funding, he promised billions more to Ukraine. He’s made himself clear: he doesn’t care about hardworking Americans like you, Peter. It seems like common sense: American leaders should prioritize AMERICA over foreign countries. But Joe Biden just doesn’t seem to get it. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

---
Peter,

Last night, we faced our first end-of-month fundraising deadline since a Republican opponent entered this race. With a challenger already in the race and the Washington GOP chair stating that flipping my seat was a top priority in 2024, we set an ambitious goal to ensure we're prepared for the tough fight ahead.

We knew hitting this goal wouldn't be easy, but thanks to this incredible grassroots team, I'm excited to share that **we reached our fundraising goal!**

Thank you, Peter. This race is officially on, and reaching our end-of-month goal puts us in a stronger position as we prepare for the other opponents and attacks that are headed my way.

I know our work is just beginning, but if we continue standing together, we can protect this seat and retake the House majority in 2024.

Thank you again,

Kim

Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. name: DNC HQ
subject: Honoring the generations of women that came before us→
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
We want to take a moment to honor the progress made possible by the sacrifice, determination, and contributions of women who have made our party and our country stronger. | |
---
Happy Women’s History Month, Derek! Today, I want to take a moment to honor the progress made possible by the sacrifice, determination, and contributions of women who have made our party and our country **stronger**. We stand on the shoulders of women who dared to open new doors, shape our progress, and strengthen our character as a people. Generations of Native women were stewards of the land and continue to lead the fight for climate justice. Black women fought to end slavery, advocated for civil rights, and helped pass the _Voting Rights Act_. Latina and AAPI labor leaders championed and organized for better conditions for domestic and agricultural workers. Suffragists helped pass the 19th Amendment to the Constitution so that no American could be denied the right to vote on the basis of sex. And now, we recognize the women at the forefront of our fight to protect reproductive rights both before and after the Supreme Court’s overturning of _Roe v. Wade_. **As Democrats, we recognize that there is no time like the present to be the change we want to see.** That is why the DNC will never stop working to fight for reproductive justice, protect progress for women everywhere, and build a more equitable and just future for all. **This month, we champion the women of our party who have made history, like Vice President Kamala Harris, the first woman and the first Black and AAPI person elected Vice President; Governors Maura Healey (MA) and Tina Kotek (OR), the first women and lesbians elected to the position of governor; Rep. Summer Lee, the first Black woman elected to Congress from Pennsylvania; Rep. Becca Balint, the first woman and openly gay person to represent Vermont in Congress; Rep. Delia Ramirez, the first Latina congresswoman from Illinois; and Aruna Miller, the first AAPI person and first immigrant elected lieutenant governor of Maryland; the list goes on.** We honor these firsts, and so many others at the state, federal, and municipal levels who reflect the diversity of our nation. As we reflect on these achievements this month and beyond, **[join me by staying informed with the DNC Coalitions Team.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQjEHCPDqPWPikrQBgOODAjbV-t-lwUfT7AG7yBoOL200EjI5DM1v-U8k5sXPpzur0Nnhat3YnC_JAS44bk9_edt9_eI2DCyRbzGkbQV_cmHZyzid6IN5zHu9YcioHVHY88RkbouOxnZu8xYxVnR0tYbj6T4mrk17UEPkO15Gq_Tyyvy0rMwY5ldSO1HabZ_xSaKj-0bpmlIZfl4d6kbCirrCMtoT7wlNEU9SXGGxRuZvP9-mP_uhX32NggHN_rKFGuKTUMYimpefwktwk5pY9vZ11z1WVI5HOeMa50LC3TGfPf9vcnNLGQoPnOoU0YVdOzD7beqZfYWDjqUpl_Iyf9RwLSHlr4I3EbRIR2ySsbXeOaftt0M3eGBpP_q3w-PFTfoqccFjA82cHI0P5MjuW_eEixmxn0fSbWRfi89J1kjvEXP-PjwfWpl3MawKUGU2zcPgeLmtHfj-0A2WgX2NRkRLEbLdfci-n_U6ktECxcmmD_q-UV_IfjpSkAajPWNeXAQFw6rKZsm7afFXpuE3Dnk/3u4/s5VeDQsvT6OwZ3K021mQzQ/h0/8KltaF8uv6ZU-L1ESQOvBr9vuK7GpPMOiDGfLRtCZCw)**

body:
That's right: the mastermind behind our current crime wave is none other than far Left George Soros.

| | | Friend, Donald Trump Jr. is BLOWING the lid off of the boldest woke liberal plot in his most recent viral tweet...
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=959dbdd09aa54a848d2a1495889f9968&_e=gHd303-94Oi_bsUtJlLswP4JqJBvwew99NM0D3P5HrhehveHH6KszAcNmBjVt5Iye1kDlchCD6_NxwaHI4hUb4MK0_s9WL65UEMUq3yZjwvObBUUyPDvesDtEtBBa0FlTTQOUbJK74Vn4hHSem_H7kLGe1os9Pt3A7ovN1Ncug7oJSXsH6o-PF6skQmEmk58Le7xlDthl1dHJ9IBFp8svP0U-AdBcQ7eeGZ4onOzRZtanbUWM0W4qYqj7pVjqOUywz_0aug8d3s5JlBb9sPeOgaQ5v24ytZ_l0td4Ms3TrR-dcjnQ8OXsLY5dwPQzbqOXucE0HWHyYFe0y-JN8MVRW5rkCtL-4s1e2tHNLOzlqd_z3ymBPGqIcdfQvPHIFeH)
---
_That 's right:_ _the mastermind behind our current crime wave is none other than far Left George Soros. _ **He 's been funneling millions of dollars into local prosecutor races across the country to replace solid prosecutors with liberal activists. ** These activists abandon justice in the name of "social justice," declining to prosecute crimes and setting violent criminals free. And guess what happens when prosecutors basically make crime legal? _You get more crime._ **_[Right now, 1 in 5 Americans are represented by a Soros-financed prosecutor. And unless we act now, that number will only grow.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=959dbdd09aa54a848d2a1495889f9968&_e=gHd303-94Oi_bsUtJlLswP4JqJBvwew99NM0D3P5HrhehveHH6KszAcNmBjVt5Iye1kDlchCD6_NxwaHI4hUb4MK0_s9WL65UEMUq3yZjwvObBUUyPDvesDtEtBBa0FlTTQOUbJK74Vn4hHSem_H7kLGe1os9Pt3A7ovN1Ncug7oJSXsH6o-PF6skQmEmk58Le7xlDthl1dHJ9IBFp8svGSAaILsLR27kbGh-F39E5N8nV1OMFUFZUNVKHlYUvEIb9IQuLw3UYWM-ZQ00wZdF2TL2bx0MR6j4-Ft92A7TdX_j30bEi8DpoQcjlZOVT5seompv5FHb60RdKAhh-sckKA_lBBT2rbfU0ONJQM3wNDC2-HMPrbp6PX8DWhpINqy)_** Conservatives MUST fight back. name: Robert Duran IV
subject: Introducing Robert Duran IV, National Executive Director of Rethink! GOP
body:
You don't want to miss this.
| | |
---
|
---
| Introducing Robert Duran IV, National Executive Director of Rethink! GOP
---
| Dear fellow Republicans of New Mexico,
It is with great pleasure that I introduce you to Robert Duran IV, the National Executive Director of Rethink! GOP. Robert is a native of Las Vegas, New Mexico and was raised in Santa Fe. He is a dedicated and experienced political professional with an impressive track record in managing and working with over 70 political campaigns nationwide, three sitting members of congress, and raising millions of dollars for Republican initiatives.
---
---
Robert is passionate about bringing change to the place he loves most - New Mexico. He believes that our state has the potential to be a leader in promoting Republican values, and he is committed to working with our party members to achieve this goal. His love for New Mexico is evident in his desire to make a positive impact on the state, and his dedication to the Republican party is unwavering.
We are excited to have Robert on board as our new National Executive Director, and we are confident that he will lead Rethink! GOP to new heights of success in New Mexico.
[Please join me in extending a warm welcome to Robert as he begins his tenure with our organization.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001muuj8U3cRZ6xR2CVDTOmnZCdcxy1UEPyOjXExWrJ0lY62Kl37xwpjYMMHhl0j74qhk2SKwFzwj-_ij5n5Vvi4GIlUKmEYsVLGqhvAzpG9unXlym11m772I4FZyt1Xpkc9_w_xlEPOSlWZtSRbIJESlAetWa46VBgSd7dthhQzIJL3ZgJmbwDkQ==&c=YwdojA5lPkZj3_Ev3dNx32MZOOaoqa2riIedudceHwzB73xxsr0wOA==&ch=2W7lYsMcp3Pu3AVvUevFN6E8dl4X7BNzwjVE8q03aPJ7JBcg640-jg==)
Best regards,
Rethink! name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: re: raising the Social Security retirement age
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We need to increase Social Security benefits, improve adjustments for inflation, and make more Americans eligible for this support.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=18606%2E3422442%2E2nPPsj)
**New** : A bipartisan group of Senators is discussing **raising the Social Security retirement age to 70.**
**First:** During debt ceiling talks, Republicans threatened to cut Social Security, even though Social Security adds $0 to our national debt.
Katie believes we need to increase Social Security benefits, improve adjustments for inflation, and make _more_ Americans eligible for this support—not less. She’ll stand up to any attempt to slash the benefits you and your family have earned.
**[We want to hear from you](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em-soc-sec-survey/?source=em20230301-1&akid=18606%2E3422442%2E2nPPsj)** : If you aren’t yet at retirement age, what would this change mean to you? If you are, how would fewer years of receiving your Social Security have affected you and your family?
**[Share your thoughts ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em-soc-sec-survey/?source=EMAF01_1_SOC_20230301_V1_F&akid=18606%2E3422442%2E2nPPsj)**
Derek, time and time again, Republicans keep trying to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, Social Security, and other programs that the *majority* of Americans rely on. We need to elect leaders like Katie Porter, who will stand up to billionaires and multinational corporations that want to cut these programs so they can avoid paying their fair share of taxes.
Thanks for being a part of our movement,
Katie Porter for California
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15887?amount=5&refcode=EMAF01_1_SOC_20230301_V1_F&t=20&akid=18606%2E3422442%2E2nPPsj)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF01_1_SOC_20230301_V1_F&t=21&refcode2=18606_3422442_2nPPsj&akid=18606%2E3422442%2E2nPPsj)**

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: The absurd Republican case against student debt relief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This is about freedom, economic security, and our future.
#
Peter,
**ICYMI:** Yesterday, the Supreme Court heard arguments on President Biden's plan to deliver critical student debt relief for more than 40 million borrowers. Let us be clear here: **SCOTUS must put the American people first and uphold the President's plan to deliver this desparately-needed relief.**
Rather than helping our communities, Republicans have predictably chosen to stand with loan companies who have been tirelessly lobbying for payments to resume so they can extract more profit. The same Republicans were pushing to provide massive handouts to corporations during the pandemic, but now they have turned their backs on the American people. **Shame on them.**
This goes far beyond just the cancellation of this crushing debt that has become a burden to millions across the country: This is about freedom, economic security, and uplifting the futures and lives of working people.
[**NO ONE should have to take on a crushing amount of debt to pursue a college degree. If you agree with us, can you chip in $3 — or any amount today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39461?refcode=em20230301-2225&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2225%2E420207%2E5iMu5L)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39461?refcode=em20230301-2225&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2225%2E420207%2E5iMu5L)**
Did you know that more than 90% of student loan borrowers earn less than $75k a year? This is a _**crisis**_ — even seniors are entering retirement with student debt. And more than **_12 million borrowers_** live in districts represented by the same Republicans who are seeking to deny them relief.
If this Court strikes down President Biden's debt relief proposal, they will be upholding the racial wealth gap that continues to **_disproportionately_** hurt and impact Black and Latino borrowers.
We must deliver a bold, transformative economic agenda that will empower future generations — not burden borrowers for decades to come.
We know we've come a long way in our fight to provide for millions of borrowers. And we know we have miles to go so we can continue delivering for working class people and their communities.
[**Our movement needs your support so we can keep up our fight against the lobbyists and corporations that are standing in the way of progress. Will you pitch in today to stand with the 40 million Americans in need of debt relief?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39461?refcode=em20230301-2225&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2225%2E420207%2E5iMu5L)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39461?refcode=em20230301-2225&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2225%2E420207%2E5iMu5L)**
In solidarity,
Jayapal HQ

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230301-2225-footer&t=23&refcode2=2225_420207_5iMu5L&akid=2225%2E420207%2E5iMu5L)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Rebecca Katz, Team Fetterman
subject: Fox News is attacking Gisele and John
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi Derek, it's Rebecca, Senior Advisor to John Fetterman.
During the campaign, we expected the right wing to come for John. And they did, relentlessly, for months. No matter how bad things got, we were prepared for it. That's what comes with running for Senate.
But you know what shouldn't? **Horrific, twisted, completely false attacks on Gisele.** For the past few weeks, Fox News has been full of them.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230301-1?refcode=em20230301-1-8270&refcode2=8270_434096_-x-KDT&akid=8270%2E434096%2E-x-KDT)
I've been lucky to know John and Gisele for years--and here's the thing: **Gisele is sunshine.** What I've seen behind the scenes is a mom protecting her kids, a spouse by John's side, and a woman who has stepped up in unbelievable ways for her family.
**These attacks are bullshit. And they are completely over the line.**
**[So I'm coming to you for the first time to ask: Can you make a donation of ANY amount to show your support + help us defend Gisele and John against these right-wing attacks?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230301-1?refcode=em20230301-1-8270&refcode2=8270_434096_-x-KDT&akid=8270%2E434096%2E-x-KDT)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230301-1?refcode=em20230301-8270&refcode2=8270_434096_-x-KDT&akid=8270%2E434096%2E-x-KDT)**
The hosts on Fox might see John seeking treatment as a moment of weakness, but we all know it took a huge amount of strength.
**Every day since, the #1 subject of calls to John's Senate office have been well wishes.** No matter what Fox pundits say, millions of people around the country see what John is going through and know they are not alone.
John is going to keep getting the care he needs, Gisele is going to keep looking out for her kids, and we should all keep calling out misogynistic bullshit when we see it.
Thank you,
Rebecca Katz
Senior Advisor, Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230301-8270-footer&t=1&refcode2=8270_434096_-x-KDT&akid=8270%2E434096%2E-x-KDT)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8270%2E434096%2E-x-KDT)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jen=20Kiggans?=
subject: Biden doesn’t want solutions!
body:
He is widening the divide between us | | | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=c3ddf2056a&e=4955722b3e)
---
| | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=1b14c88ecd&e=4955722b3e)
---
| Peter,

Did you see Biden’s speech in Virginia Beach yesterday? If you didn’t, no worries... it was more of the same division and lies Americans have grown accustomed to in his administration.
---
| [Stand against Biden’s division >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=bb7159dece&e=4955722b3e "Stand against Biden’s division >>>")
---
| President Biden, in his spirit of “unity and bipartisanship,” highlighted how Republicans are “threatening default and economic catastrophe unless we can force through our agenda,”...blaming his leadership failures on Republicans.
Biden came to my district, the district of the only Geriatric Nurse Practitioner in Congress, to claim Republicans don’t have the interests of American seniors in mind and that we want to get rid of Social Security and Medicare...! **I have spent over a decade serving our greatest generation as a healthcare provider and like my Republican colleagues in Congress have pledged to protect these entitlements.**
---
| [Stand against Biden’s division >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=023ac4c9d8&e=4955722b3e "Stand against Biden’s division >>>")
---
| [Support Jen Kiggans Today >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=9bf9d29851&e=4955722b3e "Support Jen Kiggans Today >>>")
---
| Biden does not want solutions. He doesn’t care to work together with members like me, a medical professional with a plan to improve our healthcare system. But most importantly Joe Biden doesn’t care about the truth.
That’s why I’m asking for a contribution today of [$35, $50, $100, $250 or even $500](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=db61c8874b&e=4955722b3e). With your help, I can keep spreading our message and keep standing up to Joe Biden’s divisive political theater.
I ran for Congress because I was sick of the division, the lies and the status quo in Washington. But as we saw yesterday Joe Biden clearly doesn’t have the same priorities.
We deserve better. That’s what I’m fighting for. With gratitude, Jen Kiggans
---
| | | | | | [](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=2cb061a66c&e=4955722b3e)
---
| | [](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=d644258ddc&e=4955722b3e)
---
| | [](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=59e75711b6&e=4955722b3e)
---
| [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=95edfb43fe&e=4955722b3e)
---
| Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=8538ce7c96&e=4955722b3e&c=f7b7470794) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=8538ce7c96&e=4955722b3e&c=f7b7470794).

Have you seen Elizabeth Warren’s GENIUS plan? [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
She just introduced the Youth Voting Rights Act to make it easier for young people to vote [!!] [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
The Youth Voting Rights Act will make it easier for young voters to register and harder for anti-democratic Republicans to suppress their votes.
ADD YOUR NAME: Co-Sponsor Elizabeth Warren’s Youth Voting Rights Act! [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
Sign the Petition >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
Extremist Republicans are rolling back voting rights nationwide, it’s critical that we protect young voters from targeted restrictions.
Elizabeth Warren’s new plan would:
*
Allow
teens
to
pre-register
to
vote
before
turning
18
*
Expand
voter
registration
services
at
colleges
and
universities
*
Require
on-campus
polling
places
at
colleges
and
universities
*
AND
guarantee
that
states
accept
student
IDs
ADD YOUR NAME: Co-Sponsor Elizabeth Warren’s Youth Voting Rights Act! [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
Sign the Petition >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
In the 2020 election, roughly 50% of eligible 18-24 year olds voted.
Young people have had to overcome a pandemic, social inequities, and radical voter suppression to cast their first ballots. They deserve to have their rights protected.
This election is one of the most CONSEQUENTIAL elections of our lifetime. And with so many laws and policies being passed that directly affect them, they deserve a voice too.
That’s why Elizabeth Warren’s new plan is SO important! We’re collecting 10,000 signatures to show Liz she has our full support. Will you stand with us to empower young people and sign our petition to Co-Sponsor her Youth Voting Rights Act? [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
Sign the Petition >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
Thank you,
Team DASS

clean_body: [] Have you seen Elizabeth Warren’s GENIUS plan? [] She just introduced the Youth Voting Rights Act to make it easier for young people to vote [!!] [] The Youth Voting Rights Act will make it easier for young voters to register and harder for anti-democratic Republicans to suppress their votes. ADD YOUR NAME: Co-Sponsor Elizabeth Warren’s Youth Voting Rights Act! [] Sign the Petition >> [] Extremist Republicans are rolling back voting rights nationwide, it’s critical that we protect young voters from targeted restrictions. Elizabeth Warren’s new plan would: Allow teens to pre-register to vote before turning 18 Expand voter registration services at colleges and universities Require on-campus polling places at colleges and universities AND guarantee that states accept student IDs ADD YOUR NAME: Co-Sponsor Elizabeth Warren’s Youth Voting Rights Act! [] Sign the Petition >> [] In the 2020 election, roughly 50% of eligible 18-24 year olds voted. Young people have had to overcome a pandemic, social inequities, and radical voter suppression to cast their first ballots. They deserve to have their rights protected. This election is one of the most CONSEQUENTIAL elections of our lifetime. And with so many laws and policies being passed that directly affect them, they deserve a voice too. That’s why Elizabeth Warren’s new plan is SO important! We’re collecting 10,000 signatures to show Liz she has our full support. Will you stand with us to empower young people and sign our petition to Co-Sponsor her Youth Voting Rights Act? [] Sign the Petition >> [] Thank you, Team DASS Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. Please donate anything you can today to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda: [] CHIP IN $5 >> []

name: Zilvinas Silenas
subject: How I trained 55,000 students in liberty in 2022
body:
Our educational workshops feature acclaimed college professors and successful entrepreneurs who bring the concepts of individual liberty, free enterprise, limited government, personal responsibility, and entrepreneurship to life.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61662998311e477dbc27098681747df2&_e=63MEUb5UwJ7h82KEZqD99aFPJusOvrYtjgIo1tw3WHnLQSYMrTgCtWuvHI6l1BL43M8V8AIHi3OVlR-QxdNFCjNdRdGWzqt23zVka9AO-QZcxr0t0xDR5SNiKWMQnsyYZNc1QbFBf70KMmpKFR699JQLhgBPsFrI5WqSgnlGoD9Y7GqFB6drIuExr6pFqiuEA6fsGFZpvxazs3oR8QgY6416S1og299ddjVuPcqkJLlIe2QD66NDxv2OncgMArxGFoU0nOUaULMWL5VyLrqstevvkGuzM-vyg6BsBW3G2-s0XXLu1Fd18LvaG5KqtJCc)

Friend,

Capitalism is evil, socialism is moral, and you should rely on the government for all your needs: _**this is what schools are teaching students. **_

Socialists are trying to reinvigorate the disastrous and evil ideas of socialism and indoctrinate the next generation. But we can counter these ideas by introducing students to the ideas of liberty and free markets.

The Foundation for Economic Education is taking action with **FEE in the Classroom.**

Let me introduce myself. My name is Zilvinas Silenas, and I am President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). Our mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society.

Last year we trained over 55,000 students and teachers in liberty and free market ideas. **And with your help, FEE is on track to reach over 65,000 students and teachers this year. **

To help achieve that goal, we're raising $50,000 by the end of the month.

[_**Will you join me in sharing a pro-liberty alternative with 65,000 students this year? Click here to send $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61662998311e477dbc27098681747df2&_e=63MEUb5UwJ7h82KEZqD99aFPJusOvrYtjgIo1tw3WHnLQSYMrTgCtWuvHI6l1BL43M8V8AIHi3OVlR-QxdNFCjNdRdGWzqt23zVka9AO-QZcxr0t0xDR5SNiKWMQnsyYZNc1QbFBf70KMmpKFR699Nw7EYhJ9IG4lipuv77fBJLi-jOIK8XJAYZG5r8o67sBfolSPu2w--R2uoy79WMCa4708Y5vMB8q5GmhmnXY3KvDqWRw0Pg6Gb_gxwbIgVk4rBWGgrihR00lh2TFba39vCrRRrzqq-glrrPWiLkIYXGHvWgcPuE-E8yGSBjlpvQg)

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans _**to think outside the box and challenge the mainstream narrative.**_

Our educational workshops feature acclaimed college professors and successful entrepreneurs who bring the concepts of individual liberty, free enterprise, limited government, personal responsibility, and entrepreneurship to life.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61662998311e477dbc27098681747df2&_e=63MEUb5UwJ7h82KEZqD99aFPJusOvrYtjgIo1tw3WHnLQSYMrTgCtWuvHI6l1BL43M8V8AIHi3OVlR-QxdNFCjNdRdGWzqt23zVka9AO-QZcxr0t0xDR5SNiKWMQnsyYZNc1QbFBf70KMmpKFR699FkEPD2XCMbShXP2YhopBG36unVzj5T8NO6UGhAThLSOb6QQpS3V0Sirle3BFLQHUB-Bnq8KBxNJMBFdjYoh_f7-vNiHwArRLAeFr9z-E-8g9tqPQh1a7nRsEQVardiFOFcNCQ96E3Gu-Oy4-E6dy1udmo6gCa5DIxsqeO1HiB4t)

In a single day, 75-300 students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As.

Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation.

[_**Help students learn the importance of liberty and free markets >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61662998311e477dbc27098681747df2&_e=63MEUb5UwJ7h82KEZqD99aFPJusOvrYtjgIo1tw3WHnLQSYMrTgCtWuvHI6l1BL43M8V8AIHi3OVlR-QxdNFCjNdRdGWzqt23zVka9AO-QZcxr0t0xDR5SNiKWMQnsyYZNc1QbFBf70KMmpKFR699EsVno-Opf-EkOKyRUuA3cB36oGylgcN4dYMfqv08kJ0-nMWZIuAOH9Y6vn3nbgvAIKuOJlE7V7d3zv6ZHu6W1dr4EYxLFdpatwu754w7LgrX02QU35f_Xhbwi7e4C-wC_JjbfOwQJivN3MFoEU5ZnfjyXBVFv-B8k4IMzZA-dZB)

These subjects are extremely important in our everyday lives, but the Radical Left doesn't think students are old enough to learn them.

A basic understanding of economics is key. The younger generation needs to know how to handle money, understand inflation, and more before they step out on their own.

And FEE in the Classroom is a chance for these students to learn those topics.

**FEE in the Classroom is your opportunity to pass the torch of liberty to thousands of students, Friend.**

Can I count on you to support _FEE in the Classroom_ and help reach 65,000 students this year? **Click below to donate and help reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61662998311e477dbc27098681747df2&_e=63MEUb5UwJ7h82KEZqD99aFPJusOvrYtjgIo1tw3WHnLQSYMrTgCtWuvHI6l1BL43M8V8AIHi3OVlR-QxdNFCjNdRdGWzqt23zVka9AO-QZcxr0t0xDR5SNiKWMQnsyYZnpF_ngAJ3a-OWHb2lWINVHN5WbDR4Aj52y8Ynh54MEGdJEfQ8jDwxrit4g5f9Mli6TXVmh4YOjZY56pRxA1KXJc30yf5_0FrEho8XzTdE0B8n16jRAG_PQAD17EB2p3DgtEA7OrWXQ_7Jgf0SckGINhvIb52x64fB6dM3OE5UTbD3MXd40R8QLxNG9TkoBS)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=61662998311e477dbc27098681747df2&_e=63MEUb5UwJ7h82KEZqD99aFPJusOvrYtjgIo1tw3WHnLQSYMrTgCtWuvHI6l1BL43M8V8AIHi3OVlR-QxdNFCjNdRdGWzqt23zVka9AO-QZcxr0t0xDR5SNiKWMQnsyYZnpF_ngAJ3a-OWHb2lWINVHN5WbDR4Aj52y8Ynh54MH7xIJQKHc0Xafm-tZkM3g5VLCgApw2uGcEPt9iRkI4jDblAxVVunnhft8Y0YN3pfACGQxbBz0qNuhlVbG17QmnUfEYzaOU00dcwT1DMheZxml143l7Kw4TtARp5dtFhZ4OzSbkhwiflFrvlkbyAFCO)
